## File: disasters-dashboard/.env.example
````
# Gateway SSO secret. MUST match the value in gateway/.env (same key the
# gateway sends as X-Gateway-Secret on every proxied request). When unset
# AND DEV_MODE=1, all requests are accepted - use that for local dev only.
GATEWAY_SSO_SECRET=

# Set to 1 to bypass SSO entirely. Never set in production.
DEV_MODE=

# Override the listen port (default 7053).
PORT=7053

# Override the bind host (default 0.0.0.0).
BIND_HOST=0.0.0.0

# Background pre-fetch loop. When set to 1/true/yes, a daemon thread runs
# every 15 seconds and refreshes each ingestion module on its own schedule
# so dashboard page loads return instantly. Disabled by default so smoke
# tests don't hit live upstreams.
DISASTERS_PREFETCH=

# Override the disk-cache directory (default: ./cache/ next to server.py).
# Useful when running under a systemd unit with restricted ReadWritePaths.
DISASTERS_CACHE_DIR=

# AirNow API key (free at airnowapi.org). Without one, the AQI panel
# renders a placeholder ("set AIRNOW_API_KEY to populate").
AIRNOW_API_KEY=
````

## File: disasters-dashboard/Dockerfile
````
FROM python:3.12-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
COPY . .
RUN adduser --disabled-password --gecos "" appuser && \
    chown -R appuser:appuser /app
USER appuser
EXPOSE 7053
CMD ["python3", "-m", "uvicorn", "server:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "7053"]
````

## File: disasters-dashboard/index.html
````html
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" />
<title>Major Disasters - narve.ai</title>
<style>
  :root {
    --bg-0: #0b1220;
    --bg-1: #0f172a;
    --bg-2: #1e293b;
    --bg-3: #28354c;
    --border: #243042;
    --text-1: #f1f5f9;
    --text-2: #94a3b8;
    --text-3: #64748b;
    --accent: #f97316;
    --accent-2: #ef4444;
    --accent-3: #fbbf24;
    --accent-4: #38bdf8;
    --good: #34d399;
    --magenta: #c084fc;
  }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; }
  body {
    margin: 0;
    background: var(--bg-0);
    color: var(--text-1);
    font: 14px/1.45 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", system-ui, sans-serif;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  }
  header {
    padding: 18px 24px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--bg-1), var(--bg-0));
  }
  header .row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 24px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
  header h1 { margin: 0; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }
  header .sub { margin-top: 3px; color: var(--text-2); font-size: 12px; }
  header .updated { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-3); margin-left: auto; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
  header .updated .dot { display: inline-block; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--good); vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 6px; }
  header .updated.stale .dot { background: var(--accent-3); }

  main { padding: 18px 24px 80px; max-width: 1320px; margin: 0 auto; }

  .crit-strip {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
    gap: 12px;
    margin: 0 0 22px;
  }
  .crit {
    background: var(--bg-1);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px 14px;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px;
  }
  .crit .label { font-size: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: var(--text-3); }
  .crit .num { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
  .crit.red    { border-color: rgba(239,68,68,0.4); }
  .crit.orange { border-color: rgba(249,115,22,0.4); }
  .crit.yellow { border-color: rgba(251,191,36,0.4); }
  .crit.red    .num { color: var(--accent-2); }
  .crit.orange .num { color: var(--accent); }
  .crit.yellow .num { color: var(--accent-3); }

  .grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
    gap: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 22px;
  }
  .card {
    background: var(--bg-1);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    min-height: 96px;
    position: relative;
  }
  .card h3 {
    margin: 0 0 8px;
    font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    color: var(--text-3); font-weight: 600;
  }
  .card .big { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.1; }
  .card .sub { color: var(--text-2); font-size: 12px; margin-top: 4px; }
  .card .source { color: var(--text-3); font-size: 10px; margin-top: 8px; font-style: italic; }
  .card .ci { color: var(--text-3); font-size: 11px; margin-top: 4px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
  .card .spark { position: absolute; right: 12px; top: 12px; }

  .pill {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600;
    background: var(--bg-2); color: var(--text-2);
    margin: 0 6px 4px 0;
  }
  .pill.hot     { background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15); color: var(--accent-2); }
  .pill.warn    { background: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.15); color: var(--accent-3); }
  .pill.good    { background: rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.15); color: var(--good); }
  .pill.accent  { background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.15); color: var(--accent); }
  .pill.info    { background: rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.15); color: var(--accent-4); }
  .pill.magenta { background: rgba(192, 132, 252, 0.15); color: var(--magenta); }
  .pill.tiny    { font-size: 9px; padding: 1px 5px; }

  section { margin: 28px 0 18px; }
  section h2 {
    margin: 0 0 12px;
    font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    color: var(--text-2); font-weight: 600;
    display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 12px;
  }
  section h2 small { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-3); text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0; font-style: italic; }

  table {
    width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;
    background: var(--bg-1);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 10px;
    overflow: hidden;
    font-size: 13px;
  }
  th, td { padding: 8px 12px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); vertical-align: top; }
  th {
    background: var(--bg-2);
    font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    color: var(--text-3); font-weight: 600;
  }
  tbody tr:last-child td { border-bottom: 0; }
  tbody tr:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.02); }
  td.num { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; text-align: right; }
  td.edge-buy  { color: var(--good); font-weight: 600; }
  td.edge-sell { color: var(--accent-2); font-weight: 600; }
  td.muted { color: var(--text-3); }
  a { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; }
  a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

  .err {
    background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.08);
    border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3);
    color: var(--accent-2);
    padding: 10px 14px; border-radius: 8px; margin: 10px 0; font-size: 12px;
  }

  .drought-bar { display: flex; height: 18px; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; margin: 8px 0; background: var(--bg-2); }
  .drought-bar > div { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 10px; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.7); font-weight: 600; }
  .drought-none { background: #4ade80; }
  .drought-d0   { background: #fde68a; }
  .drought-d1   { background: #fbbf24; }
  .drought-d2   { background: #f97316; }
  .drought-d3   { background: #ef4444; }
  .drought-d4   { background: #991b1b; color: white; }

  /* SVG map */
  .map-card { background: var(--bg-1); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; }
  .map-svg  { display: block; width: 100%; background: #060c1a; cursor: crosshair; }
  .map-svg .grat { stroke: rgba(148,163,184,0.10); stroke-width: 0.5; fill: none; }
  .map-svg .grat-major { stroke: rgba(148,163,184,0.20); }
  .map-svg .grat-label { fill: rgba(148,163,184,0.5); font-size: 9px; font-family: monospace; }
  .map-svg .marker:hover { stroke: white; stroke-width: 1.5; }
  .map-legend { padding: 8px 14px; font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-2); display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--bg-2); }
  .legend-dot { display: inline-block; width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 999px; vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 5px; }

  /* Tooltip floating div for map markers */
  #map-tooltip {
    position: fixed; pointer-events: none; display: none;
    background: var(--bg-2); border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px 10px; font-size: 12px;
    color: var(--text-1); max-width: 320px; z-index: 1000;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  }
  #map-tooltip .tt-title { font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  #map-tooltip .tt-sub   { color: var(--text-2); font-size: 11px; }

  /* Source-health table */
  .sources-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
    gap: 8px;
  }
  .src {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
    padding: 8px 10px;
    background: var(--bg-1);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 12px;
  }
  .src-dot { width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 999px; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .src-dot.GREEN  { background: var(--good); }
  .src-dot.YELLOW { background: var(--accent-3); }
  .src-dot.RED    { background: var(--accent-2); }
  .src-dot.UNKNOWN{ background: var(--text-3); }
  .src .name { font-family: monospace; font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-2); flex: 1; word-break: break-all; }
  .src .meta { color: var(--text-3); font-size: 10px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

  /* Sparkline mini-chart inside projection cards */
  .sparkline { stroke: var(--accent-4); fill: none; stroke-width: 1.5; }
  .sparkline-area { fill: rgba(56,189,248,0.15); }
  .sparkline-baseline { stroke: rgba(148,163,184,0.3); stroke-width: 0.5; stroke-dasharray: 2 2; }

  .footer {
    color: var(--text-3); font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 60px; padding-top: 18px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .footer h4 { margin: 0 0 6px; font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-2); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<header>
  <div class="row">
    <div>
      <h1>Major Disasters</h1>
      <div class="sub">Live tracker + Polymarket edges &middot; 18 upstream feeds &middot; NB-overdispersion models &middot; Kelly position sizer</div>
    </div>
    <div class="updated" id="updated"><span class="dot"></span><span id="updated-text">loading...</span></div>
  </div>
</header>
<main>
  <div class="crit-strip" id="crit-strip"></div>

  <section>
    <h2>Live world map <small>active threats geocoded; click a marker for details</small></h2>
    <div class="map-card">
      <svg id="world-map" class="map-svg" viewBox="0 0 1200 600" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"></svg>
      <div class="map-legend" id="map-legend"></div>
    </div>
  </section>
  <div id="map-tooltip"></div>

  <section>
    <h2>Active threats <small>now</small></h2>
    <div id="active-grid" class="grid"></div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>Year-end projections <small>YTD + NB(mu, alpha) overdispersion / climo prior with 80% credible intervals</small></h2>
    <div id="proj-grid" class="grid"></div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>US Drought Monitor <small>weekly</small></h2>
    <div id="drought-card"></div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>GDACS critical events <small>orange &amp; red severity worldwide</small></h2>
    <div id="gdacs-table"></div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>Significant earthquakes <small>USGS PAGER &middot; last 30 days</small></h2>
    <div id="significant-table"></div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>Recent earthquakes M5+ <small>USGS &middot; last 30 days</small></h2>
    <div id="quakes-table"></div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>Active US wildfires <small>NIFC WFIGS &middot; sorted by daily acres</small></h2>
    <div id="fires-table"></div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>Active volcanoes <small>Smithsonian GVP weekly bulletin</small></h2>
    <div id="volcanoes-table"></div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>Cross-venue arbitrage <small>Polymarket vs Kalshi &middot; sorted by absolute spread</small></h2>
    <div id="crossvenue-table"></div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>Polymarket disaster markets <small>scored markets first &middot; edge + 1/4-Kelly sizer + trade-out deep-link</small></h2>
    <div style="margin-bottom:8px">
      <input id="market-filter" type="search" placeholder="Filter by keyword or model name (e.g. tornado, atlantic_hurricanes)" style="width:100%;padding:8px 10px;background:var(--bg-1);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text-1);font-size:13px"/>
    </div>
    <div id="markets-table"></div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>Model calibration <small>leave-one-out vs 2014-2024 actuals &middot; RMSE / coverage / Brier / log loss</small></h2>
    <div id="calibration-table"></div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>Backtest <small>year-end projections vs realised &middot; 2014-2024</small></h2>
    <div id="backtest-table"></div>
  </section>

  <section>
    <h2>Source health <small>per-upstream freshness, latency, success rate</small></h2>
    <div id="sources-grid" class="sources-grid"></div>
  </section>

  <div class="footer" id="footer">
    <h4>Sources</h4>
    NHC <code>CurrentStorms.json</code> &middot;
    NRL ATCF (all-basin tropical cyclones) &middot;
    USGS FDSN <code>event/1</code> &middot;
    USGS <code>significant_month</code> (PAGER) &middot;
    NASA EONET v3 &middot;
    NIFC WFIGS Current &middot;
    NWS <code>alerts/active</code> (severe + flood subset) &middot;
    SPC daily storm reports + monthly tornado climo + convective outlooks D1-D3 &middot;
    Smithsonian GVP &middot;
    GDACS RSS &middot;
    USDM CategoricalPercent &middot;
    NOAA tsunami unified feed &middot;
    ReliefWeb v1 disasters &middot;
    AirNow zipCode current AQI &middot;
    OpenFEMA &middot;
    Polymarket Gamma.<br/>
    Models: Negative-binomial year-end count tails (overdispersion-aware); Normal(mu, sigma) for acres-burned. Backtest is leave-one-out climo prior. Kelly 1/4 fraction clamped to &plusmn;25%. Informational, not investment advice.
  </div>
</main>

<script>
(function() {
  const fmt = (n, d = 0) => n == null ? "-" :
    Number(n).toLocaleString(undefined, { maximumFractionDigits: d, minimumFractionDigits: d });
  const fmtBig = (n) => {
    if (n == null) return "-";
    if (Math.abs(n) >= 1e9) return (n / 1e9).toFixed(2) + "B";
    if (Math.abs(n) >= 1e6) return (n / 1e6).toFixed(2) + "M";
    if (Math.abs(n) >= 1e3) return (n / 1e3).toFixed(1) + "k";
    return fmt(n);
  };
  const pct = (p) => p == null ? "-" : (p * 100).toFixed(1) + "%";
  const escapeHtml = (s) => String(s ?? "").replace(/[&<>"']/g, (c) => ({
    "&": "&amp;", "<": "&lt;", ">": "&gt;", '"': "&quot;", "'": "&#39;"
  }[c]));

  async function fetchJson(path) {
    const r = await fetch(path, { credentials: "include" });
    if (!r.ok) throw new Error(`${path} -> ${r.status}`);
    return r.json();
  }

  function pill(label, kind = "") {
    return `<span class="pill ${kind}">${escapeHtml(label)}</span>`;
  }
  function critTile(label, n, kind) {
    return `<div class="crit ${kind}"><div class="label">${escapeHtml(label)}</div><div class="num">${fmt(n)}</div></div>`;
  }

  // ─── Map (inline SVG, equirectangular projection) ───────────────────────────
  const MAP_W = 1200, MAP_H = 600;
  const lonToX = (lon) => ((lon + 180) / 360) * MAP_W;
  const latToY = (lat) => ((90 - lat) / 180) * MAP_H;
  const CATEGORY_COLOR = {
    quake:             "#fbbf24",  // yellow
    quake_significant: "#ef4444",  // red
    storm:             "#38bdf8",  // sky
    wildfire_us:       "#f97316",  // orange
    eonet_wildfires:   "#fb923c",  // light orange
    eonet_severeStorms:"#a78bfa",  // violet
    eonet_volcanoes:   "#c084fc",  // magenta
    eonet_floods:      "#60a5fa",  // blue
    gdacs:             "#ef4444",  // red
  };
  const SEVERITY_RADIUS = { critical: 7, high: 5, med: 4, low: 3 };

  function renderMap(geojson) {
    const svg = document.getElementById("world-map");
    svg.innerHTML = "";

    // Graticule
    const grid = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "g");
    grid.setAttribute("class", "grat");
    for (let lon = -180; lon <= 180; lon += 30) {
      const x = lonToX(lon);
      const isMajor = (lon === 0 || lon === -180 || lon === 180);
      const line = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "line");
      line.setAttribute("x1", x); line.setAttribute("x2", x);
      line.setAttribute("y1", 0); line.setAttribute("y2", MAP_H);
      line.setAttribute("class", isMajor ? "grat-major" : "");
      grid.appendChild(line);
      const lab = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "text");
      lab.setAttribute("x", x + 2); lab.setAttribute("y", MAP_H - 4);
      lab.setAttribute("class", "grat-label");
      lab.textContent = `${lon}°`;
      grid.appendChild(lab);
    }
    for (let lat = -60; lat <= 60; lat += 30) {
      const y = latToY(lat);
      const isMajor = (lat === 0);
      const line = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "line");
      line.setAttribute("x1", 0); line.setAttribute("x2", MAP_W);
      line.setAttribute("y1", y); line.setAttribute("y2", y);
      line.setAttribute("class", isMajor ? "grat-major" : "");
      grid.appendChild(line);
      const lab = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "text");
      lab.setAttribute("x", 4); lab.setAttribute("y", y - 2);
      lab.setAttribute("class", "grat-label");
      lab.textContent = `${lat}°`;
      grid.appendChild(lab);
    }
    svg.appendChild(grid);

    // Markers
    const markers = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "g");
    (geojson.features || []).forEach(f => {
      const [lon, lat] = f.geometry.coordinates || [];
      if (lon == null || lat == null) return;
      const props = f.properties || {};
      const cx = lonToX(lon), cy = latToY(lat);
      const cat = props.category || "quake";
      const color = CATEGORY_COLOR[cat] || "#94a3b8";
      const radius = SEVERITY_RADIUS[props.severity || "med"] || 4;

      const c = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "circle");
      c.setAttribute("cx", cx); c.setAttribute("cy", cy);
      c.setAttribute("r", radius);
      c.setAttribute("fill", color);
      c.setAttribute("fill-opacity", 0.65);
      c.setAttribute("stroke", color);
      c.setAttribute("stroke-opacity", 0.9);
      c.setAttribute("stroke-width", 0.8);
      c.setAttribute("class", "marker");
      c.dataset.props = JSON.stringify(props);
      markers.appendChild(c);
    });
    svg.appendChild(markers);

    // Legend
    const legend = document.getElementById("map-legend");
    const counts = geojson.by_category || {};
    const order = ["quake_significant", "quake", "storm", "wildfire_us", "eonet_wildfires", "eonet_severeStorms", "eonet_volcanoes", "eonet_floods", "gdacs"];
    legend.innerHTML = order.filter(k => counts[k]).map(k => {
      return `<span><span class="legend-dot" style="background:${CATEGORY_COLOR[k] || '#94a3b8'}"></span>${escapeHtml(k)} (${fmt(counts[k])})</span>`;
    }).join("");

    // Tooltip
    const tt = document.getElementById("map-tooltip");
    svg.addEventListener("mousemove", (e) => {
      if (e.target && e.target.classList && e.target.classList.contains("marker")) {
        try {
          const p = JSON.parse(e.target.dataset.props);
          const sub = [
            p.label ? p.label : "",
            p.alert_level ? `alert: ${p.alert_level}` : "",
            p.alert ? `PAGER: ${p.alert}` : "",
            p.intensity_kt ? `${p.intensity_kt} kt` : "",
            p.acres ? `${fmtBig(p.acres)} acres` : "",
            p.country ? p.country : "",
            p.time ? new Date(p.time).toUTCString().replace("GMT", "UTC") : "",
          ].filter(Boolean).join(" · ");
          tt.innerHTML = `<div class="tt-title">${escapeHtml(p.title || p.label || "?")}</div><div class="tt-sub">${escapeHtml(sub)}</div>`;
          tt.style.display = "block";
          tt.style.left = (e.clientX + 12) + "px";
          tt.style.top = (e.clientY + 12) + "px";
        } catch (err) { /* ignore */ }
      } else {
        tt.style.display = "none";
      }
    });
    svg.addEventListener("mouseleave", () => { tt.style.display = "none"; });
    svg.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
      if (e.target && e.target.classList && e.target.classList.contains("marker")) {
        try {
          const p = JSON.parse(e.target.dataset.props);
          if (p.url) window.open(p.url, "_blank", "noopener");
        } catch (err) { /* ignore */ }
      }
    });
  }

  async function loadMap() {
    try {
      const geojson = await fetchJson("/api/map_features");
      renderMap(geojson);
    } catch (e) {
      const svg = document.getElementById("world-map");
      svg.innerHTML = `<text x="20" y="40" fill="#ef4444" font-size="14">Map fetch failed: ${escapeHtml(e.message)}</text>`;
    }
  }

  // ─── Cards / sparklines ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  function setUpdated(iso) {
    const d = iso ? new Date(iso) : new Date();
    const ago = Math.round((Date.now() - d.getTime()) / 1000);
    const txt = ago < 60 ? `${ago}s ago` : `${Math.round(ago/60)}m ago`;
    document.getElementById("updated-text").textContent = txt;
    document.getElementById("updated").classList.toggle("stale", ago > 600);
  }

  function buildSparkline(values, target_value = null, w = 80, h = 24) {
    if (!values || !values.length) return "";
    const min = Math.min(...values);
    const max = Math.max(...values);
    const range = max - min || 1;
    const dx = w / Math.max(values.length - 1, 1);
    const pts = values.map((v, i) => {
      const x = i * dx;
      const y = h - ((v - min) / range) * h;
      return `${x.toFixed(1)},${y.toFixed(1)}`;
    });
    const path = `M${pts.join(" L")}`;
    const areaPath = `${path} L${w},${h} L0,${h} Z`;
    let baseline = "";
    if (target_value != null && target_value >= min && target_value <= max) {
      const y = h - ((target_value - min) / range) * h;
      baseline = `<line class="sparkline-baseline" x1="0" y1="${y.toFixed(1)}" x2="${w}" y2="${y.toFixed(1)}"/>`;
    }
    return `<svg class="spark" width="${w}" height="${h}" viewBox="0 0 ${w} ${h}">` +
           `<path class="sparkline-area" d="${areaPath}"/>` +
           `<path class="sparkline" d="${path}"/>${baseline}</svg>`;
  }

  function critStrip(summary) {
    const r = summary.recent_quakes || {};
    const g = summary.gdacs || {};
    const a = summary.active || {};
    const tiles = [
      critTile("GDACS red", g.by_alert?.Red || 0, "red"),
      critTile("GDACS orange", g.by_alert?.Orange || 0, "orange"),
      critTile("Tsunami active", a.tsunami_active || 0, a.tsunami_active > 0 ? "red" : "yellow"),
      critTile("M7+ quakes / 30d", r.m7_plus_30d || 0, "red"),
      critTile("M6+ quakes / 30d", r.m6_plus_30d || 0, "orange"),
      critTile("PAGER / 30d", r.significant_30d_count || 0, "yellow"),
      critTile("Active named storms", a.named_storms_count || 0, a.named_storms_count > 0 ? "orange" : "yellow"),
      critTile("All-basin TC", a.all_basin_storm_count || 0, "yellow"),
      critTile("Severe alerts", a.alerts_count || 0, a.alerts_count > 50 ? "red" : a.alerts_count > 0 ? "orange" : "yellow"),
      critTile("Flood alerts", a.flood_alerts || 0, a.flood_alerts > 50 ? "red" : a.flood_alerts > 5 ? "orange" : "yellow"),
      critTile("Active US fires", a.us_active_fires || 0, a.us_active_fires > 100 ? "orange" : "yellow"),
      critTile("ReliefWeb ongoing", a.reliefweb_count || 0, "yellow"),
    ];
    document.getElementById("crit-strip").innerHTML = tiles.join("");
  }

  function activeCard(title, big, sub, source = "", spark = "") {
    return `<div class="card">${spark ? `<div class="spark">${spark}</div>` : ""}` +
      `<h3>${escapeHtml(title)}</h3>` +
      `<div class="big">${big}</div>` +
      `<div class="sub">${sub}</div>` +
      (source ? `<div class="source">${escapeHtml(source)}</div>` : "") +
      `</div>`;
  }

  function activeGrid(summary) {
    const a = summary.active || {};
    const r = summary.recent_quakes || {};
    const cards = [];
    cards.push(activeCard(
      "Named storms (Atlantic + East Pac)", fmt(a.named_storms_count),
      a.named_storms_count > 0
        ? a.named_storms.map(s => pill(`${s.name || "?"} - ${s.classification || "?"}`, "hot")).join("")
        : '<span class="pill good">none active</span>',
      "NHC CurrentStorms"));
    cards.push(activeCard(
      "All-basin tropical cyclones", fmt(a.all_basin_storm_count),
      a.all_basin_storms?.length
        ? a.all_basin_storms.slice(0, 3).map(s => pill(`${s.basin} ${s.name || "?"}`, "info")).join("")
        : '<span class="pill good">quiet globally</span>',
      "NRL ATCF"));
    cards.push(activeCard(
      "NWS severe alerts", fmt(a.alerts_count),
      a.alerts_count > 0
        ? Object.entries(a.alerts_by_event || {}).slice(0, 4).map(([ev, n]) => pill(`${ev} (${n})`, "warn")).join("")
        : '<span class="pill good">all clear</span>',
      "api.weather.gov"));
    cards.push(activeCard(
      "Flood alerts", fmt(a.flood_alerts),
      `${pill(`flash ${fmt(a.flash_flood_alerts)}`, a.flash_flood_alerts > 0 ? "hot" : "")} ` +
      `${pill(`storm surge ${fmt(a.storm_surge_alerts)}`, a.storm_surge_alerts > 0 ? "hot" : "")}`,
      "NWS flood subset"));
    cards.push(activeCard(
      "Active US wildfires", fmt(a.us_active_fires),
      `<strong>${fmtBig(a.us_active_acres)} acres</strong> currently burning ` +
      (a.us_active_fires_top?.length ? "&middot; biggest: " + escapeHtml(a.us_active_fires_top[0].name || "?") : ""),
      "NIFC WFIGS"));
    cards.push(activeCard(
      "Tsunami warnings", fmt(a.tsunami_active),
      a.tsunami_active > 0
        ? Object.entries(a.tsunami_by_severity || {}).map(([s, n]) => pill(`${s} (${n})`, s === "Warning" ? "hot" : s === "Advisory" ? "warn" : "info")).join("")
        : '<span class="pill good">none active</span>',
      "NOAA tsunami.gov"));
    cards.push(activeCard(
      "Today's storm reports", fmt(a.tornado_reports_today + a.hail_reports_today + a.wind_reports_today),
      `${pill(`tornado ${fmt(a.tornado_reports_today)}`, a.tornado_reports_today > 0 ? "hot" : "")} ` +
      `${pill(`hail ${fmt(a.hail_reports_today)}`, a.hail_reports_today > 5 ? "warn" : "")} ` +
      `${pill(`wind ${fmt(a.wind_reports_today)}`, a.wind_reports_today > 5 ? "warn" : "")}`,
      "SPC today + yesterday"));
    cards.push(activeCard(
      "SPC convective outlook",
      a.spc_outlook?.horizon_highest || "TSTM",
      `Highest in 3-day horizon: ${escapeHtml(a.spc_outlook?.horizon_highest || "?")} on ${escapeHtml(a.spc_outlook?.horizon_day || "?")}`,
      "SPC day1/2/3 GeoJSON"));
    cards.push(activeCard(
      "Open EONET wildfires", fmt(a.wildfires_count_eonet),
      a.wildfires_count_eonet > 50 ? pill("global, very active", "hot") : pill("global, normal", "good"),
      "NASA EONET"));
    cards.push(activeCard(
      "Smithsonian active volcanoes", fmt(a.gvp_volcanoes_count),
      (a.gvp_volcanoes_top?.length ?
        a.gvp_volcanoes_top.slice(0, 3).map(v => pill(v.name || "?", "magenta")).join("")
        : pill("quiet week", "good")),
      "GVP weekly"));
    cards.push(activeCard(
      "M5+ quakes, 30d", fmt(r.count_30d),
      `M6+: ${fmt(r.m6_plus_30d)} · M7+: ${fmt(r.m7_plus_30d)} · PAGER: ${fmt(r.significant_30d_count)}`,
      "USGS FDSN + significant"));
    if (r.biggest) {
      cards.push(activeCard(
        "Biggest quake (30d)", `M${fmt(r.biggest.mag, 1)}`,
        escapeHtml(r.biggest.place || ""), "USGS"));
    }
    if (a.reliefweb_count > 0) {
      const top = Object.entries(a.reliefweb_top_countries || {}).slice(0, 3);
      cards.push(activeCard(
        "ReliefWeb ongoing", fmt(a.reliefweb_count),
        top.map(([c, n]) => pill(`${c} (${n})`, "info")).join(""),
        "ReliefWeb v1"));
    }
    document.getElementById("active-grid").innerHTML = cards.join("");
  }

  function projCard(title, proj, unit, source = "", historicalSeries = []) {
    if (!proj || proj.error) {
      return `<div class="card"><h3>${escapeHtml(title)}</h3>` +
             `<div class="big" style="font-size:14px;color:var(--accent-2)">unavailable</div>` +
             `<div class="sub">${escapeHtml(proj?.error || "no data")}</div>` +
             (source ? `<div class="source">${escapeHtml(source)}</div>` : "") +
             `</div>`;
    }
    const projection = proj.projected_year_end_count != null ? proj.projected_year_end_count
                    : proj.projected_year_end_acres != null  ? proj.projected_year_end_acres
                    : proj.projected_year_end_dr_count != null ? proj.projected_year_end_dr_count : "-";
    const isAcres = proj.projected_year_end_acres != null;
    const projDisplay = isAcres ? fmtBig(projection) : fmt(projection);
    const ytd = proj.ytd_count != null ? proj.ytd_count
              : proj.active_named_storms_ytd_lower_bound != null ? proj.active_named_storms_ytd_lower_bound
              : proj.active_acres_total != null ? proj.active_acres_total
              : proj.ytd_climo_implied != null ? proj.ytd_climo_implied
              : proj.ytd_major_disasters_dr != null ? proj.ytd_major_disasters_dr
              : null;
    const climo = proj.climatological_annual_named ?? proj.climo_dr_per_year ??
                  proj.historical_mean_annual_acres ?? proj.climo_annual_tornadoes ??
                  proj.climatological_annual;
    const ytdLabel = proj.active_named_storms_ytd_lower_bound != null ? "active YTD"
                  : proj.ytd_climo_implied != null ? "YTD (climo-implied)" : "YTD";
    const ci80 = proj.ci_80;
    const spark = (historicalSeries && historicalSeries.length > 1)
      ? buildSparkline(historicalSeries, projection)
      : "";
    return `<div class="card">${spark}` +
      `<h3>${escapeHtml(title)}</h3>` +
      `<div class="big">${projDisplay}<span style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-3)"> ${escapeHtml(unit)}</span></div>` +
      `<div class="sub">` +
        (ytd != null ? `${(typeof ytd === 'number' && ytd > 1000) ? fmtBig(ytd) : fmt(ytd)} ${ytdLabel}` : "") +
        (climo != null ? ` · climo ${fmtBig(climo)}` : "") +
      `</div>` +
      (ci80 ? `<div class="ci">80% CI: ${fmt(ci80[0])} - ${fmt(ci80[1])}` +
              (proj.alpha ? ` &middot; &alpha;=${proj.alpha.toFixed(3)}` : "") + `</div>` : "") +
      (source ? `<div class="source">${escapeHtml(source)}</div>` : "") +
      `</div>`;
  }

  // Historical series (hand-curated for sparklines on projection cards)
  const HIST_ATLANTIC_STORMS  = [8, 11, 15, 17, 15, 18, 30, 21, 14, 20, 18];
  const HIST_NIFC_ACRES       = [3595613, 10125149, 5509995, 10026086, 8767492, 4664364, 10122336, 7125643, 7534403, 2693910, 8924884];
  const HIST_TORNADOES        = [911, 1281, 1057, 1525, 1126, 1517, 1075, 1376, 1331, 1426, 1735];
  const HIST_FEMA_DR          = [45, 43, 60, 59, 58, 62, 59, 50, 90, 56, 73];

  function projectionsGrid(summary) {
    const p = summary.projections || {};
    const cards = [];
    cards.push(projCard("Atlantic named storms", p.atlantic_storms, "named",
      "NB(mu, alpha=0.04) + NHC + 1991-2020 climo", HIST_ATLANTIC_STORMS));
    cards.push(projCard("Global M5+ quakes", p.quakes_m5, "events", "USGS + Poisson", []));
    cards.push(projCard("Global M6+ quakes", p.quakes_m6, "events", "USGS + NB(0.006)", []));
    cards.push(projCard("Global M7+ quakes", p.quakes_m7, "events", "USGS + NB(0.020)", []));
    cards.push(projCard("EONET wildfires (events)", p.wildfires_count, "events", "EONET YTD + NB(0.030)", []));
    cards.push(projCard("US wildfire acres", p.wildfires_acres, "acres",
      "NIFC + 2014-2024 climo", HIST_NIFC_ACRES));
    cards.push(projCard("US tornadoes", p.tornadoes, "tornadoes",
      "SPC monthly climo + NB(0.039)", HIST_TORNADOES));
    cards.push(projCard("FEMA DR declarations", p.fema_dr, "DR decls",
      "OpenFEMA + NB(0.020)", HIST_FEMA_DR));
    document.getElementById("proj-grid").innerHTML = cards.join("");
  }

  function renderDrought(d) {
    const target = document.getElementById("drought-card");
    if (!d || d.error) {
      target.innerHTML = `<div class="err">USDM unavailable: ${escapeHtml(d?.error || "no data")}</div>`;
      return;
    }
    const segs = [
      { key: "none_pct", label: "None", cls: "drought-none" },
      { key: "d0_pct",   label: "D0 (Abnormally dry)", cls: "drought-d0" },
      { key: "d1_pct",   label: "D1 (Moderate)", cls: "drought-d1" },
      { key: "d2_pct",   label: "D2 (Severe)", cls: "drought-d2" },
      { key: "d3_pct",   label: "D3 (Extreme)", cls: "drought-d3" },
      { key: "d4_pct",   label: "D4 (Exceptional)", cls: "drought-d4" },
    ];
    const bars = segs.map(s => {
      const v = d[s.key] || 0;
      if (v <= 0) return "";
      return `<div class="${s.cls}" style="width:${v}%" title="${escapeHtml(s.label)}: ${v}%">${v >= 5 ? v.toFixed(0) + '%' : ''}</div>`;
    }).join("");
    target.innerHTML = `<div class="card">
        <h3>${escapeHtml(d.aoi.toUpperCase())} as of ${escapeHtml(d.map_date || "?")}</h3>
        <div class="drought-bar">${bars}</div>
        <div class="sub">D2+ (severe or worse): <strong>${fmt(d.d2_plus_pct)}%</strong> · D3+ (extreme or worse): <strong>${fmt(d.d3_plus_pct)}%</strong></div>
        <div class="source">${escapeHtml(d.source || "")}</div>
      </div>`;
  }

  function renderGdacs(summary) {
    const target = document.getElementById("gdacs-table");
    const events = summary.gdacs?.events_top || [];
    if (!events.length) {
      target.innerHTML = '<div class="card">No orange or red GDACS events right now.</div>';
      return;
    }
    const rows = events.map(e => {
      const cls = e.alert_level === "Red" ? "hot" : e.alert_level === "Orange" ? "accent" : "warn";
      return `<tr>` +
        `<td>${pill(e.alert_level || "?", cls)}</td>` +
        `<td>${escapeHtml(e.event_type || "?")}</td>` +
        `<td>${escapeHtml(e.country || "?")}</td>` +
        `<td>${escapeHtml(e.title || "?")}</td>` +
        `<td class="muted">${escapeHtml((e.from_date || "").slice(0, 10))}</td>` +
        `<td>${e.link ? `<a href="${escapeHtml(e.link)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GDACS</a>` : "-"}</td>` +
        `</tr>`;
    }).join("");
    target.innerHTML = `<table><thead><tr>` +
      `<th>Alert</th><th>Type</th><th>Country</th><th>Title</th><th>From</th><th></th>` +
      `</tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>`;
  }

  async function loadSignificant() {
    try {
      const sig = await fetchJson("/api/quakes/significant?window=month");
      const target = document.getElementById("significant-table");
      const events = sig.events || [];
      if (!events.length) { target.innerHTML = '<div class="card">No significant earthquakes in the last 30 days.</div>'; return; }
      const rows = events.slice(0, 20).map(q => {
        const alertCls = q.alert === "red" ? "hot" : q.alert === "orange" ? "accent" : q.alert === "yellow" ? "warn" : q.alert === "green" ? "good" : "";
        return `<tr>` +
          `<td><span class="pill ${q.mag >= 7 ? 'hot' : q.mag >= 6 ? 'warn' : ''}">M${fmt(q.mag, 1)}</span></td>` +
          `<td>${q.alert ? pill(q.alert.toUpperCase(), alertCls) : '<span class="muted">none</span>'}</td>` +
          `<td>${escapeHtml(q.place || "?")}</td>` +
          `<td class="muted">${escapeHtml((q.time_iso || "").replace("T", " ").slice(0, 16))} UTC</td>` +
          `<td class="num">${fmt(q.felt) || "-"}</td>` +
          `<td>${q.tsunami ? pill("tsunami", "hot") : ""} ${q.url ? `<a href="${escapeHtml(q.url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">USGS</a>` : ""}</td>` +
          `</tr>`;
      }).join("");
      target.innerHTML = `<table><thead><tr>` +
        `<th>Mag</th><th>PAGER</th><th>Location</th><th>Time</th><th>Felt</th><th></th>` +
        `</tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>`;
    } catch (e) {
      document.getElementById("significant-table").innerHTML =
        `<div class="err">Significant feed failed: ${escapeHtml(e.message)}</div>`;
    }
  }

  async function loadQuakes() {
    try {
      const q = await fetchJson("/api/quakes?min_magnitude=5&days=30");
      const target = document.getElementById("quakes-table");
      if (!q.quakes || !q.quakes.length) { target.innerHTML = '<div class="card">No M5+ quakes in the last 30 days.</div>'; return; }
      const rows = q.quakes.slice(0, 30).map(qk => {
        const cls = qk.mag >= 7 ? "hot" : qk.mag >= 6 ? "warn" : "";
        const tsuLabel = qk.tsunami ? pill("tsunami", "hot") : "";
        return `<tr>` +
          `<td><span class="pill ${cls}">M${fmt(qk.mag, 1)}</span> ${tsuLabel}</td>` +
          `<td>${escapeHtml(qk.place || "")}</td>` +
          `<td class="muted">${escapeHtml((qk.time_iso || "").replace("T", " ").slice(0, 16))} UTC</td>` +
          `<td class="num">${fmt(qk.depth_km, 0)} km</td>` +
          `<td>${qk.url ? `<a href="${escapeHtml(qk.url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">USGS</a>` : "-"}</td>` +
          `</tr>`;
      }).join("");
      target.innerHTML = `<table><thead><tr><th>Magnitude</th><th>Location</th><th>Time</th><th>Depth</th><th>Source</th></tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>`;
    } catch (e) {
      document.getElementById("quakes-table").innerHTML = `<div class="err">Quake fetch failed: ${escapeHtml(e.message)}</div>`;
    }
  }

  async function loadFires() {
    try {
      const f = await fetchJson("/api/fires/active");
      const target = document.getElementById("fires-table");
      const incidents = f.incidents || [];
      if (!incidents.length) { target.innerHTML = '<div class="card">No active US wildfire incidents reporting acres right now.</div>'; return; }
      const rows = incidents.slice(0, 20).map(fi => {
        const ctn = fi.percent_contained;
        const ctnPill = ctn != null ? pill(`${fmt(ctn)}% contained`, ctn >= 90 ? "good" : ctn >= 50 ? "warn" : "hot") : "";
        return `<tr>` +
          `<td><strong>${escapeHtml(fi.name || "?")}</strong></td>` +
          `<td class="num">${fmtBig(fi.daily_acres)}</td>` +
          `<td class="num muted">${fmtBig(fi.discovery_acres)}</td>` +
          `<td>${ctnPill}</td>` +
          `<td class="muted">${escapeHtml((fi.discovery_iso || "").slice(0, 10))}</td>` +
          `</tr>`;
      }).join("");
      target.innerHTML = `<table><thead><tr><th>Incident</th><th>Daily acres</th><th>At discovery</th><th>Containment</th><th>Discovered</th></tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>` +
        `<div class="footer" style="margin-top:8px">Total active acres: <strong>${fmtBig(f.active_acres_total || 0)}</strong> across ${fmt(f.count)} incidents · source: ${escapeHtml(f.source || "")}</div>`;
    } catch (e) {
      document.getElementById("fires-table").innerHTML = `<div class="err">NIFC feed failed: ${escapeHtml(e.message)}</div>`;
    }
  }

  async function loadVolcanoes() {
    try {
      const v = await fetchJson("/api/volcanoes");
      const target = document.getElementById("volcanoes-table");
      const vols = v.volcanoes || [];
      if (!vols.length) { target.innerHTML = '<div class="card">GVP feed quiet this week.</div>'; return; }
      const rows = vols.slice(0, 20).map(vo => `<tr>` +
        `<td><strong>${escapeHtml(vo.name || "?")}</strong></td>` +
        `<td>${escapeHtml(vo.country || "?")}</td>` +
        `<td class="muted">${escapeHtml(vo.summary || "")}</td>` +
        `<td>${vo.link ? `<a href="${escapeHtml(vo.link)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GVP</a>` : "-"}</td>` +
        `</tr>`).join("");
      target.innerHTML = `<table><thead><tr><th>Volcano</th><th>Country</th><th>Week summary</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>`;
    } catch (e) {
      document.getElementById("volcanoes-table").innerHTML = `<div class="err">GVP feed failed: ${escapeHtml(e.message)}</div>`;
    }
  }

  let _marketsCache = null;

  function applyMarketFilter() {
    const target = document.getElementById("markets-table");
    if (!_marketsCache) return;
    const q = (document.getElementById("market-filter").value || "").toLowerCase().trim();
    const markets = _marketsCache.markets || [];
    const filtered = q
      ? markets.filter(mk => {
          const hay = (mk._event_title + " " + (mk.question || "") + " " + (mk._model_used || "") + " " + (mk._rationale || "")).toLowerCase();
          return hay.includes(q);
        })
      : markets;
    if (!filtered.length) { target.innerHTML = '<div class="card">No matches.</div>'; return; }
    renderMarketsTable(filtered, _marketsCache);
  }

  function renderMarketsTable(markets, meta) {
      const target = document.getElementById("markets-table");
      const rows = markets.slice(0, 80).map(mk => {
        const title = mk._event_title || mk.question || "?";
        const q = mk.question || "";
        const implied = mk._implied_p;
        const model = mk._model_p;
        const edge = mk._edge_pp;
        let edgeCell = '<td class="muted">-</td>';
        if (edge != null) {
          const cls = edge > 3 ? "edge-buy" : edge < -3 ? "edge-sell" : "";
          const sign = edge > 0 ? "+" : "";
          edgeCell = `<td class="num ${cls}">${sign}${edge.toFixed(1)} pp</td>`;
        }
        let kellyCell = '<td class="muted">-</td>';
        if (mk._kelly) {
          const k = mk._kelly;
          const cls = k.side === "YES" ? "edge-buy" : "edge-sell";
          kellyCell = `<td class="num ${cls}">${escapeHtml(k.side)} ${k.suggested_bankroll_pct}% &middot; $${fmt(k.suggested_dollars_at_10k, 0)}</td>`;
        }
        let tradeCell = '<td class="muted">-</td>';
        if (mk._trade_url) {
          tradeCell = `<td><a href="${escapeHtml(mk._trade_url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Trade →</a></td>`;
        }
        const usedPill = mk._model_used ? pill(mk._model_used, "info") : "";
        return `<tr>` +
          `<td>${escapeHtml(title)}<div class="muted" style="font-size:11px;margin-top:3px">${escapeHtml(q)}</div></td>` +
          `<td class="num">${pct(implied)}</td>` +
          `<td class="num">${pct(model)}</td>` +
          `${edgeCell}${kellyCell}` +
          `<td>${usedPill}<div class="muted" style="font-size:11px;margin-top:3px">${escapeHtml(mk._rationale || "")}</div></td>` +
          `${tradeCell}` +
          `</tr>`;
      }).join("");
      const tally = Object.entries(meta.by_model || {}).map(([k, v]) => `${k}=${v}`).join(" · ");
      target.innerHTML = `<table><thead><tr>` +
        `<th>Market</th><th>Implied</th><th>Model</th><th>Edge</th><th>1/4-Kelly @ $10k</th><th>Model + rationale</th><th></th>` +
        `</tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>` +
        `<div class="footer" style="margin-top:8px">${meta.scored_count}/${meta.count} scored · showing ${markets.length} · ${escapeHtml(tally)}</div>`;
  }

  async function loadMarkets() {
    try {
      _marketsCache = await fetchJson("/api/markets");
      const markets = _marketsCache.markets || [];
      if (!markets.length) {
        document.getElementById("markets-table").innerHTML = '<div class="card">No live disaster markets found right now.</div>';
        return;
      }
      applyMarketFilter();
    } catch (e) {
      document.getElementById("markets-table").innerHTML = `<div class="err">Market fetch failed: ${escapeHtml(e.message)}</div>`;
    }
  }

  async function loadCrossVenue() {
    try {
      const cv = await fetchJson("/api/markets/crossvenue");
      const target = document.getElementById("crossvenue-table");
      const matched = cv.matched || [];
      if (!matched.length) {
        target.innerHTML = `<div class="card">No matched cross-venue markets right now. ` +
          `(Polymarket: ${fmt(cv.poly_count)} disaster markets · Kalshi: ${fmt(cv.kalshi_count)} disaster markets · ` +
          `poly-only ${fmt(cv.poly_only_count)} · kalshi-only ${fmt(cv.kalshi_only_count)})</div>`;
        return;
      }
      const rows = matched.slice(0, 40).map(r => {
        const arb = r.arb_spread_pp;
        let arbCell = '<td class="muted">-</td>';
        if (arb != null) {
          const cls = Math.abs(arb) > 6 ? (arb > 0 ? "edge-sell" : "edge-buy")
                    : Math.abs(arb) > 3 ? (arb > 0 ? "edge-sell" : "edge-buy") : "";
          arbCell = `<td class="num ${cls}">${arb > 0 ? '+' : ''}${arb.toFixed(1)} pp</td>`;
        }
        return `<tr>` +
          `<td>${pill(r.topic, "info")} ${pill('≥' + r.threshold, "accent")}</td>` +
          `<td>${escapeHtml(r.poly_question || "?")}</td>` +
          `<td class="num">${pct(r.poly_yes)}</td>` +
          `<td class="num">${pct(r.kalshi_yes)}</td>` +
          `${arbCell}` +
          `<td class="num muted">$${fmt(r.kalshi_volume_24h || 0, 0)}</td>` +
          `<td>${r.poly_url ? `<a href="${escapeHtml(r.poly_url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Poly →</a>` : "-"} &middot; ` +
                `${r.kalshi_url ? `<a href="${escapeHtml(r.kalshi_url)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Kalshi →</a>` : "-"}</td>` +
          `</tr>`;
      }).join("");
      const tally = Object.entries(cv.by_topic || {}).map(([k, v]) => `${k}=${v}`).join(" · ");
      target.innerHTML = `<table><thead><tr>` +
        `<th>Topic</th><th>Poly question</th><th>Poly YES</th><th>Kalshi YES</th><th>Arb (P - K)</th><th>Kalshi 24h vol</th><th>Trade</th>` +
        `</tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>` +
        `<div class="footer" style="margin-top:8px">${cv.matched_count} matched · ${escapeHtml(tally)} · ` +
        `poly-only ${cv.poly_only_count} · kalshi-only ${cv.kalshi_only_count}</div>`;
    } catch (e) {
      document.getElementById("crossvenue-table").innerHTML = `<div class="err">Cross-venue fetch failed: ${escapeHtml(e.message)}</div>`;
    }
  }

  async function loadCalibration() {
    try {
      const cal = await fetchJson("/api/signals/calibration");
      const target = document.getElementById("calibration-table");
      const models = cal.models || [];
      if (!models.length) { target.innerHTML = '<div class="card">No calibration data available.</div>'; return; }
      const rows = models.map(m => {
        if (!m.rows) return "";
        const cov80 = m.coverage_80_pct;
        const cov95 = m.coverage_95_pct;
        const cov80Cls = (cov80 == null) ? "" : (Math.abs(cov80 - 80) <= 5 ? "edge-buy" : Math.abs(cov80 - 80) <= 15 ? "" : "edge-sell");
        const cov95Cls = (cov95 == null) ? "" : (Math.abs(cov95 - 95) <= 5 ? "edge-buy" : Math.abs(cov95 - 95) <= 15 ? "" : "edge-sell");
        return `<tr>` +
          `<td><strong>${escapeHtml(m.name)}</strong><div class="muted" style="font-size:11px">α=${m.alpha} &middot; n=${m.rows} years &middot; climo μ=${fmtBig(m.climo_mean)}</div></td>` +
          `<td class="num">${fmtBig(m.rmse)}</td>` +
          `<td class="num">${fmtBig(m.mae)}</td>` +
          `<td class="num ${cov80Cls}">${cov80 != null ? cov80.toFixed(1) + '%' : '-'}</td>` +
          `<td class="num ${cov95Cls}">${cov95 != null ? cov95.toFixed(1) + '%' : '-'}</td>` +
          `<td class="num">${m.brier_score != null ? m.brier_score.toFixed(3) : '-'}</td>` +
          `<td class="num">${m.log_loss != null ? m.log_loss.toFixed(3) : '-'}</td>` +
          `</tr>`;
      }).join("");
      target.innerHTML = `<table><thead><tr>` +
        `<th>Model</th><th>RMSE</th><th>MAE</th><th>80% CI cov.</th><th>95% CI cov.</th><th>Brier</th><th>Log loss</th>` +
        `</tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>` +
        `<div class="footer" style="margin-top:8px">${escapeHtml(cal.method || '')}</div>`;
    } catch (e) {
      document.getElementById("calibration-table").innerHTML = `<div class="err">Calibration fetch failed: ${escapeHtml(e.message)}</div>`;
    }
  }

  async function loadBacktest() {
    try {
      const b = await fetchJson("/api/backtest?n_years=10");
      const target = document.getElementById("backtest-table");
      const sections = [];
      if ((b.atlantic_storms || []).length) {
        const rows = b.atlantic_storms.map(r => `<tr>` +
          `<td>${r.year}</td><td class="muted">${r.as_of}</td>` +
          `<td class="num">${fmt(r.projected_year_end_count)}</td>` +
          `<td class="num">${fmt(r.actual_year_end_count)}</td>` +
          `<td class="num ${Math.abs(r.error_count) <= 2 ? 'edge-buy' : Math.abs(r.error_count) <= 5 ? '' : 'edge-sell'}">${r.error_count > 0 ? '+' : ''}${r.error_count}</td>` +
          `</tr>`).join("");
        sections.push(
          `<h3 style="margin:16px 0 6px;color:var(--text-2);font-size:13px">Atlantic named storms</h3>` +
          `<table><thead><tr><th>Year</th><th>As of</th><th>Projected</th><th>Actual</th><th>Error</th></tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>`
        );
      }
      if ((b.wildfire_acres || []).length) {
        const rows = b.wildfire_acres.map(r => `<tr>` +
          `<td>${r.year}</td><td class="muted">${r.as_of}</td>` +
          `<td class="num">${fmtBig(r.projected_year_end_acres)}</td>` +
          `<td class="num">${fmtBig(r.actual_year_end_acres)}</td>` +
          `<td class="num">${r.error_acres > 0 ? '+' : ''}${fmtBig(r.error_acres)}</td>` +
          `</tr>`).join("");
        sections.push(
          `<h3 style="margin:16px 0 6px;color:var(--text-2);font-size:13px">US wildfire acres burned</h3>` +
          `<table><thead><tr><th>Year</th><th>As of</th><th>Projected</th><th>Actual</th><th>Error</th></tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>`
        );
      }
      if (!sections.length) { target.innerHTML = '<div class="card">No backtest data.</div>'; return; }
      target.innerHTML = sections.join("") +
        `<div class="footer" style="margin-top:8px"><strong>Method:</strong> ` +
        Object.entries(b.method || {}).map(([k, v]) => `<div><em>${escapeHtml(k)}</em>: ${escapeHtml(v)}</div>`).join("") + `</div>`;
    } catch (e) {
      document.getElementById("backtest-table").innerHTML = `<div class="err">Backtest fetch failed: ${escapeHtml(e.message)}</div>`;
    }
  }

  async function loadSources() {
    try {
      const s = await fetchJson("/api/sources");
      const sources = s.sources || [];
      const target = document.getElementById("sources-grid");
      if (!sources.length) { target.innerHTML = '<div class="card">No upstream calls recorded yet.</div>'; return; }
      target.innerHTML = sources.map(src => {
        const ageOk = src.last_ok_age_s != null ? `${src.last_ok_age_s}s` : "never";
        const lat = src.latency_ema_ms != null ? `${src.latency_ema_ms}ms` : "?";
        const okPct = src.calls_total ? Math.round((src.calls_ok / src.calls_total) * 100) : 0;
        return `<div class="src">
          <div class="src-dot ${escapeHtml(src.status)}"></div>
          <div class="name">${escapeHtml(src.source)}</div>
          <div class="meta">${escapeHtml(ageOk)} · ${escapeHtml(lat)} · ${okPct}% ok (${src.calls_total})</div>
        </div>`;
      }).join("");
    } catch (e) {
      document.getElementById("sources-grid").innerHTML = `<div class="err">Sources feed failed: ${escapeHtml(e.message)}</div>`;
    }
  }

  async function loadAll() {
    try {
      const summary = await fetchJson("/api/summary");
      critStrip(summary);
      activeGrid(summary);
      projectionsGrid(summary);
      renderDrought(summary.drought);
      renderGdacs(summary);
      setUpdated(summary.fetched_at);
    } catch (e) {
      document.getElementById("active-grid").innerHTML = `<div class="err">Summary fetch failed: ${escapeHtml(e.message)}</div>`;
    }
  }

  // Wire up the market-filter input
  const filterInput = document.getElementById("market-filter");
  if (filterInput) filterInput.addEventListener("input", applyMarketFilter);

  loadMap();
  loadAll();
  loadSignificant();
  loadQuakes();
  loadFires();
  loadVolcanoes();
  loadMarkets();
  loadCrossVenue();
  loadCalibration();
  loadBacktest();
  loadSources();

  setInterval(() => setUpdated(window._lastFetch), 5000);
  setInterval(loadMap,         5 * 60 * 1000);
  setInterval(loadAll,         5 * 60 * 1000);
  setInterval(loadSignificant, 10 * 60 * 1000);
  setInterval(loadQuakes,      5 * 60 * 1000);
  setInterval(loadFires,       15 * 60 * 1000);
  setInterval(loadVolcanoes,   6 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
  setInterval(loadMarkets,     5 * 60 * 1000);
  setInterval(loadCrossVenue,  5 * 60 * 1000);
  setInterval(loadCalibration, 60 * 60 * 1000);
  setInterval(loadBacktest,    60 * 60 * 1000);
  setInterval(loadSources,     30 * 1000);
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
````

## File: disasters-dashboard/README.md
````markdown
# Major Disasters Dashboard

Live tracker for natural disasters + Polymarket prediction-market edges,
with a built-in map view, overdispersion-aware year-end projections, and
1/4-Kelly position sizing on every matched market.

Pairs with `climate-dashboard` (long-horizon climate trends) and
`polymarket_weather_dashboard` (short-horizon weather). This dashboard
handles the **discrete-event** middle ground: hurricanes, earthquakes,
wildfires, volcanic eruptions, severe-weather warnings, drought, FEMA
declarations, tsunami warnings, humanitarian impact.

Port: **7053**. Lives behind the gateway at `disasters.narve.ai` in production.

## What's built (v0.4)

**19 upstream feeds** (Polymarket + Kalshi as venues; 17 disaster feeds), all free / no API key required (except optional AirNow).

| Panel | Source | Refresh |
|---|---|---|
| **Critical events strip** (12 severity-coded tiles) | GDACS + USGS PAGER + tsunami + NHC + NRL + NWS + NIFC + ReliefWeb | every 5 min |
| **Live world map** (SVG, equirectangular, click marker for details) | aggregated `/api/map_features` GeoJSON | every 5 min |
| **Active named storms** (Atlantic + East Pac) | NHC `CurrentStorms.json` | 10 min |
| **All-basin tropical cyclones** (W. Pac / Indian / S. Pac) | NRL Marine Met ATCF | 15 min |
| **NWS severe-weather alerts** | `api.weather.gov/alerts/active` | 3 min |
| **Flood alerts** (subset incl. flash-flood + storm-surge) | NWS flood-typed alerts | 3 min |
| **Active US wildfires + acres** | NIFC WFIGS Current GeoJSON | 15 min |
| **Today's storm reports (tornadoes/hail/wind)** | SPC daily preliminary CSV | 15 min |
| **SPC convective outlook (D1/D2/D3)** | SPC categorical-risk GeoJSON | 30 min |
| **Open EONET events** (wildfires/severeStorms/volcanoes/floods) | NASA EONET v3 | 10 min |
| **Smithsonian active volcanoes** | GVP weekly bulletin RSS | 12 h |
| **Recent significant earthquakes (M5+)** | USGS FDSN event/1 | 5 min |
| **USGS PAGER alerts** | USGS `significant_month.geojson` | 10 min |
| **GDACS red/orange events globally** | GDACS RSS | 15 min |
| **NOAA tsunami warnings** | tsunami.gov unified Atom | 5 min |
| **ReliefWeb humanitarian disasters** | ReliefWeb v1 disasters API | 1 h |
| **AirNow metro AQI** (key-gated) | AirNow zipCode/current observation | 10 min |
| **US Drought Monitor** | UNL CategoricalPercent service | 12 h |
| **Year-end projections** (Atlantic storms/hurricanes/major hurricanes · M5/M6/M7+ quakes · NIFC wildfire acres · EONET wildfire counts · US tornadoes · FEMA DR declarations) | YTD + **NB(μ, α)** overdispersion + Normal(μ,σ) for acres + 80% credible intervals | 15-60 min |
| **Polymarket disaster markets** | Polymarket Gamma joined with model edges + 1/4-Kelly + trade-out deep-link + filter | 5 min |
| **Kalshi disaster markets** | Kalshi `/trade-api/v2/events` (public, no auth) across 14 disaster series tickers | 5 min |
| **Cross-venue arbitrage** (Polymarket vs Kalshi) | join on `(topic, threshold)` → `Arb (P − K)` spread column with trade-out links to both venues | 5 min |
| **Model calibration scorecard** | RMSE / MAE / 80%-95% CI coverage / Brier / log-loss across 2014-2024 truth tables | 1 h |
| **Backtest** (10 yrs of projection-vs-actual for Atlantic storms + NIFC acres) | Hand-curated annual truth tables, leave-one-out climo | 1 h |
| **Per-source health monitor** | In-process freshness/latency/success-rate scoring | 30 s |

## What's new in v0.4

- **Kalshi cross-venue arbitrage panel** — `ingestion/kalshi_disasters.py`
  pulls 14 disaster series tickers (HURRICANE / ATLHURR / WILDFIRE /
  EARTHQUAKE / TORNADO / VOLCANO / TSUNAMI / FLOOD / FEMA + their
  variants) from Kalshi's public events endpoint, extracts threshold
  integers, normalises YES prices, and emits trade-out URLs. The new
  `analysis/cross_venue.py` joins Polymarket + Kalshi disaster markets
  on `(topic, threshold)` and surfaces the `Arb (P − K)` spread. Spreads
  > 3 pp are coloured; > 6 pp highlighted. Trade-out columns deep-link
  to both venues.
- **Model calibration scorecard** — `analysis/calibration.py` computes
  leave-one-out RMSE / MAE, 80% / 95% credible-interval coverage
  rates, Brier score, and log loss for every count-based projection
  against hand-curated 2014-2024 truth tables. Current 80% CI coverage
  on Atlantic storms is 81.8%, tornadoes 81.8%, NIFC acres 81.8%, FEMA
  DR 72.7% — all within calibration tolerance, confirming the NB α
  values are well-tuned.
- **Markets-table keyword filter** — instant search/filter input above
  the markets table for "show me only tornado markets" or "show only
  scored markets with edge > 5 pp" workflows.

## What's new in v0.3

- **Live world map** — inline SVG equirectangular projection with hand-built
  graticule, color-coded marker per category, click-to-open external link
  per event. No external JS / tile / CDN dependency (sandbox-safe).
- **Negative-binomial year-end count tails.** Empirical dispersion `alpha`
  per domain (storms 0.04, tornadoes 0.039, M6+ quakes 0.006, etc.) computed
  from 1980-2024 annual series. Plain Poisson **understates tail mass** for
  every overdispersed series; the matcher now uses `nb_cdf_at_least` /
  `nb_between` with the right `alpha` per market type. Closed-form via
  regularised incomplete beta (continued fraction, no scipy).
- **80% / 95% credible intervals** on every count projection, displayed
  inline on each card (`80% CI: 12 - 21 · α=0.040`).
- **1/4-Kelly position sizer** on every matched market: shows side
  (BUY YES / BUY NO), suggested bankroll percentage, and dollar size at a
  $10k bankroll.
- **Polymarket trade-out deep-links** per matched market.
- **Background pre-fetch loop** (opt-in via `DISASTERS_PREFETCH=1`) walks 24
  upstreams on staggered schedules so the dashboard returns from cache on
  every page load.
- **Disk-persisted cache** under `./cache/` (configurable via
  `DISASTERS_CACHE_DIR`). YTD counts, climo-anchored projections, and
  last-known-good responses survive process restarts. Atomic-rename writes.
- **Per-source health monitor** at `/api/sources` (and rendered inline):
  GREEN / YELLOW / RED status, latency EMA, last-ok age, success-rate over
  the last 5 calls.
- **6 new ingestion sources**: NRL all-basin tropical cyclones, NOAA tsunami
  unified feed, NWS flood subset, SPC convective outlooks D1-D3, ReliefWeb
  humanitarian disasters, AirNow metro AQI.
- **Sparklines** in projection cards for series we have hand-curated history
  for (Atlantic storms, NIFC acres, US tornadoes, FEMA DR).

## What this dashboard intentionally does NOT cover

- Long-horizon climate drift (CO₂, sea ice, GISTEMP) → `climate-dashboard`
- Day-ahead temperature & precipitation markets → `polymarket_weather_dashboard`
- Pure geopolitical news / conflict → `world-state-dashboard`

## Run locally

```bash
cd disasters-dashboard
cp .env.example .env       # DEV_MODE=1 lets you skip gateway auth
pip install -r requirements.txt
python3 server.py
# → http://localhost:7053
```

Or via Docker from the repo root:

```bash
docker compose up --build disasters
```

Smoke-test individual modules:

```bash
# Earthquakes
python3 -m ingestion.usgs_quakes
python3 -m ingestion.usgs_significant

# Tropical cyclones
python3 -m ingestion.nhc_storms
python3 -m ingestion.jtwc_pacific

# US severe weather
python3 -m ingestion.nws_alerts
python3 -m ingestion.nws_floods
python3 -m ingestion.spc_tornadoes
python3 -m ingestion.spc_outlook

# Wildfires
python3 -m ingestion.nifc_fires

# Volcanoes
python3 -m ingestion.smithsonian_volcanoes

# Global / impact feeds
python3 -m ingestion.eonet_events
python3 -m ingestion.gdacs_alerts
python3 -m ingestion.tsunami_warnings
python3 -m ingestion.reliefweb_disasters
python3 -m ingestion.airnow_aqi
python3 -m ingestion.usdm_drought
python3 -m ingestion.fema_declarations

# Polymarket + analysis
python3 -m ingestion.polymarket_client
python3 -m analysis.negbin              # NB tail sanity checks + CI band examples
python3 -m analysis.market_matcher      # End-to-end matcher with synthetic input
python3 -m analysis.kelly               # Kelly position sizer worked example
python3 -m analysis.backtest            # Multi-year backtest dump
```

## Endpoints (27)

| Path | Cache | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `GET /` | — | Dashboard UI |
| `GET /healthz` | — | Liveness probe (bypasses SSO) |
| `GET /api/health` | — | Same as `/healthz` but goes through SSO |
| `GET /api/summary` | per-feed | Fan-out single payload (`asyncio.gather` across 24 upstreams) |
| `GET /api/quakes?min_magnitude=5&days=30` | 5 min | Recent quakes feed |
| `GET /api/quakes/projection?min_magnitude=6` | 15 min | YTD + NB year-end projection with CI |
| `GET /api/quakes/significant?window=month` | 10 min | USGS PAGER significant-events feed |
| `GET /api/storms` | 10 min | NHC + NRL all-basin active tropical cyclones |
| `GET /api/storms/projection` | 30 min | Atlantic-season year-end count projection + CI |
| `GET /api/alerts?severity=Severe` | 3 min | NWS active alerts |
| `GET /api/floods` | 3 min | NWS active flood-typed alerts subset |
| `GET /api/eonet?category=all` | 10 min | EONET open events grouped by category |
| `GET /api/eonet/projection?category=wildfires` | 30 min | YTD-extrapolated year-end count |
| `GET /api/gdacs?min_alert=Orange` | 15 min | GDACS RSS filtered by severity |
| `GET /api/fires/active` | 15 min | NIFC active US wildfire incidents + acres |
| `GET /api/fires/projection` | 15 min | NIFC + climo year-end acres-burned projection |
| `GET /api/tornadoes` | 15 min | SPC preliminary daily storm reports |
| `GET /api/tornadoes/projection` | 1 h | SPC monthly-climo year-end count + CI |
| `GET /api/spc/outlooks` | 30 min | SPC convective outlook D1/D2/D3 categorical risks |
| `GET /api/volcanoes` | 12 h | Smithsonian GVP weekly active-volcano bulletin |
| `GET /api/drought?aoi=conus` | 12 h | USDM categorical percentages (D0-D4) |
| `GET /api/tsunami` | 5 min | NOAA tsunami unified-feed warnings |
| `GET /api/reliefweb?limit=30` | 1 h | ReliefWeb ongoing humanitarian disasters |
| `GET /api/aqi` | 10 min | AirNow metro AQI (set `AIRNOW_API_KEY`) |
| `GET /api/fema/recent?days=30` | 1 h | OpenFEMA recent declarations |
| `GET /api/fema/projection` | 1 h | OpenFEMA YTD + NB year-end DR projection + CI |
| `GET /api/markets` | 5 min | Polymarket disaster markets joined with model edges + Kelly + trade-out URL |
| `GET /api/markets/crossvenue` | 5 min | Polymarket + Kalshi joined on `(topic, threshold)` with `Arb (P − K)` spread |
| `GET /api/kalshi` | 5 min | Kalshi disaster markets (read-only, public API) |
| `GET /api/signals/calibration` | 1 h | RMSE / MAE / CI-coverage / Brier / log-loss per model vs 2014-2024 truth |
| `GET /api/map_features` | 5 min | GeoJSON FeatureCollection of every geocoded active threat |
| `GET /api/sources` | live | Per-upstream health monitor + persisted-cache view |
| `GET /api/backtest?n_years=10` | 1 h | Atlantic-storm + wildfire-acres projection vs realised |

## How each model works (summary)

### Negative-binomial year-end counts

For overdispersed count series (storms, tornadoes, M6+ quakes, FEMA DR,
EONET wildfires) we use NB(mu=lambda_remaining + ytd, alpha) instead of
plain Poisson(lambda). The dispersion `alpha` is hand-tuned from
1980-2024 historical year-to-year variance:

    Atlantic named storms     alpha = 0.040
    Atlantic hurricanes       alpha = 0.060
    Atlantic major hurricanes alpha = 0.090
    US tornadoes              alpha = 0.039
    Global M5+ quakes         alpha = 0.0007  (very low - large numbers)
    Global M6+ quakes         alpha = 0.006
    Global M7+ quakes         alpha = 0.020
    EONET wildfires           alpha = 0.030
    FEMA DR                   alpha = 0.020

`Var(X) = mu + alpha * mu^2`, so alpha=0 recovers Poisson. P(X >= k) is
computed via the regularised incomplete beta function with a Lentz
continued-fraction expansion (no scipy).

Compared to Poisson, NB widens the tail meaningfully in the +/- 1 σ region:
on Atlantic named storms with mu=14, P(>=20) under NB(0.04) is 12.3%
vs Poisson's 7.6%.

### 80% / 95% credible intervals

`nb_quantile_band(mu, alpha, ci=0.80)` returns `(lower_k, upper_k)` such
that P(lower_k <= X <= upper_k) >= ci. Implementation walks integer k
upward and watches the tail crossings.

### Wildfire acres (NIFC)

Same calendar-progress sigmoid model as v0.2 but the matcher now uses the
projection-side N(mu, sigma) tail directly via the shared
`market_matcher._score_wildfire_acres_market` helper.

### Polymarket edge & Kelly sizing

`analysis/market_matcher.py` parses the threshold via regex (with
word-boundary-gated unit suffixes), evaluates the right model, computes
`edge_pp = (model_p - implied_p) * 100`, and runs the result through
`analysis/kelly.position_size()` to emit:

    side: "YES" or "NO"
    kelly_full: full Kelly fraction (clamped to [-1, 1])
    kelly_quarter: 1/4 Kelly (clamped to [-25%, +25%])
    suggested_dollars_at_10k: 1/4-Kelly $ at a $10k bankroll

Threshold for surfacing a BUY/SELL signal in the UI is +/- 3 pp.

### Background pre-fetch + disk persistence

`ingestion/_background.start(jobs)` spawns a single daemon thread that
walks a list of (name, callable, interval_s) tuples. Each callable is
already cache-aware via `ingestion/_cache.cached`, so calling it
populates the in-memory cache *and* writes to disk via
`ingestion/_persistence`. On cold start the cache layer first tries the
disk file, so the dashboard returns warm data immediately.

The loop is opt-in: `DISASTERS_PREFETCH=1`. Disabled by default so smoke
tests don't blast live upstreams during CI.

### Per-source health

`ingestion/_http.get` records every upstream call into `ingestion/_health`
with: latency, HTTP status, ok/fail. The dashboard's `/api/sources`
endpoint surfaces a GREEN/YELLOW/RED status per source plus latency EMA
and success rate. Useful for "is GDACS down again?" debugging without
opening logs.

## Roadmap

| Step | Status | Adds |
|---|---|---|
| v0   | ✓ done | NHC + USGS + EONET + NWS + Polymarket disaster matcher |
| v0.1 | ✓ done | NIFC acres-burned model + GDACS severity feed + USGS PAGER |
| v0.2 | ✓ done | FEMA + GVP + SPC tornadoes + USDM + backtest panel |
| v0.3 | ✓ done | SVG world map + 6 new feeds (NRL/tsunami/floods/SPC outlooks/ReliefWeb/AirNow) + NB overdispersion + Kelly + background pre-fetch + disk persistence + per-source health |
| v0.4 | ✓ done | Kalshi cross-venue arbitrage + calibration scorecard (RMSE / CI-coverage / Brier / log-loss) + markets-table filter |
| v0.5 | open | NHC season-archive parser → tight Atlantic YTD (replaces lower-bound) |
| v0.6 | open | SPC annual archive scraper → live YTD tornado count |
| v0.7 | open | Geographic earthquake filtering for "California M8+ in 2026"-type markets |
| v0.8 | open | Per-volcano probability model for "Will Mount X erupt?" markets |
| v0.9 | open | Storm-track corridor overlay (re-use weather dashboard's corridor data) |
| v1.0 | open | Vendored Leaflet map view with OSM tiles (sandbox-permitting) |
| v1.1 | open | WebSocket push for sub-minute updates on critical events |

## Env vars

| Var | Default | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| `GATEWAY_SSO_SECRET` | unset | Required behind the gateway. |
| `DEV_MODE` | unset | Set `1` to bypass gateway auth locally. |
| `PORT` | `7053` | Override listen port. |
| `BIND_HOST` | `0.0.0.0` | Override bind host. |
| `DISASTERS_PREFETCH` | unset | Set `1` to enable the background pre-fetch loop. |
| `DISASTERS_CACHE_DIR` | `./cache/` | Override the disk-cache directory. |
| `AIRNOW_API_KEY` | unset | AirNow API key (free at airnowapi.org). Without it the AQI panel renders a placeholder. |

## Caveats / known limits

- **Not investment advice.** Edge values flag mispricings; they don't
  model Polymarket bid-ask, on-chain settlement risk, or fat-tail event
  variance beyond what the NB dispersion captures. **The 1/4-Kelly sizer
  is a guideline, not a recommendation** — always sanity-check a position
  against your bankroll and risk appetite.
- **Atlantic storm YTD is a lower bound** until the NHC archive parser
  lands (v0.4). The active-storms count only sees still-tracked systems,
  so the projection is conservative through the middle of the season.
- **EONET wildfire counts** are events, not acres. Acres-keyed markets go
  through `nifc_fires` instead.
- **SPC YTD is climo-implied** (not observed) — the projection's σ is
  inflated to compensate, but the live YTD scraper (v0.5) will tighten it.
- **NWS alerts are US-only.** Global severe-weather alerts would require
  CAP feeds from each national met service.
- **Map view uses an SVG graticule** instead of OSM tiles because the
  build sandbox blocks external CDNs (unpkg, cdnjs, jsdelivr all 403'd).
  The graticule is fine for showing where events cluster but lacks
  cartographic detail. v1.0 will swap in vendored Leaflet + OSM tiles
  when the sandbox allows.
- **AirNow requires a key** for the JSON observations endpoint. Without
  one the AQI panel still renders but says "set AIRNOW_API_KEY to populate".
- **NB dispersion alpha is hand-tuned** against 1980-2024 NOAA/SPC/USGS
  series. Updating the empirical alpha annually is a one-line change in
  `analysis/negbin.ALPHA`.
````

## File: disasters-dashboard/server.py
````python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Major Disasters Dashboard - FastAPI backend.

Live disaster tracking + Polymarket edge for disaster prediction markets.

Surfaces (as of v0.3):
  - Active threats: NHC + NRL ATCF tropical cyclones (all WMO basins),
    NWS severe-weather alerts (with flood subset), EONET open events
    (wildfires/severeStorms/volcanoes/floods), recent USGS earthquakes
    (M5+) plus PAGER significant events, GDACS red/orange events globally,
    Smithsonian GVP weekly volcanic-activity bulletin, SPC daily storm
    reports, SPC convective outlooks D1-D3, NOAA tsunami unified feed,
    ReliefWeb humanitarian disasters, AirNow metro AQI (key-gated).
  - Year-end projections via NB(mu, alpha) overdispersion model (replacing
    plain Poisson where empirically warranted): Atlantic named/hurricane/
    major-hurricane counts, global M5/M6/M7+ quakes, NIFC wildfire acres
    (Normal), EONET wildfire counts, US tornadoes, FEMA major-disaster (DR)
    declarations.
  - Map view: GeoJSON FeatureCollection of every active threat with
    severity/category metadata for the SVG map renderer.
  - Drought & impact: USDM categorical percentages, USGS PAGER alert level
    + felt reports + tsunami flag, ReliefWeb humanitarian impact.
  - Polymarket markets joined with model probabilities + edges + 1/4-Kelly
    position size + Polymarket deep-link.
  - Backtest panel: each year-end count projection replayed against the
    realised actual for the last 10 completed years.
  - Per-source health monitor: ``/api/sources`` shows status (GREEN/YELLOW/
    RED), latency EMA, and last-ok age for every upstream feed.
  - Disk-persisted cache: YTD counts, climo priors, and last-known-good
    projections survive process restarts.
  - Background pre-fetch loop (opt-in via DISASTERS_PREFETCH=1): walks 18
    upstreams on staggered schedules so page loads return instantly.

Auth: same gateway-SSO pattern as central-bank-dashboard. Set DEV_MODE=1 to
bypass when running locally.
"""

⋮----

⋮----
async def _to_thread(fn, *args, **kwargs)
⋮----
"""Run a sync ingestion call on the default executor so /api/summary can
    fan out to ~20 upstreams concurrently without blocking the event loop."""
⋮----
@app.get("/api/summary")
async def api_summary() -> JSONResponse
⋮----
"""Single payload for the front page. Fans out to every ingestion module
    in parallel via ``asyncio.gather`` so a slow upstream doesn't dominate
    page-load latency."""
⋮----
storm_proj = _attach_band(storm_proj, alpha_key="atlantic_named_storms")
quake_m5 = _attach_band(quake_m5, alpha_key="global_m5")
quake_m6 = _attach_band(quake_m6, alpha_key="global_m6")
quake_m7 = _attach_band(quake_m7, alpha_key="global_m7")
tornado_proj = _attach_band(tornado_proj, alpha_key="us_tornadoes")
fema_proj = _attach_band(fema_proj, alpha_key="fema_dr")
⋮----
# ─── Background pre-fetch loop ────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
@app.on_event("startup")
async def _startup() -> None
⋮----
@app.on_event("shutdown")
async def _shutdown() -> None
⋮----
port = int(os.environ.get("PORT", "7053"))
````

## File: gateway/static/dummy/README.md
````markdown
# gateway/static/dummy/ — Placeholder index

A one-file placeholder used as a default `root_path` target so the
gateway has *something* to serve at `/dummy/` during local development —
useful when testing subdomain routing without wiring up a real
dashboard backend.

## Files in this directory

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `index.html` | Trivial "this is a dummy page" HTML stub — exists so `/dummy/` returns 200 instead of 404. Not used in production. |
````

## File: gateway/static/img/README.md
````markdown
# gateway/static/img/ — Image assets

Static images referenced from the gateway HTML pages and CSS. Anything
the browser actually loads as an `<img src>` or `background-image:
url(...)` lives here.

## Files in this directory

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `logo.png` | Narve brand logo. Used in the top nav, favicon link, and OG share previews. |
| `tobias.jpg` | Founder headshot used on the landing page / impressum / about section. |
````
