## File: Dashboard-x-truth-research-prediction/app/templates/dashboard.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" data-theme="{{ preferred_theme }}" data-platform="{{ preferred_platform }}">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Polymarket Signal</title>
    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/static/favicon.png">
    <!-- Tailwind CDN is a dynamic script and does not support SRI hashes -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/htmx.org@1.9.12" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
    <script>document.addEventListener('htmx:configRequest', function(evt) { evt.detail.headers['X-Requested-With'] = 'XMLHttpRequest'; });</script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.4/dist/chart.umd.min.js" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
    <script>tailwind.config={theme:{extend:{fontFamily:{sans:['Inter','system-ui','sans-serif'],mono:['JetBrains Mono','Fira Code','monospace']}}}}</script>
    <style>
        @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap');
        .tab-panel{display:none}.tab-panel.active{display:block}
        .htmx-indicator{display:none}.htmx-request .htmx-indicator,.htmx-request.htmx-indicator{display:inline-flex}
        ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px;height:6px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:3px}

        /* === THEME SYSTEM === */
        :root {
            --bg-primary: #0d1117; --bg-secondary: #161b22; --bg-card: rgba(255,255,255,0.02);
            --text-primary: #e6edf3; --text-secondary: #8b949e; --text-muted: #484f58;
            --border: #1e2a3a; --border-hover: #2d3a4a;
            --accent: #2D64F3; --accent-hover: #3B73FF; --accent-glow: rgba(45,100,243,0.15);
            --positive: #22c55e; --negative: #ef4444;
        }
        [data-theme="light"] {
            --bg-primary: #ffffff; --bg-secondary: #f6f8fa; --bg-card: rgba(0,0,0,0.02);
            --text-primary: #1f2328; --text-secondary: #656d76; --text-muted: #b1bac4;
            --border: #d1d9e0; --border-hover: #afb8c1;
            --positive: #1a7f37; --negative: #cf222e;
        }
        [data-platform="kalshi"] { --accent: #00d26a; --accent-hover: #00e676; --accent-glow: rgba(0,210,106,0.15); }
        [data-platform="polymarket"] { --accent: #2D64F3; --accent-hover: #3B73FF; --accent-glow: rgba(45,100,243,0.15); }

        body { background: var(--bg-primary); color: var(--text-primary); }
        .themed-border { border-color: var(--border); }
        .themed-bg { background: var(--bg-secondary); }
        .themed-card { background: var(--bg-card); border-color: var(--border); }
        .themed-text { color: var(--text-secondary); }
        .themed-muted { color: var(--text-muted); }
        .accent-bg { background: var(--accent); }
        .accent-text { color: var(--accent); }
        .accent-border { border-color: var(--accent); }
        .accent-glow { background: var(--accent-glow); }
        .hover-row:hover { background: var(--bg-card); }

        /* Segmented control */
        .seg-ctrl { display: inline-flex; border-radius: 8px; padding: 2px; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
        .seg-btn { padding: 4px 14px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; color: var(--text-secondary); }
        .seg-btn.active { background: var(--accent); color: white; }
        .seg-btn:not(.active):hover { color: var(--text-primary); }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="min-h-screen font-sans">

<!-- ===== HEADER ===== -->
<header class="sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl border-b themed-border" style="background:color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg-primary) 85%, transparent)">
    <div class="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-6 py-3 flex items-center justify-between">
        <div class="flex items-center gap-4">
            <!-- Platform Segmented Control -->
            <div class="seg-ctrl" id="platform-switcher">
                <button class="seg-btn {{ 'active' if preferred_platform == 'polymarket' }}" onclick="setPlatform('polymarket')" data-plat="polymarket">Polymarket</button>
                <button class="seg-btn {{ 'active' if preferred_platform == 'kalshi' }}" onclick="setPlatform('kalshi')" data-plat="kalshi">Kalshi</button>
            </div>
            <span class="text-[11px] themed-muted font-mono">{{ last_updated }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
            <div id="refresh-status" class="text-xs"></div>
            <!-- Language picker -->
            <select id="narve-language-select" title="Language" class="themed-card themed-border border text-xs px-2 py-1.5 rounded-lg" style="color:var(--text-secondary);background:var(--bg-card)"></select>
            <!-- Currency picker (USD market values converted via live ECB rates) -->
            <select id="narve-currency-select" title="Display currency" class="themed-card themed-border border text-xs px-2 py-1.5 rounded-lg" style="color:var(--text-secondary);background:var(--bg-card)"></select>
            <!-- Theme toggle -->
            <button onclick="toggleTheme()" class="w-7 h-7 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center themed-card themed-border border transition-colors hover:border-[var(--border-hover)]" title="Toggle theme">
                <svg id="theme-icon-dark" class="{{ 'hidden' if preferred_theme == 'light' }}" width="14" height="14" fill="var(--text-secondary)" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M10 2a1 1 0 011 1v1a1 1 0 11-2 0V3a1 1 0 011-1zm4 8a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zm-.464 4.95l.707.707a1 1 0 001.414-1.414l-.707-.707a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414zm2.12-10.607a1 1 0 010 1.414l-.706.707a1 1 0 11-1.414-1.414l.707-.707a1 1 0 011.414 0zM17 11a1 1 0 100-2h-1a1 1 0 100 2h1zm-7 4a1 1 0 011 1v1a1 1 0 11-2 0v-1a1 1 0 011-1zM5.05 6.464A1 1 0 106.465 5.05l-.708-.707a1 1 0 00-1.414 1.414l.707.707zm1.414 8.486l-.707.707a1 1 0 01-1.414-1.414l.707-.707a1 1 0 011.414 1.414zM4 11a1 1 0 100-2H3a1 1 0 000 2h1z"/></svg>
                <svg id="theme-icon-light" class="{{ 'hidden' if preferred_theme == 'dark' }}" width="14" height="14" fill="var(--text-secondary)" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M17.293 13.293A8 8 0 016.707 2.707a8.001 8.001 0 1010.586 10.586z"/></svg>
            </button>
            <button hx-get="/refresh" hx-target="#refresh-status" hx-swap="innerHTML" hx-indicator="#refresh-spin" class="flex items-center gap-1.5 themed-card themed-border border text-xs px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg transition-colors hover:border-[var(--border-hover)]" style="color:var(--text-secondary)">
                <svg id="refresh-spin" class="htmx-indicator animate-spin w-3 h-3" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle class="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"/><path class="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z"/></svg>
                Refresh
            </button>
            <!-- Profile dropdown -->
            <div class="relative" id="profile-menu">
                <button onclick="document.getElementById('profile-dropdown').classList.toggle('hidden')" class="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs transition-colors" style="color:var(--text-secondary)">
                    <svg class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5" d="M16 7a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM12 14a7 7 0 00-7 7h14a7 7 0 00-7-7z"/></svg>
                    {{ user }}
                    <svg class="w-3 h-3" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M5.293 7.293a1 1 0 011.414 0L10 10.586l3.293-3.293a1 1 0 111.414 1.414l-4 4a1 1 0 01-1.414 0l-4-4a1 1 0 010-1.414z"/></svg>
                </button>
                <div id="profile-dropdown" class="hidden absolute right-0 mt-2 w-44 rounded-xl shadow-xl py-1 z-50 border themed-border" style="background:var(--bg-secondary)">
                    <a href="/profile" class="block px-4 py-2 text-xs hover-row transition-colors" style="color:var(--text-secondary)">Profile &amp; API Keys</a>
                    <hr class="themed-border my-1">
                    <form method="post" action="/logout" style="display:inline;width:100%;">
                        <input type="hidden" name="_csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token }}">
                        <button type="submit" class="block w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-xs transition-colors" style="color:var(--negative);background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;">Logout</button>
                    </form>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</header>

<!-- ===== SETUP ALERT ===== -->
{% if missing_keys %}
<div id="setup-alert" class="border-b" style="border-color:rgba(245,158,11,0.2);background:rgba(245,158,11,0.04)">
    <div class="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-6 py-3 flex items-center justify-between">
        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
            <svg class="w-4 h-4 flex-shrink-0" style="color:#f59e0b" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M8.485 2.495c.673-1.167 2.357-1.167 3.03 0l6.28 10.875c.673 1.167-.168 2.625-1.516 2.625H3.72c-1.347 0-2.189-1.458-1.515-2.625L8.485 2.495zM10 5a.75.75 0 01.75.75v3.5a.75.75 0 01-1.5 0v-3.5A.75.75 0 0110 5zm0 9a1 1 0 100-2 1 1 0 000 2z"/></svg>
            <span class="text-xs" style="color:rgba(245,158,11,0.9)"><strong>Connect your data sources</strong> — Missing: <span style="color:#f59e0b">{{ missing_keys | join(', ') }}</span>. <a href="/profile" class="underline" style="color:#f59e0b">Add in Profile</a></span>
        </div>
        <button onclick="document.getElementById('setup-alert').remove()" style="color:rgba(245,158,11,0.4)" class="hover:opacity-80 ml-4"><svg class="w-3.5 h-3.5" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M4.293 4.293a1 1 0 011.414 0L10 8.586l4.293-4.293a1 1 0 111.414 1.414L11.414 10l4.293 4.293a1 1 0 01-1.414 1.414L10 11.414l-4.293 4.293a1 1 0 01-1.414-1.414L8.586 10 4.293 5.707a1 1 0 010-1.414z"/></svg></button>
    </div>
</div>
{% endif %}

<!-- ===== TAB NAV ===== -->
<nav class="border-b themed-border" style="background:var(--bg-primary)">
    <div class="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-6 flex gap-0">
        <button data-tab="feed" onclick="switchTab('feed')" class="tab-btn px-5 py-2.5 text-xs font-medium border-b-2 transition-all accent-border" style="color:var(--text-primary)" data-i18n="tab.feed">Feed</button>
        <button data-tab="best-bets" onclick="switchTab('best-bets')" class="tab-btn px-5 py-2.5 text-xs font-medium border-b-2 border-transparent transition-all" style="color:var(--text-muted)" data-i18n="tab.bestBets">Best Bets</button>
        <button data-tab="leaderboard" onclick="switchTab('leaderboard')" class="tab-btn px-5 py-2.5 text-xs font-medium border-b-2 border-transparent transition-all" style="color:var(--text-muted)" data-i18n="tab.leaderboard">Leaderboard</button>
        <button data-tab="markets" onclick="switchTab('markets')" class="tab-btn px-5 py-2.5 text-xs font-medium border-b-2 border-transparent transition-all" style="color:var(--text-muted)" data-i18n="tab.markets">Markets</button>
    </div>
</nav>

<main class="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-6 py-5">

<!-- =============== FEED TAB =============== -->
<div id="tab-feed" class="tab-panel active">
    <div class="themed-card border rounded-xl p-4 mb-5">
        <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-3"><span class="text-[11px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted font-medium">Filters</span><button onclick="resetFilters()" class="text-[11px] themed-muted hover:opacity-80">Reset all</button></div>
        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-7 gap-3">
            <div><label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted mb-1 block">Category</label><select name="category" hx-get="/feed" hx-target="#feed-body" hx-swap="innerHTML" hx-include=".feed-filter" hx-trigger="change" class="feed-filter w-full themed-card border themed-border rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs focus:outline-none" style="color:var(--text-primary)"><option value="">All</option><option value="politics">Politics</option><option value="sports">Sports</option><option value="crypto">Crypto</option><option value="geopolitics">Geopolitics</option><option value="other">Other</option></select></div>
            <div><label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted mb-1 block">Platform</label><select name="platform" hx-get="/feed" hx-target="#feed-body" hx-swap="innerHTML" hx-include=".feed-filter" hx-trigger="change" class="feed-filter w-full themed-card border themed-border rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs focus:outline-none" style="color:var(--text-primary)"><option value="">Both</option><option value="twitter">X (Twitter)</option><option value="truthsocial">TruthSocial</option></select></div>
            <div><label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted mb-1 block">Sort by</label><select name="sort" hx-get="/feed" hx-target="#feed-body" hx-swap="innerHTML" hx-include=".feed-filter" hx-trigger="change" class="feed-filter w-full themed-card border themed-border rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs focus:outline-none" style="color:var(--text-primary)"><option value="recent">Newest</option><option value="ev">Highest EV</option><option value="credibility">Highest Cred</option></select></div>
            <div><label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted mb-1 block">Market</label><input type="text" name="market" placeholder="Search..." hx-get="/feed" hx-target="#feed-body" hx-swap="innerHTML" hx-include=".feed-filter" hx-trigger="keyup changed delay:400ms" class="feed-filter w-full themed-card border themed-border rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs focus:outline-none" style="color:var(--text-primary)"></div>
            <div><label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted mb-1 block">Risk</label><label class="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1 cursor-pointer"><input type="checkbox" name="hide_risk" value="true" hx-get="/feed" hx-target="#feed-body" hx-swap="innerHTML" hx-include=".feed-filter" hx-trigger="change" class="feed-filter rounded w-3.5 h-3.5 accent-bg"><span class="text-xs themed-text">Hide risky</span></label></div>
            <div><label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted mb-1 block">Rating</label><label class="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1 cursor-pointer"><input type="checkbox" name="hide_unrated" value="true" hx-get="/feed" hx-target="#feed-body" hx-swap="innerHTML" hx-include=".feed-filter" hx-trigger="change" class="feed-filter rounded w-3.5 h-3.5 accent-bg"><span class="text-xs themed-text">Hide unrated</span></label></div>
            <div><label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted mb-1 block">Show</label><select name="per_page" hx-get="/feed" hx-target="#feed-body" hx-swap="innerHTML" hx-include=".feed-filter" hx-trigger="change" class="feed-filter w-full themed-card border themed-border rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs focus:outline-none" style="color:var(--text-primary)"><option value="25">25</option><option value="50" selected>50</option><option value="100">100</option></select></div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border themed-border"><table class="w-full text-sm"><thead><tr class="themed-card text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted"><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Prediction</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Source</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-center font-medium">Plat</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Category</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Cred</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">EV</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-center font-medium">Risk</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Market</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">When</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="feed-body" hx-get="/feed" hx-trigger="load, every 60s" hx-swap="innerHTML"><tr><td colspan="9" class="text-center py-16 themed-muted">Loading...</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
</div>

<!-- =============== BEST BETS TAB =============== -->
<div id="tab-best-bets" class="tab-panel">
    <div class="mb-4"><h2 class="text-lg font-semibold" style="color:var(--text-primary)">Top Opportunities</h2><p class="text-xs themed-text mt-0.5">Ranked by EV. Non-risky predictions, markets closing within 1 year.</p></div>
    <div id="best-bets-content" hx-get="/best-bets" hx-trigger="load" hx-swap="innerHTML"><div class="text-center py-16 themed-muted">Loading...</div></div>
</div>

<!-- =============== LEADERBOARD TAB =============== -->
<div id="tab-leaderboard" class="tab-panel">
    <div class="mb-4"><h2 class="text-lg font-semibold" style="color:var(--text-primary)">Source Leaderboard</h2><p class="text-xs themed-text mt-0.5">Ranked by credibility. Hover to adjust trust.</p></div>
    <div class="overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border themed-border"><table class="w-full text-sm"><thead><tr class="themed-card text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted"><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-center font-medium w-12">#</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Source</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Credibility</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Accuracy</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Record</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Categories</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Followers</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium w-24">Trust</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="leaderboard-content" hx-get="/leaderboard" hx-trigger="load" hx-swap="innerHTML"><tr><td colspan="8" class="text-center py-16 themed-muted">Loading...</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
</div>

<!-- =============== MARKETS TAB =============== -->
<div id="tab-markets" class="tab-panel">
    <div class="mb-4"><h2 class="text-lg font-semibold" style="color:var(--text-primary)"><span id="markets-title">Markets</span></h2><p class="text-xs themed-text mt-0.5">Closing within 1 year. Click a row to filter the feed. 20 per page.</p></div>
    <div class="themed-card border themed-border rounded-xl p-4 mb-5">
        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-3">
            <div><label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted mb-1 block">Category</label><select name="category" hx-get="/markets" hx-target="#markets-body" hx-swap="innerHTML" hx-include=".mkt-filter" hx-trigger="change" class="mkt-filter w-full themed-card border themed-border rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs focus:outline-none" style="color:var(--text-primary)"><option value="">All</option><option value="politics">Politics</option><option value="sports">Sports</option><option value="crypto">Crypto</option><option value="geopolitics">Geopolitics</option><option value="other">Other</option></select></div>
            <div><label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted mb-1 block">Search</label><input type="text" name="search" placeholder="Search markets..." hx-get="/markets" hx-target="#markets-body" hx-swap="innerHTML" hx-include=".mkt-filter" hx-trigger="keyup changed delay:400ms" class="mkt-filter w-full themed-card border themed-border rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs focus:outline-none" style="color:var(--text-primary)"></div>
            <div><label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted mb-1 block">Sort</label><select name="sort" hx-get="/markets" hx-target="#markets-body" hx-swap="innerHTML" hx-include=".mkt-filter" hx-trigger="change" class="mkt-filter w-full themed-card border themed-border rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs focus:outline-none" style="color:var(--text-primary)"><option value="volume">Highest Volume</option><option value="price_high">Highest Price</option><option value="price_low">Lowest Price</option><option value="closing_soon">Closing Soon</option></select></div>
            <div><label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted mb-1 block">Per Page</label><select name="per_page" hx-get="/markets" hx-target="#markets-body" hx-swap="innerHTML" hx-include=".mkt-filter" hx-trigger="change" class="mkt-filter w-full themed-card border themed-border rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs focus:outline-none" style="color:var(--text-primary)"><option value="20" selected>20</option><option value="50">50</option><option value="100">100</option></select></div>
            <div><label class="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted mb-1 block">Platform</label>
                <input type="hidden" name="platform" id="mkt-platform-input" value="{{ preferred_platform }}" class="mkt-filter">
                <div class="seg-ctrl" style="width:100%">
                    <button type="button" class="seg-btn flex-1 text-center mkt-plat-btn {{ 'active' if preferred_platform == 'polymarket' }}" onclick="setMktPlatform('polymarket')">Poly</button>
                    <button type="button" class="seg-btn flex-1 text-center mkt-plat-btn {{ 'active' if preferred_platform == 'kalshi' }}" onclick="setMktPlatform('kalshi')">Kalshi</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border themed-border"><table class="w-full text-sm"><thead><tr class="themed-card text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider themed-muted"><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Question</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Category</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Yes Price</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Volume</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Closes</th><th class="px-4 py-2.5 text-left font-medium">Chart</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody id="markets-body" hx-get="/markets?platform={{ preferred_platform }}" hx-trigger="load" hx-swap="innerHTML"><tr><td colspan="6" class="text-center py-16 themed-muted">Loading...</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
    <div id="market-chart"></div>
</div>

</main>

<script>
// Tab switching
function switchTab(tab) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b => {
        b.classList.remove('accent-border');
        b.style.borderColor = 'transparent';
        b.style.color = 'var(--text-muted)';
    });
    const btn = document.querySelector(`[data-tab="${tab}"]`);
    if (btn) { btn.classList.add('accent-border'); btn.style.color = 'var(--text-primary)'; }
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
    const panel = document.getElementById(`tab-${tab}`);
    if (panel) panel.classList.add('active');
}

// Reset feed filters
function resetFilters() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.feed-filter').forEach(el => {
        if (el.type === 'checkbox') el.checked = false;
        else if (el.tagName === 'SELECT') el.selectedIndex = 0;
        else el.value = '';
    });
    htmx.ajax('GET', '/feed', {target: '#feed-body', swap: 'innerHTML'});
}

// Platform switcher (global)
function setPlatform(plat) {
    document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-platform', plat);
    document.querySelectorAll('#platform-switcher .seg-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.toggle('active', b.dataset.plat === plat));
    // Update markets platform filter too
    document.getElementById('mkt-platform-input').value = plat;
    document.querySelectorAll('.mkt-plat-btn').forEach((b, i) => b.classList.toggle('active', (i === 0 && plat === 'polymarket') || (i === 1 && plat === 'kalshi')));
    // Reload markets
    htmx.ajax('GET', `/markets?platform=${plat}`, {target: '#markets-body', swap: 'innerHTML', values: Object.fromEntries([...document.querySelectorAll('.mkt-filter')].map(e => [e.name, e.value]))});
    // Update title
    document.getElementById('markets-title').textContent = plat === 'kalshi' ? 'Kalshi Markets' : 'Polymarket Markets';
    // Save preference
    fetch('/preferences', {method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'}, body: JSON.stringify({platform: plat})});
}

// Markets tab platform toggle
function setMktPlatform(plat) {
    document.getElementById('mkt-platform-input').value = plat;
    document.querySelectorAll('.mkt-plat-btn').forEach((b, i) => b.classList.toggle('active', (i === 0 && plat === 'polymarket') || (i === 1 && plat === 'kalshi')));
    // Also update global
    setPlatform(plat);
}

// Theme toggle
function toggleTheme() {
    const html = document.documentElement;
    const current = html.getAttribute('data-theme');
    const next = current === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
    html.setAttribute('data-theme', next);
    document.getElementById('theme-icon-dark').classList.toggle('hidden', next === 'light');
    document.getElementById('theme-icon-light').classList.toggle('hidden', next === 'dark');
    fetch('/preferences', {method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'}, body: JSON.stringify({theme: next})});
}

// Close dropdown on outside click
document.addEventListener('click', e => { if (!document.getElementById('profile-menu')?.contains(e.target)) document.getElementById('profile-dropdown')?.classList.add('hidden'); });

/* ===== i18n + Currency picker (narve_language, narve_currency) ===== */
(function() {
  /* ----- Language / i18n ----- */
  const NARVE_LANGUAGES = [
    ['en','English'],['es','Espa\u00f1ol'],['de','Deutsch'],['fr','Fran\u00e7ais'],
    ['it','Italiano'],['pt','Portugu\u00eas'],['nl','Nederlands'],['pl','Polski'],
    ['ja','\u65e5\u672c\u8a9e'],['ko','\ud55c\uad6d\uc5b4'],['zh','\u4e2d\u6587'],['ru','\u0420\u0443\u0441\u0441\u043a\u0438\u0439'],
    ['hi','\u0939\u093f\u0928\u094d\u0926\u0940'],['ar','\u0627\u0644\u0639\u0631\u0628\u064a\u0629'],['bn','\u09ac\u09be\u0982\u09b2\u09be'],['ur','\u0627\u0631\u062f\u0648'],
    ['id','Bahasa Indonesia'],['tr','T\u00fcrk\u00e7e'],['vi','Ti\u1ebfng Vi\u1ec7t'],['th','\u0e44\u0e17\u0e22'],
  ];
  const NARVE_I18N = {
    en: {'tab.feed':'Feed','tab.bestBets':'Best Bets','tab.leaderboard':'Leaderboard','tab.markets':'Markets','common.loading':'Loading...','common.filters':'Filters','common.reset':'Reset all'},
    es: {'tab.feed':'Noticias','tab.bestBets':'Mejores apuestas','tab.leaderboard':'Clasificaci\u00f3n','tab.markets':'Mercados','common.loading':'Cargando...','common.filters':'Filtros','common.reset':'Restablecer'},
    de: {'tab.feed':'Feed','tab.bestBets':'Beste Wetten','tab.leaderboard':'Bestenliste','tab.markets':'M\u00e4rkte','common.loading':'Wird geladen...','common.filters':'Filter','common.reset':'Zur\u00fccksetzen'},
    fr: {'tab.feed':'Flux','tab.bestBets':'Meilleurs paris','tab.leaderboard':'Classement','tab.markets':'March\u00e9s','common.loading':'Chargement...','common.filters':'Filtres','common.reset':'R\u00e9initialiser'},
    it: {'tab.feed':'Feed','tab.bestBets':'Migliori scommesse','tab.leaderboard':'Classifica','tab.markets':'Mercati','common.loading':'Caricamento...','common.filters':'Filtri','common.reset':'Reimposta'},
    pt: {'tab.feed':'Feed','tab.bestBets':'Melhores apostas','tab.leaderboard':'Classifica\u00e7\u00e3o','tab.markets':'Mercados','common.loading':'Carregando...','common.filters':'Filtros','common.reset':'Redefinir'},
    nl: {'tab.feed':'Feed','tab.bestBets':'Beste weddenschappen','tab.leaderboard':'Klassement','tab.markets':'Markten','common.loading':'Laden...','common.filters':'Filters','common.reset':'Herstellen'},
    pl: {'tab.feed':'Aktualno\u015bci','tab.bestBets':'Najlepsze zak\u0142ady','tab.leaderboard':'Ranking','tab.markets':'Rynki','common.loading':'\u0141adowanie...','common.filters':'Filtry','common.reset':'Resetuj'},

    ru: {'tab.feed':'\u041b\u0435\u043d\u0442\u0430','tab.bestBets':'\u041b\u0443\u0447\u0448\u0438\u0435 \u0441\u0442\u0430\u0432\u043a\u0438','tab.leaderboard':'\u0420\u0435\u0439\u0442\u0438\u043d\u0433','tab.markets':'\u0420\u044b\u043d\u043a\u0438','common.loading':'\u0417\u0430\u0433\u0440\u0443\u0437\u043a\u0430...','common.filters':'\u0424\u0438\u043b\u044c\u0442\u0440\u044b','common.reset':'\u0421\u0431\u0440\u043e\u0441'},
    hi: {'tab.feed':'\u092b\u093c\u0940\u0921','tab.bestBets':'\u0938\u0930\u094d\u0935\u0936\u094d\u0930\u0947\u0937\u094d\u0920 \u0926\u093e\u0901\u0935','tab.leaderboard':'\u0932\u0940\u0921\u0930\u092c\u094b\u0930\u094d\u0921','tab.markets':'\u092c\u093e\u091c\u093c\u093e\u0930','common.loading':'\u0932\u094b\u0921 \u0939\u094b \u0930\u0939\u093e \u0939\u0948...','common.filters':'\u092b\u093c\u093f\u0932\u094d\u091f\u0930','common.reset':'\u0930\u0940\u0938\u0947\u091f \u0915\u0930\u0947\u0902'},
    ar: {'tab.feed':'\u0627\u0644\u062e\u0644\u0627\u0635\u0629','tab.bestBets':'\u0623\u0641\u0636\u0644 \u0627\u0644\u0631\u0647\u0627\u0646\u0627\u062a','tab.leaderboard':'\u0627\u0644\u062a\u0631\u062a\u064a\u0628','tab.markets':'\u0627\u0644\u0623\u0633\u0648\u0627\u0642','common.loading':'\u062c\u0627\u0631\u064d \u0627\u0644\u062a\u062d\u0645\u064a\u0644...','common.filters':'\u0627\u0644\u0641\u0644\u0627\u062a\u0631','common.reset':'\u0625\u0639\u0627\u062f\u0629 \u0627\u0644\u062a\u0639\u064a\u064a\u0646'},
    bn: {'tab.feed':'\u09ab\u09bf\u09a1','tab.bestBets':'\u09b8\u09c7\u09b0\u09be \u09ac\u09be\u099c\u09bf','tab.leaderboard':'\u09b2\u09bf\u09a1\u09be\u09b0\u09ac\u09cb\u09b0\u09cd\u09a1','tab.markets':'\u09ac\u09be\u099c\u09be\u09b0','common.loading':'\u09b2\u09cb\u09a1 \u09b9\u099a\u09cd\u099b\u09c7...','common.filters':'\u09ab\u09bf\u09b2\u09cd\u099f\u09be\u09b0','common.reset':'\u09b0\u09bf\u09b8\u09c7\u099f \u0995\u09b0\u09c1\u09a8'},
    ur: {'tab.feed':'\u0641\u06cc\u0688','tab.bestBets':'\u0628\u06c1\u062a\u0631\u06cc\u0646 \u0634\u0631\u0637','tab.leaderboard':'\u0644\u06cc\u0688\u0631\u0628\u0648\u0631\u0688','tab.markets':'\u0645\u0627\u0631\u06a9\u06cc\u0679\u0633','common.loading':'\u0644\u0648\u0688 \u06c1\u0648 \u0631\u06c1\u0627 \u06c1\u06d2...','common.filters':'\u0641\u0644\u0679\u0631\u0632','common.reset':'\u0631\u06cc\u0633\u06cc\u0679 \u06a9\u0631\u06cc\u06ba'},
    id: {'tab.feed':'Feed','tab.bestBets':'Taruhan Terbaik','tab.leaderboard':'Papan Peringkat','tab.markets':'Pasar','common.loading':'Memuat...','common.filters':'Filter','common.reset':'Atur ulang'},
    tr: {'tab.feed':'Ak\u0131\u015f','tab.bestBets':'En \u0130yi Bahisler','tab.leaderboard':'S\u0131ralama','tab.markets':'Piyasalar','common.loading':'Y\u00fckleniyor...','common.filters':'Filtreler','common.reset':'S\u0131f\u0131rla'},
    vi: {'tab.feed':'B\u1ea3ng tin','tab.bestBets':'C\u01b0\u1ee3c t\u1ed1t nh\u1ea5t','tab.leaderboard':'B\u1ea3ng x\u1ebfp h\u1ea1ng','tab.markets':'Th\u1ecb tr\u01b0\u1eddng','common.loading':'\u0110ang t\u1ea3i...','common.filters':'B\u1ed9 l\u1ecdc','common.reset':'\u0110\u1eb7t l\u1ea1i'},
    th: {'tab.feed':'\u0e1f\u0e35\u0e14','tab.bestBets':'\u0e40\u0e14\u0e34\u0e21\u0e1e\u0e31\u0e19\u0e22\u0e2d\u0e14\u0e40\u0e22\u0e35\u0e48\u0e22\u0e21','tab.leaderboard':'\u0e2d\u0e31\u0e19\u0e14\u0e31\u0e1a','tab.markets':'\u0e15\u0e25\u0e32\u0e14','common.loading':'\u0e01\u0e33\u0e25\u0e31\u0e07\u0e42\u0e2b\u0e25\u0e14...','common.filters':'\u0e15\u0e31\u0e27\u0e01\u0e23\u0e2d\u0e07','common.reset':'\u0e23\u0e35\u0e40\u0e0b\u0e47\u0e15'},
  };
  let _narveLang = localStorage.getItem('narve_language') || 'en';
  function t(key) {
    const dict = NARVE_I18N[_narveLang] || NARVE_I18N.en;
    return dict[key] || NARVE_I18N.en[key] || key;
  }
  function applyTranslations(root) {
    const scope = root || document;
    scope.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]').forEach(el => {
      const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');
      const v = t(key);
      if (v) el.textContent = v;
    });
    scope.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n-placeholder]').forEach(el => {
      const v = t(el.getAttribute('data-i18n-placeholder'));
      if (v) el.placeholder = v;
    });
  }
  function setNarveLanguage(code) {
    if (!NARVE_I18N[code]) return;
    _narveLang = code;
    localStorage.setItem('narve_language', code);
    document.documentElement.lang = code;
    applyTranslations();
  }
  function populateLanguageSelect() {
    const sel = document.getElementById('narve-language-select');
    if (!sel) return;
    sel.innerHTML = NARVE_LANGUAGES.map(l =>
      '<option value="' + l[0] + '"' + (l[0] === _narveLang ? ' selected' : '') + '>' + l[1] + '</option>'
    ).join('');
    sel.addEventListener('change', e => setNarveLanguage(e.target.value));
  }
  // Expose globally so other scripts can read current language
  window.setNarveLanguage = setNarveLanguage;
  window.t = t;

  /* ----- Currency ----- */
  const NARVE_CURRENCIES = [
    ['USD','US Dollar'],['EUR','Euro'],['GBP','British Pound'],['JPY','Japanese Yen'],
    ['AUD','Australian Dollar'],['CAD','Canadian Dollar'],['CHF','Swiss Franc'],['CNY','Chinese Yuan'],
    ['HKD','Hong Kong Dollar'],['NZD','New Zealand Dollar'],['SEK','Swedish Krona'],['KRW','South Korean Won'],
    ['SGD','Singapore Dollar'],['NOK','Norwegian Krone'],['MXN','Mexican Peso'],['INR','Indian Rupee'],
    ['ZAR','South African Rand'],['TRY','Turkish Lira'],['BRL','Brazilian Real'],['DKK','Danish Krone'],
    ['PLN','Polish Zloty'],['THB','Thai Baht'],['IDR','Indonesian Rupiah'],['HUF','Hungarian Forint'],
    ['CZK','Czech Koruna'],['ILS','Israeli Shekel'],['PHP','Philippine Peso'],['MYR','Malaysian Ringgit'],
    ['RON','Romanian Leu'],['ISK','Icelandic Krona'],
  ];
  const FX_FALLBACK = {
    USD:1.0, EUR:0.92, GBP:0.79, JPY:150, AUD:1.52, CAD:1.36, CHF:0.88, CNY:7.20,
    HKD:7.83, NZD:1.65, SEK:10.5, KRW:1340, SGD:1.34, NOK:10.6, MXN:17.0,
    INR:83.0, ZAR:18.5, TRY:32.0, BRL:5.0, DKK:6.85, PLN:3.95, THB:35.0,
    IDR:15700, HUF:360, CZK:23.0, ILS:3.7, PHP:56.0, MYR:4.7, RON:4.6, ISK:137,
  };
  let _fxRates = FX_FALLBACK;
  let currencyCode = localStorage.getItem('narve_currency') || 'USD';
  // Locale used for number formatting — keyed off existing narve_units flag.
  function getLocale() { return (localStorage.getItem('narve_units') === 'european') ? 'de-DE' : 'en-US'; }
  function getRate(code) {
    if (!code || code === 'USD') return 1;
    return (_fxRates && _fxRates[code]) || FX_FALLBACK[code] || 1;
  }
  function getSymbol(code) {
    try {
      const parts = new Intl.NumberFormat(getLocale(), { style: 'currency', currency: code }).formatToParts(0);
      const sym = parts.find(p => p.type === 'currency');
      if (sym) return sym.value;
    } catch (e) {}
    return code;
  }
  function symFirst(code) {
    try {
      const parts = new Intl.NumberFormat(getLocale(), { style: 'currency', currency: code }).formatToParts(0);
      const cIdx = parts.findIndex(p => p.type === 'currency');
      const nIdx = parts.findIndex(p => p.type === 'integer');
      return cIdx < nIdx;
    } catch (e) { return true; }
  }
  function fmtMoney(usd) {
    if (usd == null || isNaN(Number(usd))) return '-';
    const v = Number(usd) * getRate(currencyCode);
    const sym = getSymbol(currencyCode);
    const formatted = v.toLocaleString(getLocale(), { minimumFractionDigits: 0, maximumFractionDigits: 0 });
    return symFirst(currencyCode) ? sym + formatted : formatted + ' ' + sym;
  }
  // Replace text on every span.narve-money in the document.
  function applyConversions(root) {
    const scope = root || document;
    scope.querySelectorAll('.narve-money').forEach(el => {
      const usd = parseFloat(el.dataset.usd);
      if (!isNaN(usd)) el.textContent = fmtMoney(usd);
    });
  }
  function _readCache() {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('narve_fx_rates') || 'null'); } catch (e) { return null; }
  }
  function _writeCache(rates) {
    try { localStorage.setItem('narve_fx_rates', JSON.stringify({ rates: rates, fetched_at: Date.now() })); } catch (e) {}
  }
  async function ensureRates() {
    const cached = _readCache();
    if (cached && cached.rates && Date.now() - cached.fetched_at < 3600000) {
      _fxRates = cached.rates;
      return _fxRates;
    }
    try {
      const r = await fetch('/api/fx-rates', { credentials: 'same-origin' });
      if (r.ok) {
        const data = await r.json();
        _fxRates = data.rates || FX_FALLBACK;
        _fxRates.USD = 1.0;
        _writeCache(_fxRates);
      }
    } catch (e) {}
    return _fxRates;
  }
  function populateSelect() {
    const sel = document.getElementById('narve-currency-select');
    if (!sel) return;
    sel.innerHTML = NARVE_CURRENCIES.map(c =>
      '<option value="' + c[0] + '"' + (c[0] === currencyCode ? ' selected' : '') + '>' + c[0] + '</option>'
    ).join('');
    sel.addEventListener('change', e => {
      currencyCode = e.target.value;
      localStorage.setItem('narve_currency', currencyCode);
      applyConversions();
    });
  }
  // Re-run conversions and translations after every htmx swap (markets table reloads via htmx).
  document.body.addEventListener('htmx:afterSwap', e => {
    applyConversions(e.target);
    applyTranslations(e.target);
  });
  // Init
  document.documentElement.lang = _narveLang;
  populateLanguageSelect();
  applyTranslations();
  populateSelect();
  applyConversions();
  ensureRates().then(() => applyConversions());
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
````

## File: Dashboard-x-truth-research-prediction/app/templates/forgot_password.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Forgot Password — Polymarket Signal</title>
    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/static/favicon.png">
    <!-- Tailwind CDN is a dynamic script and does not support SRI hashes -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <style>@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');body{font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif;}</style>
</head>
<body class="bg-[#0d1117] min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center">
<div class="w-full max-w-sm mx-auto px-6">
    <div class="text-center mb-8">
        <div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 mb-4"><div class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full bg-[#2D64F3]"></div><span class="text-xl font-semibold text-white tracking-tight">Polymarket Signal</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/[0.06] rounded-2xl p-8">
        <h2 class="text-lg font-medium text-gray-200 mb-3">Reset Password</h2>
        <p class="text-sm text-gray-500 mb-6">Since this app runs locally, there's no email-based reset. To reset your password:</p>
        <div class="space-y-3 text-sm text-gray-400">
            <div class="flex gap-2"><span class="text-[#2D64F3] font-bold">1.</span> Open a terminal</div>
            <div class="flex gap-2"><span class="text-[#2D64F3] font-bold">2.</span> Delete the database file:</div>
            <code class="block bg-white/5 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-xs text-gray-300 font-mono">rm predictions.db*</code>
            <div class="flex gap-2"><span class="text-[#2D64F3] font-bold">3.</span> Restart the app — it will create a fresh admin account using the credentials in your .env file</div>
        </div>
        <a href="/login" class="block text-center mt-6 text-sm text-[#2D64F3] hover:text-[#5B8DF5]">&larr; Back to login</a>
    </div>
</div>
</body>
</html>
````

## File: Dashboard-x-truth-research-prediction/app/config.yaml
````yaml
scraping:
  limit_per_source: 100
  keywords:
    prediction_keywords:
      - "will win"
      - "going to"
      - "% chance"
      - "predict"
      - "bet on"
      - "likely"
      - "odds"
      - "my prediction"
      - "I think"
      - "called it"
    category_keywords:
      politics: ["election", "president", "senate", "vote", "congress", "poll", "ballot", "referendum"]
      sports: ["championship", "finals", "match", "season", "playoffs", "league", "title", "tournament"]
      crypto: ["bitcoin", "ethereum", "btc", "eth", "token", "price target", "altcoin", "crypto"]
      geopolitics: ["war", "sanctions", "treaty", "ceasefire", "conflict", "invasion", "diplomatic"]

credibility:
  min_qualifying_predictions: 10
  min_categories_for_unlock: 3
  min_predictions_per_category: 3
  min_hours_remaining: 12
  decay_half_life_days: 60
  bayesian_prior: 0.5
  bayesian_strength: 4
  category_dominance_threshold: 0.60
  category_dominance_penalty: 0.15
  weights:
    accuracy: 0.45
    engagement: 0.18
    verified: 0.12
    volume: 0.12
    manual: 0.13
  manual_trust_delta:
    trusted: 0.20
    untrusted: -0.40
  spread_penalty:
    1: 0.30
    2: 0.60
    3: 0.85
    4: 1.00

scoring:
  risk_thresholds:
    min_global_credibility: 0.4
    min_category_credibility: 0.35
    extreme_market_bounds: [0.05, 0.95]
  market_match_threshold: 0.50
  min_shared_tokens: 3

quota:
  twitter_warn_pct: 0.80
  twitter_hard_stop_pct: 1.00
````

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
scheduler = AsyncIOScheduler()
⋮----
async def run_pipeline() -> dict
⋮----
stats = {"posts_fetched": 0, "new_posts": 0, "predictions_extracted": 0, "markets_synced": 0, "resolved": 0, "sources_recomputed": 0, "errors": [], "run_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()}
⋮----
# Sync Polymarket
⋮----
poly = PolymarketClient()
⋮----
# Sync Kalshi
⋮----
kalshi = KalshiClient()
⋮----
all_posts: list[RawPost] = []
keywords = yaml_config.get("scraping", {}).get("keywords", {}).get("prediction_keywords", [])
limit = yaml_config.get("scraping", {}).get("limit_per_source", 100)
⋮----
tw = TwitterScraper()
⋮----
posts = await tw.fetch(keywords, limit)
⋮----
ts = TruthSocialScraper()
⋮----
posts = await ts.fetch(keywords, limit)
⋮----
existing = await session.exec(select(RawPost).where(RawPost.id == post.id))
⋮----
extractor = PredictionExtractor()
mk_result = await session.exec(select(MarketSnapshot))
# Tokenize each market question once up front so the inner match loop
# only pays a set-intersection cost per prediction (was O(P×M) tokenizations).
# Also bucket by category so match_to_market does an O(1) dict lookup
# instead of rescanning the whole market list on every prediction.
markets_by_category: dict[str, list[dict]] = collections.defaultdict(list)
⋮----
question = ms.market_question or ""
entry = {
⋮----
processed_result = await session.exec(select(Prediction.raw_post_id).distinct())
processed_ids = set(processed_result.all())
new_posts_stmt = select(RawPost).where(RawPost.id.notin_(processed_ids)) if processed_ids else select(RawPost)
new_posts_result = await session.exec(new_posts_stmt)
⋮----
candidate_markets = markets_by_category.get(ext.category, [])
⋮----
market_slug = matched_market["market_slug"] if matched_market else None
market_close_time = matched_market.get("close_time") if matched_market else None
market_implied_prob = matched_market["yes_price"] if matched_market else None
hours_remaining = None
⋮----
ct = market_close_time.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc) if market_close_time.tzinfo is None else market_close_time
pt = post.posted_at.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc) if post.posted_at.tzinfo is None else post.posted_at
hours_remaining = (ct - pt).total_seconds() / 3600.0
counts = hours_remaining is not None and hours_remaining >= 12
pred = Prediction(raw_post_id=post.id, market_slug=market_slug, market_question=matched_market.get("market_question") if matched_market else None, market_close_time=market_close_time, hours_remaining_at_prediction=hours_remaining, counts_toward_credibility=counts, category=ext.category, predicted_outcome=ext.predicted_outcome, predicted_probability=ext.predicted_probability, market_implied_probability=market_implied_prob, extracted_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc))
⋮----
src_result = await session.exec(select(Source).where(Source.handle == post.author_handle))
source = src_result.first()
⋮----
eng = post.engagement
source = Source(handle=post.author_handle, platform=post.platform, follower_count=post.follower_count, verified=post.verified, engagement_ratio=min(sum(eng.get(k, 0) for k in eng) / max(post.follower_count, 1), 1.0), last_seen=datetime.now(timezone.utc), created_at=datetime.now(timezone.utc))
⋮----
res_stats = await MarketResolver().run(session)
⋮----
unscore_result = await session.exec(select(Prediction).where(Prediction.ev_score.is_(None)))
⋮----
spr_result = await session.exec(select(SourcePredictionRecord).where(SourcePredictionRecord.prediction_id == pred.id))
spr = spr_result.first()
source = None
⋮----
src_result = await session.exec(select(Source).where(Source.handle == spr.handle))
⋮----
def start_scheduler() -> None
⋮----
def shutdown_scheduler() -> None

## File: Dashboard-x-truth-research-prediction/Dockerfile
````
FROM python:3.12-slim
WORKDIR /app
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends gcc && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
RUN apt-get purge -y --auto-remove gcc && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
COPY . .
RUN adduser --disabled-password --gecos "" appuser
USER appuser
EXPOSE 18789
CMD ["uvicorn", "app.main:app", "--host", "0.0.0.0", "--port", "18789"]
````

## File: gateway/static/account.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Account - narve.ai</title>
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/_gateway_static/favicon.png">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="/_gateway_static/gateway.css">
  <style>
    body { background: #0a0a0a; color: #e8e8e8; font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; margin: 0; padding: 0; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; }
    .acct-wrap { max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 48px 24px 80px; }
    .acct-header { margin-bottom: 40px; }
    .acct-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.03em; margin-bottom: 4px; }
    .acct-subtitle { font-size: 14px; color: #666; }

    .acct-section { margin-bottom: 36px; }
    .acct-section-title { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #555; margin-bottom: 16px; }

    .acct-card { background: #141414; border: 1px solid #1e1e1e; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; }
    .acct-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e1e1e; }
    .acct-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .acct-row-label { font-size: 13px; color: #777; font-weight: 500; }
    .acct-row-value { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #ddd; }
    .acct-row-value.admin { color: #c58af9; }

    .sub-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 14px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e1e1e; }
    .sub-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .sub-info { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
    .sub-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .sub-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; }
    .sub-meta { font-size: 12px; color: #555; }
    .sub-badge { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 4px; }
    .sub-active { background: rgba(129,201,149,0.1); color: #81c995; }
    .sub-expired { background: rgba(242,139,130,0.1); color: #f28b82; }
    .sub-none { text-align: center; padding: 32px 20px; color: #444; font-size: 13px; }
    .sub-none a { color: #8ab4f8; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; }
    .sub-none a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

    .connect-card { background: #141414; border: 1px solid #1e1e1e; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; }
    .connect-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
    .connect-icon { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(138,180,248,0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 18px; }
    .connect-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; }
    .connect-desc { font-size: 13px; color: #666; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 16px; }
    .connect-status { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 12px; color: #555; }
    .connect-status-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; }
    .connect-status-dot.on { background: #81c995; }
    .connect-status-dot.off { background: #555; }
    .connect-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 10px 18px; background: #1e1e1e; color: #ddd; border: 1px solid #2a2a2a; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; font-family: inherit; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s; text-decoration: none; margin-top: 12px; }
    .connect-btn:hover { background: #222; border-color: #444; }

    .acct-links { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 32px; }
    .acct-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 10px 18px; background: transparent; color: #777; border: 1px solid #1e1e1e; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; }
    .acct-link:hover { color: #ddd; border-color: #444; }

    @media (max-width: 640px) {
      .acct-wrap { padding: 32px 16px 64px; }
      .acct-title { font-size: 20px; }
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <div class="acct-wrap">
    <div class="acct-header">
      <div class="acct-title">Account</div>
      <div class="acct-subtitle">{{ email }}</div>
    </div>

    <div class="acct-section">
      <div class="acct-section-title">Profile</div>
      <div class="acct-card">
        <div class="acct-row">
          <span class="acct-row-label">Email</span>
          <span class="acct-row-value">{{ email }}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="acct-row">
          <span class="acct-row-label">Member since</span>
          <span class="acct-row-value">{{ member_since }}</span>
        </div>
        {{ raw_admin_row }}
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="acct-section">
      <div class="acct-section-title">Subscriptions</div>
      <div class="acct-card">
        {{ raw_sub_rows }}
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="acct-section">
      <div class="acct-section-title">Connected accounts</div>
      <div class="connect-card">
        <div class="connect-header">
          <div class="connect-icon">P</div>
          <div class="connect-title">Polymarket</div>
        </div>
        <div class="connect-desc">
          Connect your Polymarket account to place bets directly from narve.ai dashboards.
          Markets on every dashboard link out to Polymarket where you can trade with your existing wallet.
        </div>
        <div class="connect-status">
          <span class="connect-status-dot off"></span>
          Not connected
        </div>
        <a href="https://polymarket.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="connect-btn">
          Open Polymarket &rarr;
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="acct-links">
      <a href="/settings" class="acct-link">Settings</a>
      <a href="/billing" class="acct-link">Billing</a>
      <a href="/dashboards" class="acct-link">Dashboards</a>
      <form method="post" action="/logout" style="display:inline"><input type="hidden" name="_csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token }}"><button type="submit" class="acct-link" style="color:#f28b82;border-color:rgba(242,139,130,.2);cursor:pointer;font:inherit">Sign out</button></form>
    </div>
  </div>
</body>
</html>
````

## File: gateway/static/reset-password.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Set new password — narve.ai</title>
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/_gateway_static/favicon.png">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="/_gateway_static/gateway.css">
  <style>
    .auth-error:empty { display: none; }
    .auth-success:empty { display: none; }
    .auth-success {
      background: var(--green-bg);
      color: var(--green);
      border: 1px solid var(--green);
      border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
      padding: 10px 14px;
      font-size: 13px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }
    .req-list { margin-top: 10px; display: none; }
    .req-list.visible { display: block; }
    .req-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 8px;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: var(--text-muted);
      padding: 3px 0;
      transition: color 0.15s;
    }
    .req-item.met { color: var(--green); }
    .req-icon {
      width: 16px;
      height: 16px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s;
    }
    .req-item.met .req-icon {
      border-color: var(--green);
      background: var(--green-bg);
    }
    .req-icon svg { width: 10px; height: 10px; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.15s; }
    .req-item.met .req-icon svg { opacity: 1; }
    .field-valid {
      border-color: var(--green) !important;
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--green-bg) !important;
    }
    .field-invalid {
      border-color: var(--red) !important;
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--red-bg) !important;
    }
    .field-hint {
      font-size: 11px;
      margin-top: 6px;
      display: none;
    }
    .field-hint.visible { display: block; }
    .field-hint.valid { color: var(--green); }
    .field-hint.invalid { color: var(--red); }
    .auth-icon {
      width: 48px;
      height: 48px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--accent-light);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      margin: 0 auto 16px;
    }
    .auth-icon svg {
      width: 24px;
      height: 24px;
      color: var(--accent);
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="auth-body">
  <div class="auth-wrap">
    <a href="/" class="auth-brand">
      <img src="/_gateway_static/img/logo.png" alt="narve.ai" class="gw-brand-logo">
      <span>narve.ai</span>
    </a>

    <div class="auth-card">
      <div class="auth-icon">
        <svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5">
          <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15.75 5.25a3 3 0 0 1 3 3m3 0a6 6 0 0 1-7.029 5.912c-.563-.097-1.159.026-1.563.43L10.5 17.25H8.25v2.25H6v2.25H2.25v-2.818c0-.597.237-1.17.659-1.591l6.499-6.499c.404-.404.527-1 .43-1.563A6 6 0 1 1 21.75 8.25Z"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <div class="auth-title">Set a new password</div>
      <div class="auth-sub">Choose a strong password for your account.</div>

      {{ raw_success }}

      <form class="auth-form" method="post" action="/reset-password" id="reset-form">
        <input type="hidden" name="_csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token }}">
        <input type="hidden" name="token" value="{{ token }}">

        <div>
          <label for="new_password">New password</label>
          <input id="new_password" type="password" name="new_password" required autocomplete="new-password" autofocus minlength="12">
          <div class="req-list" id="pw-reqs">
            <div class="req-item" id="req-length">
              <span class="req-icon"><svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="3" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg></span>
              At least 12 characters
            </div>
            <div class="req-item" id="req-upper">
              <span class="req-icon"><svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="3" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg></span>
              One uppercase letter
            </div>
            <div class="req-item" id="req-lower">
              <span class="req-icon"><svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="3" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg></span>
              One lowercase letter
            </div>
            <div class="req-item" id="req-number">
              <span class="req-icon"><svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="3" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg></span>
              One number
            </div>
            <div class="req-item" id="req-special">
              <span class="req-icon"><svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="3" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg></span>
              One special character
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div>
          <label for="confirm_password">Confirm password</label>
          <input id="confirm_password" type="password" name="confirm_password" required autocomplete="new-password">
          <div class="field-hint" id="confirm-hint"></div>
        </div>

        <button type="submit" class="auth-submit" id="submit-btn">Reset password</button>
      </form>

      <div class="auth-error">{{ error }}</div>

      <div class="auth-footer">
        <a href="/login">Back to sign in</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

<script>
(function() {
  var pw = document.getElementById('new_password');
  var confirm = document.getElementById('confirm_password');
  var reqs = document.getElementById('pw-reqs');
  var confirmHint = document.getElementById('confirm-hint');

  function setReq(id, met) {
    var el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (met) el.classList.add('met');
    else el.classList.remove('met');
  }

  function allMet() {
    var v = pw.value;
    return v.length >= 12 && /[A-Z]/.test(v) && /[a-z]/.test(v) && /[0-9]/.test(v) && /[^A-Za-z0-9]/.test(v);
  }

  // Password: show checklist on focus, update on input
  pw.addEventListener('focus', function() { reqs.classList.add('visible'); });
  pw.addEventListener('input', function() {
    var v = this.value;
    setReq('req-length', v.length >= 12);
    setReq('req-upper', /[A-Z]/.test(v));
    setReq('req-lower', /[a-z]/.test(v));
    setReq('req-number', /[0-9]/.test(v));
    setReq('req-special', /[^A-Za-z0-9]/.test(v));

    this.classList.remove('field-valid', 'field-invalid');
    if (v.length > 0 && allMet()) this.classList.add('field-valid');

    // Re-validate confirm if it has content
    if (confirm.value.length > 0) checkConfirm();
  });
  pw.addEventListener('blur', function() {
    var v = this.value;
    if (v.length > 0) {
      this.classList.remove('field-valid', 'field-invalid');
      if (allMet()) this.classList.add('field-valid');
      else this.classList.add('field-invalid');
    }
  });

  function checkConfirm() {
    var cv = confirm.value;
    confirmHint.classList.remove('visible', 'valid', 'invalid');
    confirm.classList.remove('field-valid', 'field-invalid');
    if (!cv) return;
    if (cv === pw.value && allMet()) {
      confirm.classList.add('field-valid');
      confirmHint.textContent = 'Passwords match';
      confirmHint.classList.add('visible', 'valid');
    } else if (cv !== pw.value) {
      confirm.classList.add('field-invalid');
      confirmHint.textContent = 'Passwords don\'t match';
      confirmHint.classList.add('visible', 'invalid');
    }
  }

  confirm.addEventListener('blur', checkConfirm);
  confirm.addEventListener('input', checkConfirm);
  confirm.addEventListener('focus', function() {
    this.classList.remove('field-valid', 'field-invalid');
    confirmHint.classList.remove('visible');
  });

  // Prevent submit if client-side checks fail
  document.getElementById('reset-form').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
    if (!allMet()) {
      e.preventDefault();
      reqs.classList.add('visible');
      pw.classList.add('field-invalid');
      pw.focus();
      return;
    }
    if (confirm.value !== pw.value) {
      e.preventDefault();
      confirm.classList.add('field-invalid');
      confirmHint.textContent = 'Passwords don\'t match';
      confirmHint.classList.add('visible', 'invalid');
      confirm.focus();
      return;
    }
  });
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
````

## File: gateway/static/support.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Support Ticket — narve.ai</title>
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/_gateway_static/favicon.png">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="/_gateway_static/gateway.css">
  <style>
    .sup-page { min-height: 100vh; background: var(--bg); padding: 32px 24px 64px; }
    .sup-container { max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto; }
    .sup-back { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; margin-bottom: 40px; min-height: 44px; }
    .sup-back:hover { color: var(--text-primary); text-decoration: none; }
    .sup-back svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }
    .sup-title { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); margin-bottom: 8px; letter-spacing: -0.02em; }
    .sup-desc { font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 32px; line-height: 1.6; }
    .sup-card { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 28px; }
    .sup-label { display: block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 8px; }
    .sup-input, .sup-textarea, .sup-select { width: 100%; padding: 12px 14px; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; background: #1e2130; color: var(--text-primary); outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s; }
    .sup-input:focus, .sup-textarea:focus, .sup-select:focus { border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-light); }
    .sup-textarea { min-height: 140px; resize: vertical; line-height: 1.6; }
    .sup-select { appearance: none; -webkit-appearance: none; cursor: pointer; }
    .sup-field { margin-bottom: 20px; }
    .sup-submit { width: 100%; padding: 14px; border: none; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent), #8b5cf6); color: white; font-family: inherit; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.1s, box-shadow 0.2s; min-height: 48px; margin-top: 8px; }
    .sup-submit:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); }
    .sup-submit:disabled { opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }
    .sup-error { font-size: 12px; color: var(--red); margin-bottom: 12px; display: none; }
    .sup-error.visible { display: block; }
    .sup-success { display: none; text-align: center; padding: 48px 0; animation: fadeIn 0.4s ease-out; }
    .sup-success.visible { display: block; }
    @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(12px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
    .sup-success-icon { width: 64px; height: 64px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.10); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0 auto 20px; }
    .sup-success-icon svg { width: 32px; height: 32px; color: var(--green); }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="sup-page">
  <div class="sup-container">
    <a href="/" class="sup-back">
      <svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M10 19l-7-7m0 0l7-7m-7 7h18"/></svg>
      Back
    </a>

    <h1 class="sup-title">Support Ticket</h1>
    <p class="sup-desc">Describe your issue and we'll get back to you within 24-48 hours.</p>

    <div class="sup-card">
      <div class="sup-error" id="sup-error"></div>

      <form id="sup-form" onsubmit="return submitSupport(event)">
        <div class="sup-field">
          <label class="sup-label" for="sup-email">Your email</label>
          <input class="sup-input" type="email" id="sup-email" required placeholder="you@example.com" autocomplete="email" autofocus>
        </div>
        <div class="sup-field">
          <label class="sup-label" for="sup-category">Category</label>
          <select class="sup-select" id="sup-category">
            <option value="Account Suspension">Account Suspension</option>
            <option value="Billing Issue">Billing Issue</option>
            <option value="Token Lost">Token Lost</option>
            <option value="Bug Report">Bug Report</option>
            <option value="Other">Other</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="sup-field">
          <label class="sup-label" for="sup-message">Describe your issue</label>
          <textarea class="sup-textarea" id="sup-message" required placeholder="Please describe what happened, your username or email, and any relevant details..." minlength="10"></textarea>
        </div>
        <button type="submit" class="sup-submit" id="sup-btn">Submit Ticket</button>
      </form>

      <div class="sup-success" id="sup-success">
        <div class="sup-success-icon">
          <svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2.5" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h2 style="font-size:20px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);margin-bottom:8px">Ticket submitted</h2>
        <p style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.6">We've received your support ticket and will review it within 24-48 hours. You'll hear from us at the email you provided.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
function submitSupport(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  var email = document.getElementById('sup-email').value.trim();
  var category = document.getElementById('sup-category').value;
  var message = document.getElementById('sup-message').value.trim();
  var errEl = document.getElementById('sup-error');
  var btn = document.getElementById('sup-btn');

  errEl.classList.remove('visible');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.textContent = 'Submitting...';

  fetch('/api/support-ticket', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ email: email, message: '[' + category + '] ' + message })
  })
  .then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
  .then(function(data) {
    if (data.success) {
      document.getElementById('sup-form').style.display = 'none';
      document.getElementById('sup-success').classList.add('visible');
    } else {
      errEl.textContent = data.error || 'Something went wrong';
      errEl.classList.add('visible');
      btn.disabled = false;
      btn.textContent = 'Submit Ticket';
    }
  })
  .catch(function() {
    errEl.textContent = 'Network error. Please try again.';
    errEl.classList.add('visible');
    btn.disabled = false;
    btn.textContent = 'Submit Ticket';
  });
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
````

## File: gateway/README.md
````markdown
# Polymarket Gateway — narve.ai

Central entry point for every dashboard. One apex domain for login/signup/billing,
one subdomain per dashboard, one session cookie shared across all of them,
per-dashboard subscriptions so users can pick and mix.

## Domain layout

```
narve.ai                  → apex: login, signup, my dashboards, billing
crypto.narve.ai           → proxy → :8000 (crypto-dashboard)
markets.narve.ai          → proxy → :8050 (stock-dashboard)
midterm.narve.ai          → proxy → :8051 (midterm-dashboard)
traders.narve.ai          → proxy → :8052 (top-traders-dashboard)
weather.narve.ai          → proxy → :5050 (polymarket_weather_dashboard)
sports.narve.ai           → proxy → :8888 (sports-dashboard)
world.narve.ai            → proxy → :7050 (world-state-dashboard)
```

Change any subdomain name in `config.json`. The internal `key` stays the same
(it's how the subscriptions table identifies each dashboard).

## How it works

- **One cookie, all subdomains.** Session cookie `pm_gateway_session` is scoped
  to `.narve.ai` so logging in at the apex covers every subdomain.
- **Per-request subscription check.** Every proxied request verifies the user
  has an active subscription for that specific dashboard. No sub →
  redirect to `/billing?dashboard=<key>`.
- **Dashboards stay untouched.** Crypto and sports have their own internal login
  pages — they just go unused. The gateway forwards `X-Gateway-User-Id` and
  `X-Gateway-User-Email` headers downstream so the dashboards can trust the
  identity if they ever want to read it.
- **WebSocket support** for crypto and sports, flagged by `supports_websocket`
  in `config.json`.
- **Localhost dev bypass:** when the request host is `localhost` / `*.localhost`
  and `PRODUCTION` is unset, the gateway auto-creates a `dev@local` user with
  all 7 dashboards active so you can preview without signing up. This is
  **disabled automatically when `PRODUCTION=1`**.

## Files

**Python**
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `server.py` | FastAPI app — apex routes, reverse proxy, WebSocket proxy, auth middleware, subscription gating. |
| `db.py` | SQLite layer — users, sessions, subscriptions, PBKDF2 password hashing, Fernet-encrypted secrets. |
| `cache.py` | Redis caching + pub/sub layer. Caches dashboard API responses with TTL and publishes `data_updated` events to drive SSE. |
| `poller.py` | Background poller that fetches each dashboard's main API endpoints, stores responses in Redis, and publishes `data_updated` so SSE clients refresh instantly. |
| `sse.py` | Server-Sent Events stream — subscribes to Redis pub/sub and forwards events over `EventSource("/api/stream?dashboards=...")`. |

**Config / data**
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `config.json` | **Edit this** to change subdomain names, prices, target ports, or accent colors per dashboard. The internal `key` for each dashboard must NOT change. |
| `auth.db` | SQLite database — users, sessions, subscriptions. Created automatically on first run. |
| `static/` | Apex pages and shared assets. See `static/README.md`. |

**Build / deploy**
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Dockerfile` | Container build for the `gateway` service. |
| `.dockerignore` | Excludes `auth.db`, `__pycache__`, etc. from the Docker build context. |
| `requirements.txt` | Python deps for the gateway process. |
| `setup_cloudflare.sh` | Runs all the `cloudflared tunnel route dns` commands for the apex + every subdomain in one go. |
| `DEPLOY_NARVE.md` | **Step-by-step checklist** for getting narve.ai online in production. |
| `.env.example` | Reference for env vars. Copy to `.env` to use. |
| `README.md` | This file. |

## Run locally (no domain needed)

```bash
pip install -r gateway/requirements.txt
./start_dashboards.sh restart          # boots all 7 dashboards + gateway
open http://localhost:7000             # auto-logs you in as dev@local
```

Every "Open →" button links directly to its dashboard's local port, so
click-through works without any DNS fiddling.

To test the real subdomain flow locally (no dev bypass) use `*.localhost`:

```
http://habbig.localhost:7000          # <- doesn't auto-login, acts like production apex
http://crypto.localhost:7000          # <- proxies to :8000 via the gateway
```

## Production deployment

See **`DEPLOY_NARVE.md`** for the full step-by-step checklist. Short version:

1. Buy `narve.ai` (Cloudflare Registrar is cheapest; if elsewhere, change
   nameservers to Cloudflare).
2. Install & authenticate `cloudflared`.
3. Create a tunnel: `cloudflared tunnel create narve-gateway`.
4. Drop the ingress file at `~/.cloudflared/config.yml`:
   ```yaml
   tunnel: <tunnel-id>
   credentials-file: /home/<you>/.cloudflared/<tunnel-id>.json
   ingress:
     - hostname: "*.narve.ai"
       service: http://localhost:7000
     - hostname: "narve.ai"
       service: http://localhost:7000
     - service: http_status:404
   ```
5. Run `./gateway/setup_cloudflare.sh <tunnel-id>` to register DNS routes
   for the apex + all 7 subdomains at once.
6. Flip to production mode on the host:
   ```bash
   export PRODUCTION=1
   export GATEWAY_COOKIE_SECRET="$(openssl rand -hex 32)"
   ./start_dashboards.sh restart
   cloudflared tunnel run narve-gateway
   ```
7. Visit `https://narve.ai` — real signup, real subscription gating, dev
   bypass automatically disabled.

## Environment variables

| Variable | Default | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| `PRODUCTION` | unset | When set to `1`/`true`, disables the localhost dev bypass **and** flips session cookies to `secure=True` (requires HTTPS). **Always set this on the live server.** |
| `GATEWAY_COOKIE_SECRET` | unset | Reserved for future signed-cookie use. Currently only checked for presence in production startup logs. Recommended: `openssl rand -hex 32`. |

## Adding a new dashboard

1. Add its entry to `config.json` with a unique top-level key, subdomain,
   target port, display name, accent color, and prices.
2. Add a startup line to `start_dashboards.sh`.
3. Run `cloudflared tunnel route dns <tunnel-id> <newsub>.narve.ai`.
4. Restart gateway + `cloudflared`.

## Wiring real Stripe payments later

The placeholder checkout lives in `server.py` → `billing_action()`. Replace
the `db.upsert_subscription(...)` call with a Stripe Checkout Session creation,
then call the same `upsert_subscription` with the returned `stripe_sub_id`
from your webhook handler when payment confirms. The `subscriptions` table
already has a `stripe_sub_id` column.

## Backup

Pre-gateway state of the whole Polymarket folder is archived at
`../Polymarket_backup_20260404_pre_gateway/` (sibling directory, ~8.6GB).

## Partner / collaborator access

Two common setups depending on how much your partner needs to do.

### Option A — Code-level collaboration via GitHub (recommended)

Good for a partner who will edit code, designs, and UI in parallel.

1. Initialize a repo in the project root on your Mac:
   ```bash
   cd "/Users/julianhabbig/Claude Vibecoding /Polymarket"
   git init
   git add .
   git commit -m "Initial import of Narve stack"
   ```
2. Create a **private** GitHub repo (no password or token typed in chat) and
   push. Invite your partner as a collaborator from the GitHub web UI.
3. On the Ubuntu laptop, clone the same repo into `~/Polymarket-src` (kept
   separate from the running `~/Polymarket` tree so you can pull without
   disturbing running services), then rsync from `~/Polymarket-src` to
   `~/Polymarket` when deploying:
   ```bash
   rsync -avc --exclude venv --exclude auth.db --exclude __pycache__ \
     ~/Polymarket-src/ ~/Polymarket/
   sudo systemctl restart polymarket-*.service
   ```
4. Your partner gets an admin account on the gateway by signing up at
   `https://narve.ai/signup`, then running (on Ubuntu):
   ```bash
   cd ~/Polymarket/gateway
   ~/Polymarket/venv/bin/python3 -c "
   import db
   with db.conn() as c:
       c.execute('UPDATE users SET is_admin=1 WHERE email=?', ('partner@example.com',))
   "
   ```
   Admins bypass all per-dashboard subscription checks.

### Option B — Direct SSH access to the Ubuntu box

Good if your partner only needs to SSH in and tweak things directly.

1. Have your partner generate an ed25519 key on their machine:
   ```bash
   ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -C "partner"
   cat ~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub
   ```
2. Append their public key to `~/.ssh/authorized_keys` on the Ubuntu laptop
   (you paste it in — Claude never handles keys):
   ```bash
   echo '<their public key>' >> ~/.ssh/authorized_keys
   ```
3. Share the Tailscale/LAN address with them. They can then
   `ssh julianhabbig@100.69.44.108` and edit files under `~/Polymarket/`
   directly.

For anything beyond a trusted co-founder, prefer **Option A** — GitHub gives
you commit history, code review, and easy rollback. Use Option B only for
quick one-off admin tasks.
````

## File: gateway/setup_cloudflare.sh
````bash
#!/bin/bash
#
# setup_cloudflare.sh — Register DNS routes for narve.ai + all dashboard
# subdomains in one shot.
#
# Usage:
#   ./gateway/setup_cloudflare.sh <tunnel-id>
#
# Prereqs:
#   1. You've run `cloudflared tunnel login` and `cloudflared tunnel create`
#   2. narve.ai is active in your Cloudflare account
#   3. The tunnel ID is visible via `cloudflared tunnel list`
#
# What it does:
#   For each dashboard subdomain in gateway/config.json plus the apex,
#   runs `cloudflared tunnel route dns <tunnel-id> <host>`. Safe to re-run;
#   Cloudflare will say "route already exists" for anything previously created.
#

set -e

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
CONFIG_PATH="$SCRIPT_DIR/config.json"

# Colors
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
RED='\033[0;31m'
NC='\033[0m'

if [ -z "$1" ]; then
    echo -e "${RED}ERROR: missing tunnel ID${NC}"
    echo ""
    echo "Usage: $0 <tunnel-id>"
    echo ""
    echo "Find your tunnel ID with:"
    echo "    cloudflared tunnel list"
    echo ""
    exit 1
fi

TUNNEL_ID="$1"

if ! command -v cloudflared >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo -e "${RED}ERROR: cloudflared not found in PATH${NC}"
    echo "Install it first:"
    echo "  macOS:   brew install cloudflared"
    echo "  Ubuntu:  curl -L https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest/download/cloudflared-linux-amd64 -o /usr/local/bin/cloudflared && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/cloudflared"
    exit 1
fi

if [ ! -f "$CONFIG_PATH" ]; then
    echo -e "${RED}ERROR: config.json not found at $CONFIG_PATH${NC}"
    exit 1
fi

# Extract domain + subdomains from config.json using python3 (stdlib, no jq needed)
DOMAIN=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('$CONFIG_PATH'))['domain'])")
SUBDOMAINS=$(python3 -c "
import json
cfg = json.load(open('$CONFIG_PATH'))
for d in cfg['dashboards'].values():
    sub = d.get('subdomain', '').strip()
    if sub:
        print(sub)
")

echo ""
echo -e "${BLUE}=========================================${NC}"
echo -e "${BLUE}  Cloudflare DNS setup for $DOMAIN${NC}"
echo -e "${BLUE}=========================================${NC}"
echo ""
echo -e "Tunnel ID:  ${YELLOW}$TUNNEL_ID${NC}"
echo -e "Domain:     ${YELLOW}$DOMAIN${NC}"
echo -e "Subdomains: $(echo "$SUBDOMAINS" | wc -l | xargs) + apex"
echo ""

route_host() {
    local HOST="$1"
    local TMPFILE
    TMPFILE="$(mktemp)"
    echo -e "${GREEN}→${NC} $HOST"
    if cloudflared tunnel route dns "$TUNNEL_ID" "$HOST" 2>&1 | tee "$TMPFILE"; then
        :
    else
        # Exit non-zero is fine for "already exists" — log and continue
        if grep -q "already exists" "$TMPFILE"; then
            echo -e "  ${YELLOW}(route already exists, skipping)${NC}"
        else
            echo -e "  ${RED}FAILED${NC}"
        fi
    fi
    rm -f "$TMPFILE"
    echo ""
}

# Apex first
route_host "$DOMAIN"

# Then each subdomain
while IFS= read -r SUB; do
    if [ -n "$SUB" ]; then
        route_host "$SUB.$DOMAIN"
    fi
done <<< "$SUBDOMAINS"

echo -e "${BLUE}=========================================${NC}"
echo -e "${GREEN}  DNS routes configured.${NC}"
echo -e "${BLUE}=========================================${NC}"
echo ""
echo "Next steps:"
echo "  1. Make sure ~/.cloudflared/config.yml has the wildcard ingress"
echo "     (see gateway/DEPLOY_NARVE.md step 4)"
echo "  2. Start the tunnel:"
echo -e "       ${YELLOW}cloudflared tunnel run narve-gateway${NC}"
echo "  3. Visit https://$DOMAIN/"
echo ""
````
