````python
"""City to airport weather station mapping.

CRITICAL: Polymarket resolves weather markets on airport station readings,
not city center observations. This mapping must match Polymarket's resolution source.
"""
⋮----
# City name variants → (latitude, longitude, ICAO code, display name)
STATION_MAP: dict = {
⋮----
# US stations
⋮----
# International stations
⋮----
# Additional aliases
CITY_ALIASES: dict = {
⋮----
def lookup_station(city_name: str) -> Optional[tuple]
⋮----
"""Look up weather station for a city name (case-insensitive).

    Returns (lat, lon, icao_code, station_name) or None if not found.
    """
key = city_name.strip().lower()
key = CITY_ALIASES.get(key, key)
⋮----
def get_all_city_keywords() -> list
⋮----
"""Return all known city names and aliases for market title matching."""
all_keys = list(STATION_MAP.keys()) + list(CITY_ALIASES.keys())
````

## File: polymarket_weather_bot/clob_client.py
````python
"""Polymarket CLOB client — trade execution via py-clob-client."""
⋮----
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
⋮----
class TradingClient
⋮----
"""Wraps py-clob-client for order execution with paper trading support."""
⋮----
def __init__(self, config: Optional[Config] = None)
⋮----
def _init_client(self) -> bool
⋮----
async def execute_trade(self, signal: Signal, position: PositionSize) -> dict
⋮----
"""Execute a trade (or simulate in paper mode)."""
platform = getattr(signal.market, "platform", "polymarket")
⋮----
side = "YES" if signal.action == "BUY_YES" else "NO"
price = signal.market_prob if signal.action == "BUY_YES" else (1.0 - signal.market_prob)
token_id = signal.market.token_id if signal.action == "BUY_YES" else (signal.market.no_token_id or signal.market.token_id)
⋮----
shares = position.amount / price
⋮----
# Live Kalshi trading not yet implemented — paper only for now
⋮----
tag = platform.upper()
⋮----
order_args = OrderArgs(price=price, size=shares, side="BUY", token_id=token_id)
⋮----
resp = self._client.create_and_post_order(order_args, OrderType.FOK)
⋮----
order_id = resp.get("orderID", "")
⋮----
# FOK failed — try GTC with 2% slippage
slippage_price = min(round(price * 1.02, 4), 0.99)
shares = position.amount / slippage_price  # Recalculate shares at higher price to stay within position size
order_args = OrderArgs(price=slippage_price, size=shares, side="BUY", token_id=token_id)
⋮----
resp = self._client.create_and_post_order(order_args, OrderType.GTC)
⋮----
error = resp.get("errorMsg", "Unknown error") if resp else "No response"
````

````python
⋮----
"""Count fraction of GFS ensemble members that satisfy the market condition.

    More robust than Gaussian when the distribution is skewed or bimodal
    (e.g. a coin-flip front passage).  Clips to [0.05, 0.95] because even a
    unanimous 31-member ensemble shouldn't produce a 100% bet.

members = forecast.raw_ensemble
n = len(members)

⋮----

hi = market.temp_upper + 0.5
count = sum(1 for t in members if lo <= t <= hi)

⋮----

mean = forecast.mean_temp_f
std = max(forecast.std_temp_f, 0.1)
````

````python
"""Risk manager — Kelly criterion sizing and daily loss limits."""
⋮----
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
⋮----
@dataclass
class PositionSize
⋮----
"""Calculated position size for a trade."""
amount: float
kelly_fraction: float
adjusted_fraction: float
reason: str
approved: bool
⋮----
class RiskManager
⋮----
"""Manages position sizing and daily loss limits."""
⋮----
def __init__(self, config: Optional[Config] = None)
⋮----
def calculate_kelly(self, signal: Signal) -> float
⋮----
"""Calculate Kelly criterion bet fraction.

        Kelly formula: f* = (bp - q) / b
        """
⋮----
p = signal.model_prob
⋮----
b = (1.0 / signal.market_prob) - 1.0
⋮----
p = 1.0 - signal.model_prob
no_price = 1.0 - signal.market_prob
⋮----
b = (1.0 / no_price) - 1.0
⋮----
q = 1.0 - p
kelly = (b * p - q) / b
⋮----
def size_position(self, signal: Signal) -> PositionSize
⋮----
"""Calculate position size with all risk checks applied."""
⋮----
existing = self.open_positions.get(signal.market.condition_id, 0.0)
⋮----
kelly = self.calculate_kelly(signal)
⋮----
adjusted = kelly * self.config.KELLY_FRACTION
amount = self.config.BANKROLL * adjusted
⋮----
max_pos = self.config.MAX_POSITION
⋮----
amount = max_pos
adjusted = max_pos / self.config.BANKROLL
⋮----
def record_trade(self, condition_id: str, amount: float) -> None
⋮----
def record_pnl(self, pnl: float, condition_id: str = None) -> None
⋮----
def close_position(self, condition_id: str) -> None
⋮----
"""Remove a position from the open positions tracker."""
⋮----
def reset_daily(self) -> None
⋮----
def is_halted(self) -> bool
````

````python
std_temp = statistics.stdev(ensemble_temps) if len(ensemble_temps) > 1 else 3.0
std_temp = max(std_temp, 2.0)

hours_ahead = (target_date - datetime.now(timezone.utc)).total_seconds() / 3600
````

## File: polymarket_weather_dashboard/static/admin.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>NoRain Admin</title>
    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/static/favicon.png">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --bg-0: #06080d; --bg-1: #0c1017; --bg-2: #141a26; --bg-3: #1c2536;
            --border: #242f44; --text-1: #f1f5f9; --text-2: #94a3b8; --text-3: #64748b;
            --blue: #3b82f6; --green: #10b981; --red: #ef4444; --amber: #f59e0b;
            --cyan: #06b6d4; --purple: #8b5cf6;
        }
        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
        body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; background: var(--bg-0); color: var(--text-1); min-height: 100vh; }
        .topbar {
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 0 24px; height: 56px; background: var(--bg-1); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .topbar-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
        .logo { width: 30px; height: 30px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--purple), var(--cyan)); border-radius: 8px; display: grid; place-items: center; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; color: #fff; }
        .topbar h1 { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; }
        .topbar h1 span { color: var(--purple); }
        .topbar a { color: var(--blue); font-size: 12px; text-decoration: none; }

        .container { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px; }

        .metrics { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
        .metric-card {
            background: var(--bg-2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px;
        }
        .metric-val { font-size: 28px; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 4px; }
        .metric-label { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-3); }
        .metric-card.blue .metric-val { color: var(--blue); }
        .metric-card.green .metric-val { color: var(--green); }
        .metric-card.amber .metric-val { color: var(--amber); }
        .metric-card.purple .metric-val { color: var(--purple); }

        .section { margin-bottom: 24px; }
        .section-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
        .section-badge { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 10px; background: var(--blue); color: #fff; }

        table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; background: var(--bg-2); border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border); }
        th { background: var(--bg-3); text-align: left; padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-3); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .5px; }
        td { padding: 10px 14px; font-size: 13px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
        tr:hover td { background: rgba(59,130,246,.04); }
        .admin-badge { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(139,92,246,.15); color: var(--purple); }
        .user-badge { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; background: rgba(59,130,246,.12); color: var(--blue); }

        .activity-item {
            display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
            padding: 10px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            font-size: 13px;
        }
        .activity-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
        .activity-user { font-weight: 600; min-width: 80px; }
        .activity-action {
            font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px;
            background: var(--bg-3); color: var(--text-2);
        }
        .activity-action.login { background: rgba(16,185,129,.12); color: var(--green); }
        .activity-action.register { background: rgba(59,130,246,.12); color: var(--blue); }
        .activity-action.update_settings { background: rgba(245,158,11,.12); color: var(--amber); }
        .activity-time { color: var(--text-3); font-size: 11px; margin-left: auto; }

        .chart-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 24px; }
        @media (max-width: 768px) { .chart-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
        .chart-card {
            background: var(--bg-2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px;
        }
        .chart-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 12px; }
        .bar-chart { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
        .bar-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 11px; }
        .bar-label { min-width: 70px; color: var(--text-3); text-align: right; }
        .bar-track { flex: 1; height: 16px; background: var(--bg-3); border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; }
        .bar-fill { height: 100%; border-radius: 4px; background: var(--blue); transition: width .5s; }
        .bar-val { min-width: 30px; font-weight: 600; }

        .refresh-btn {
            background: var(--bg-2); border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-2);
            padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 12px; font-family: inherit;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .refresh-btn:hover { border-color: var(--blue); color: var(--blue); }
        .loading { color: var(--text-3); text-align: center; padding: 40px; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="topbar">
        <div class="topbar-left">
            <div class="logo">N</div>
            <h1>NoRain <span>Admin</span></h1>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:16px;align-items:center">
            <button class="refresh-btn" onclick="loadAll()">Refresh</button>
            <a href="/">Back to App</a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="container">
        <!-- Metrics -->
        <div class="metrics" id="metrics">
            <div class="metric-card blue"><div class="metric-val" id="m-users">--</div><div class="metric-label">Total Users</div></div>
            <div class="metric-card green"><div class="metric-val" id="m-active24">--</div><div class="metric-label">Active (24h)</div></div>
            <div class="metric-card amber"><div class="metric-val" id="m-active7d">--</div><div class="metric-label">Active (7d)</div></div>
            <div class="metric-card purple"><div class="metric-val" id="m-signals">--</div><div class="metric-label">Total Signals Logged</div></div>
        </div>

        <!-- Charts -->
        <div class="chart-row">
            <div class="chart-card">
                <div class="chart-title">Signups (last 30 days)</div>
                <div class="bar-chart" id="signups-chart"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="chart-card">
                <div class="chart-title">Activity (last 30 days)</div>
                <div class="bar-chart" id="activity-chart"></div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Users Table -->
        <div class="section">
            <div class="section-title">Users <span class="section-badge" id="user-count">0</span></div>
            <table>
                <thead>
                    <tr><th>Username</th><th>Email</th><th>Role</th><th>Joined</th><th>Last Login</th><th>Logins</th><th>Theme</th></tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody id="users-body"><tr><td colspan="7" class="loading">Loading...</td></tr></tbody>
            </table>
        </div>

        <!-- Recent Activity -->
        <div class="section">
            <div class="section-title">Recent Activity <span class="section-badge" id="activity-count">0</span></div>
            <div style="background:var(--bg-2);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden" id="activity-list">
                <div class="loading">Loading...</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    async function loadAll() {
        await Promise.all([loadMetrics(), loadUsers(), loadActivity()]);
    }

    async function loadMetrics() {
        try {
            const r = await fetch('/api/admin/metrics');
            if (r.status === 403) { window.location.href = '/'; return; }
            const j = await r.json();
            document.getElementById('m-users').textContent = j.total_users;
            document.getElementById('m-active24').textContent = j.active_24h;
            document.getElementById('m-active7d').textContent = j.active_7d;
            document.getElementById('m-signals').textContent = j.total_signals;

            // Signups chart
            const signups = (j.signups_by_day || []).reverse().slice(-14);
            const maxS = Math.max(...signups.map(s => s.c), 1);
            document.getElementById('signups-chart').innerHTML = signups.map(s =>
                `<div class="bar-row"><span class="bar-label">${s.day.slice(5)}</span><div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:${(s.c/maxS)*100}%;background:var(--blue)"></div></div><span class="bar-val">${s.c}</span></div>`
            ).join('') || '<div style="color:var(--text-3);font-size:12px;padding:8px">No data yet</div>';

            // Activity chart
            const activity = (j.activity_by_day || []).reverse().slice(-14);
            const maxA = Math.max(...activity.map(a => a.c), 1);
            document.getElementById('activity-chart').innerHTML = activity.map(a =>
                `<div class="bar-row"><span class="bar-label">${a.day.slice(5)}</span><div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:${(a.c/maxA)*100}%;background:var(--green)"></div></div><span class="bar-val">${a.c}</span></div>`
            ).join('') || '<div style="color:var(--text-3);font-size:12px;padding:8px">No data yet</div>';
        } catch (e) { console.error('Metrics failed:', e); }
    }

    async function loadUsers() {
        try {
            const r = await fetch('/api/admin/users');
            const j = await r.json();
            const users = j.users || [];
            document.getElementById('user-count').textContent = users.length;
            document.getElementById('users-body').innerHTML = users.map(u => {
                let settings = {};
                try { settings = JSON.parse(u.settings || '{}'); } catch {}
                const role = u.is_admin ? '<span class="admin-badge">Admin</span>' : '<span class="user-badge">User</span>';
                return `<tr>
                    <td><strong>${esc(u.username)}</strong></td>
                    <td>${esc(u.email || '--')}</td>
                    <td>${role}</td>
                    <td>${u.created_at || '--'}</td>
                    <td>${u.last_login || 'Never'}</td>
                    <td>${u.login_count}</td>
                    <td>${settings.theme || 'dark'}</td>
                </tr>`;
            }).join('') || '<tr><td colspan="7">No users</td></tr>';
        } catch (e) { console.error('Users failed:', e); }
    }

    async function loadActivity() {
        try {
            const r = await fetch('/api/admin/activity?limit=50');
            const j = await r.json();
            const items = j.activity || [];
            document.getElementById('activity-count').textContent = items.length;
            document.getElementById('activity-list').innerHTML = items.map(a => {
                const actionCls = a.action === 'login' ? 'login' : a.action === 'register' ? 'register' : a.action === 'update_settings' ? 'update_settings' : '';
                return `<div class="activity-item">
                    <span class="activity-user">${esc(a.username)}</span>
                    <span class="activity-action ${actionCls}">${a.action}</span>
                    ${a.detail ? `<span style="color:var(--text-3);font-size:11px">${esc(a.detail)}</span>` : ''}
                    <span class="activity-time">${a.timestamp}</span>
                </div>`;
            }).join('') || '<div class="loading">No activity yet</div>';
        } catch (e) { console.error('Activity failed:', e); }
    }

    function esc(s) { if (!s) return ''; const d = document.createElement('div'); d.textContent = s; return d.innerHTML; }

    // Auth gate — check if user is admin, show login form if not
    function showAdminLogin(msg) {
        document.body.innerHTML = `
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:100vh;font-family:Inter,sans-serif;background:#06080d">
            <div style="width:340px;padding:32px 28px;background:#141a26;border:1px solid #242f44;border-radius:20px;text-align:center">
                <div style="width:48px;height:48px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#8b5cf6,#06b6d4);border-radius:14px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-weight:800;font-size:20px;color:#fff;margin:0 auto 12px">N</div>
                <div style="font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:#f1f5f9;margin-bottom:4px">Admin Login</div>
                <div style="font-size:12px;color:#64748b;margin-bottom:20px">${msg || 'Sign in with your admin credentials'}</div>
                <input id="adm-user" placeholder="Username" style="width:100%;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:10px;background:#0c1017;border:1px solid #242f44;color:#f1f5f9;border-radius:10px;font-size:14px;font-family:inherit;outline:none">
                <input id="adm-pass" type="password" placeholder="Password" style="width:100%;padding:12px 14px;margin-bottom:10px;background:#0c1017;border:1px solid #242f44;color:#f1f5f9;border-radius:10px;font-size:14px;font-family:inherit;outline:none">
                <button onclick="adminLogin()" style="width:100%;padding:13px;background:#8b5cf6;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:10px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;font-family:inherit;cursor:pointer;margin-top:4px">Sign In</button>
                <div id="adm-error" style="color:#ef4444;font-size:12px;margin-top:8px;min-height:16px"></div>
                <a href="/" style="display:block;margin-top:14px;color:#3b82f6;font-size:12px;text-decoration:none">Back to NoRain</a>
            </div>
        </div>`;
        document.getElementById('adm-pass').addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') adminLogin(); });
    }

    async function checkAdmin() {
        try {
            const r = await fetch('/api/auth/me');
            const j = await r.json();
            if (!j.user) {
                // Not authenticated — redirect to gateway login
                window.location.href = 'https://narve.ai/login';
                return;
            }
            if (!j.user.is_admin) {
                showAdminLogin('Your account does not have admin access');
                return;
            }
            // Authenticated as admin — load dashboard
            loadAll();
            setInterval(loadAll, 30000);
        } catch {
            window.location.href = 'https://narve.ai/login';
        }
    }
    checkAdmin();
    </script>
</body>
</html>
````

````python
Polymarket Arbitrage Signal Bot

divergence = odds_prob - poly_prob  # positive = poly is cheap

cheap_side = "Polymarket" if divergence > 0 else "Bookmaker"
````

````python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Polymarket Suspicious / Insider Trades Scanner

Detects potential insider trading on Polymarket using multiple signals:
  1. Potential profit (large payout at long odds)
  2. Timing before market resolution (bets placed right before close)
  3. Volume spikes in normally quiet markets
  4. First-trade wallets (brand new wallet makes a large directional bet)
  5. Coordinated wallets (multiple wallets betting same direction in a short window)
  6. Statistical outliers (z-score vs market baseline)
  7. New account + long-shot combo patterns
"""
⋮----
# ─── Config ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

GAMMA_API = "https://gamma-api.polymarket.com"

RATE_PAUSE = 0.06  # 200 req/10s limit on trades endpoint
⋮----
# Thresholds — focused on potential profit, not just trade size

MIN_TRADE_USD = 500             # absolute minimum trade size to even consider
ZSCORE_THRESHOLD = 3.0          # standard deviations above market mean
MIN_TRADES_FOR_STATS = 20      # need this many trades to compute stats
SCAN_HOURS = 72                # how far back to scan
MAX_TRADES_PER_FETCH = 1000    # per API call
⋮----
# Insider-specific thresholds

⋮----
"""Convert a probability price to human-readable odds string.
    e.g. 0.05 -> '20:1', 0.50 -> '2:1', 0.90 -> '1.1:1'
    """
⋮----
odds_against = (1 - price) / price
⋮----
def calc_potential_profit(size: float, price: float) -> float
⋮----
"""Calculate potential profit if the bet wins.
    size = amount wagered in USD
    price = probability (0-1), e.g. 0.05 = 5% odds
    Payout = size / price (you get shares worth $1 each at price)
    Profit = payout - cost = size * (1/price - 1)
    """

return 0  # no profit at certainty
````

## File: .env.example
````
# =============================================================================
# Polymarket Dashboard Suite — Environment Variables
# =============================================================================
# This is a reference of ALL keys used across every service.
# Copy the relevant sections into each service's own .env file.
# NEVER commit real values to git.
# =============================================================================

# ── Gateway (gateway/.env) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
PRODUCTION=0
GATEWAY_COOKIE_SECRET=
# ^ REQUIRED. Generate with: python3 -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(32))"
GATEWAY_SSO_SECRET=
# ^ REQUIRED. Shared secret between gateway and all dashboards.
# Generate with: python3 -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(32))"

# Trading credential encryption key (REQUIRED in production)
# Generate with: python3 -c "from cryptography.fernet import Fernet; print(Fernet.generate_key().decode())"
TRADING_ENCRYPTION_KEY=

# Redis password (must match docker-compose.yml REDIS_PASSWORD)
REDIS_PASSWORD=

# Stripe billing (optional — placeholder checkout works without these)
# STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=sk_test_...
# STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=pk_test_...
# STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET=whsec_...

# Email / SMTP (optional — needed for password resets)
# SMTP_HOST=smtp.gmail.com
# SMTP_PORT=587
# SMTP_USER=your-email@gmail.com
# SMTP_PASS=your-app-password
# ENQUIRY_EMAIL=notifications@yourdomain.com

# ── Crypto Dashboard (crypto-dashboard/.env) ────────────────────────────────
POLYMARKET_HOST=https://clob.polymarket.com
DIVERGENCE_THRESHOLD=10
SPORT_KEY=soccer_epl
POLL_INTERVAL=300

# ── Weather Bot (polymarket_weather_bot/.env) ────────────────────────────────
PRIVATE_KEY=your_private_key_here
POLYMARKET_API_KEY=your_api_key_here
PAPER_MODE=true
EDGE_THRESHOLD=0.08
BANKROLL=1000.0
MAX_POSITION_PCT=0.05
DAILY_LOSS_LIMIT_PCT=0.10
KELLY_FRACTION=0.15
MIN_LIQUIDITY=500.0
MAX_FORECAST_HOURS=48
RUN_INTERVAL_MINUTES=15
LOG_LEVEL=INFO
DB_PATH=trades.db

# ── Truth Research Dashboard (Dashboard-x-truth-research-prediction/.env) ───
TWITTER_BEARER_TOKEN=
TWITTER_MONTHLY_QUOTA=10000
TRUTHSOCIAL_USERNAME=
TRUTHSOCIAL_PASSWORD=
TRUTHSOCIAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=
TRUTHSOCIAL_API_BASE_URL=https://truthsocial.com
DASHBOARD_USER=admin
DASHBOARD_PASSWORD=
# ^ REQUIRED. App will refuse to start if blank.
DATABASE_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///./predictions.db

# ── Sports Dashboard (sports-dashboard/.env) ─────────────────────────────────
ODDS_API_KEY=your_odds_api_key_here
````

## File: deploy.sh
````bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
# deploy.sh — Push updates to Ubuntu server
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Automatically snapshots the server state before syncing.
#
# Usage:
#   ./deploy.sh                  Deploy all sites
#   ./deploy.sh gateway          Deploy just one site
#   ./deploy.sh -m "new CSS"     Deploy all with a snapshot note

set -euo pipefail

SERVER="${DEPLOY_SERVER:?Set DEPLOY_SERVER env var (e.g. user@host)}"
REMOTE_DIR="~/Polymarket"
LOCAL_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"

# Sites that get deployed
SITES=(
    gateway
    crypto-dashboard
    stock-dashboard
    sports-dashboard
    polymarket_weather_dashboard
    world-state-dashboard
    midterm-dashboard
    Dashboard-x-truth-research-prediction
    polymarket-bot
    polymarket_weather_bot
    top-traders-dashboard
)

# Excluded from rsync
EXCLUDES=(
    "__pycache__"
    "*.pyc"
    ".DS_Store"
    "node_modules"
    "venv"
    ".venv"
    ".git"
    ".snapshots"
    "*.log"
    ".env"
    "*.db"
    "*.db-wal"
    "*.db-shm"
)

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
BOLD='\033[1m'
NC='\033[0m'

# ── Parse args ───────────────────────────────────

site=""
message=""

while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case "$1" in
        -m|--message)
            if [ -z "${2:-}" ]; then echo "Error: -m requires a message"; exit 1; fi
            message="$2"; shift 2 ;;
        -h|--help)
            echo ""
            echo -e "${BOLD}deploy.sh${NC} — Push updates to Ubuntu server"
            echo ""
            echo "  ./deploy.sh                  Deploy all sites"
            echo "  ./deploy.sh gateway          Deploy just one site"
            echo "  ./deploy.sh -m \"note\"         Deploy with a snapshot note"
            echo ""
            exit 0
            ;;
        *) site="$1"; shift ;;
    esac
done

# Validate site if specified
if [[ -n "$site" ]]; then
    found=false
    for s in "${SITES[@]}"; do
        [[ "$s" == "$site" ]] && found=true && break
    done
    if ! $found; then
        echo -e "${RED}Error:${NC} Unknown site '$site'"
        echo "Available: ${SITES[*]}"
        exit 1
    fi
fi

# ── Build rsync exclude args ────────────────────

exclude_args=()
for pat in "${EXCLUDES[@]}"; do
    exclude_args+=(--exclude="$pat")
done

# ── Step 1: Snapshot on server ───────────────────

echo -e "${CYAN}[1/3] Snapshotting current server state...${NC}"

snapshot_msg="${message:-pre-deploy}"
if [[ -n "$site" ]]; then
    ssh "$SERVER" "cd $REMOTE_DIR && ./snapshot.sh save $(printf '%q' "$site") -m $(printf '%q' "$snapshot_msg")"
else
    ssh "$SERVER" "cd $REMOTE_DIR && ./snapshot.sh save -m $(printf '%q' "$snapshot_msg")"
fi

# ── Step 2: Sync files ──────────────────────────

echo ""
echo -e "${CYAN}[2/3] Syncing files to server...${NC}"

if [[ -n "$site" ]]; then
    echo -e "  Deploying ${BOLD}$site${NC}"
    rsync -avz --delete "${exclude_args[@]}" \
        "$LOCAL_DIR/$site/" "$SERVER:$REMOTE_DIR/$site/"
else
    for s in "${SITES[@]}"; do
        [[ -d "$LOCAL_DIR/$s" ]] || continue
        echo -e "  Deploying ${BOLD}$s${NC}"
        rsync -avz --delete "${exclude_args[@]}" \
            "$LOCAL_DIR/$s/" "$SERVER:$REMOTE_DIR/$s/"
    done
fi

# Also sync the snapshot script itself
rsync -avz "$LOCAL_DIR/snapshot.sh" "$SERVER:$REMOTE_DIR/snapshot.sh"

# ── Step 3: Done ─────────────────────────────────

echo ""
echo -e "${GREEN}[3/3] Deploy complete!${NC}"
echo -e "  ${YELLOW}Note:${NC} You may need to restart services on the server."
echo -e "  To revert: ssh $SERVER \"cd $REMOTE_DIR && ./snapshot.sh restore <id>\""
````

## File: README.md
````markdown
# Polymarket Dashboard Suite — narve.ai

A monorepo of prediction-market dashboards and trading bots, all unified
behind a single auth/billing gateway. Each dashboard runs as its own service
on its own port. The gateway proxies subdomains, handles SSO, and gates
access by per-dashboard subscription.

See `CONTRIBUTING.md` for the contributor quick-start (Docker + manual).

## Layout

| Directory | Port | What it is |
|---|---|---|
| `gateway/` | 7000 | Central auth + reverse proxy. The single entry point. |
| `crypto-dashboard/` | 8000 | BTC/crypto signals + ML ensemble (CryptoEdge). |
| `stock-dashboard/` | 8050 | Stock market signal dashboard (StockSignal). |
| `midterm-dashboard/` | 8051 | US midterm election predictions (FastAPI + React). |
| `top-traders-dashboard/` | 8052 | Polymarket whale tracking + insider detection. |
| `polymarket_weather_dashboard/` | 5050 | Weather-market dashboard UI (Flask + PWA). |
| `sports-dashboard/` | 8888 | Sports arbitrage signals (The Odds API vs Polymarket). |
| `world-state-dashboard/` | 7050 | Geopolitical feed + infrastructure map. |
| `disasters-dashboard/` | 7053 | Hurricanes, earthquakes, wildfires & severe-weather edges (NHC + USGS + EONET + NWS). |
| `crypto-trackers-dashboard/` | 7054 | Every-coin trackers: multi-exchange spot+perps, cross-exchange arb, funding rates, DeFi TVL, F&G. |
| `Dashboard-x-truth-research-prediction/` | 18789 | X / TruthSocial prediction-mining dashboard. |
| `polymarket_weather_bot/` | — | Headless weather-market trading bot (no UI). |
| `polymarket-bot/` | — | 5-minute up/down trading bot (single file, tightly coupled to crypto-dashboard). |
| `deploy/` | — | Systemd unit files for the Ubuntu production box. |
| `workdir/` | — | Scratch directory (mostly duplicate copies of crypto-dashboard files). |

Each directory has its own `README.md` with a per-file breakdown.

## Files in this directory

**Build / orchestration**
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `docker-compose.yml` | Multi-service stack (Redis, gateway, all 8 dashboards). One command brings the whole suite up. |
| `start_dashboards.sh` | Manual launcher (no Docker). Boots each dashboard with PID files and `/tmp/dashboard_*.log` logs. Subcommands: `start`, `stop`, `restart`, `status`. |
| `deploy.sh` | Rsync deploy from this Mac to the Ubuntu production box. Supports per-site selection and automatic snapshot before sync. |
| `snapshot.sh` | Local backup/restore — `tar.gz` per site with safe `sqlite3 .backup` for live DBs. Index lives in `.snapshots/index.txt`. |
| `.dockerignore` | Top-level Docker build exclusions (also overridden per-dashboard). |
| `.gitignore` | Project-wide ignores: secrets, DBs, logs, Python/Node artifacts, OS cruft. The Python `lib/` rule is unignored for `midterm-dashboard/frontend/src/lib/` — without that explicit unignore, the entire frontend `src/lib/` directory (api.js, settings.jsx, currency.js) is silently swallowed. If you add a frontend `src/lib/` to another dashboard, add it to the unignore list too. |
| `.env.example` | Reference of every env key across every service. Each service also has its own `.env.example`. |
| `ruff.toml` | Linting config — 200-char lines, F821 (undefined names) only. |

**Documentation**
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `README.md` | This file. |
| `CONTRIBUTING.md` | Setup, port table, branch workflow, code style, env-var guidance. |

## Common workflows

```bash
# Bring everything up via Docker
docker compose up --build

# Start one dashboard manually
cd crypto-dashboard && python3 server.py

# Snapshot before deploy
./snapshot.sh save all "before-cleanup"
./deploy.sh

# Lint
ruff check gateway/ crypto-dashboard/ stock-dashboard/
```
````

## File: .github/workflows/ci.yml
````yaml
name: CI

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_call:

jobs:
  lint:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"
      - run: pip install ruff
      - name: Lint all services
        run: >
          ruff check
          gateway/
          crypto-dashboard/
          stock-dashboard/
          midterm-dashboard/
          top-traders-dashboard/
          polymarket_weather_dashboard/
          sports-dashboard/
          world-state-dashboard/
          climate-dashboard/

  docker-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      # Compose interpolates ${REDIS_PASSWORD:?...} at parse time, so the build
      # step needs *some* value. The password is only read at runtime by redis,
      # not during the build.
      REDIS_PASSWORD: ci-build
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Build all images
        run: docker compose build
````

## File: crypto-dashboard/ml_predictor.py
````python
"""
ML Predictor for Crypto 5-Minute Up/Down — Multi-Coin

Trains on RAW 1-SECOND tick data — sees the microstructure within each
5-minute window, not just OHLCV summaries.

Three models:
1. LSTM — learns temporal patterns across sequences of windows
2. PyTorch feedforward net — learns non-linear microstructure patterns
3. Gradient Boosted Trees — ensemble on engineered features

Supports multiple coins: BTC, ETH, SOL, DOGE, XRP (with pickle data).
"""
⋮----
# ─── Config ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
BINANCE_API = "https://api.binance.com/api/v3"
CACHE_DIR = Path(__file__).parent / "cache"
WINDOW_SEC = 300  # 5 minutes
WINDOW_MS = WINDOW_SEC * 1000
LSTM_SEQ_LEN = 10  # number of consecutive windows for LSTM input
⋮----
COIN_SYMBOLS = {
⋮----
def features_cache_path(symbol)
⋮----
# ─── Load raw 1-second tick data ──────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
def load_all_tick_data(symbol="BTCUSDT")
⋮----
"""
    Load ALL 1-second pickle files for a symbol at FULL resolution.
    Returns two numpy arrays: (timestamps_ms, prices).
    """
pickle_files = sorted(CACHE_DIR.glob(f"{symbol}_1s_*.pkl"))
⋮----
all_ts = {}  # ts -> price, dedup
⋮----
data = safe_pickle_load(pf)
⋮----
all_ts[int(row[0])] = float(row[4])  # close price
⋮----
sorted_items = sorted(all_ts.items())
timestamps = np.array([t[0] for t in sorted_items], dtype=np.int64)
prices = np.array([t[1] for t in sorted_items], dtype=np.float64)
⋮----
days = (timestamps[-1] - timestamps[0]) / 1000 / 86400
⋮----
# ─── Extract micro-features from 1-second data ──────────────────────
⋮----
def extract_window_features(prices_in_window)
⋮----
"""
    Extract ~30 microstructure features from the raw 1-second prices
    within a single 5-minute window.

    This is where the 1s resolution pays off — we can see things
    that 5m OHLCV candles hide.
    """
n = len(prices_in_window)
⋮----
p = prices_in_window
p0 = p[0]  # opening price
⋮----
return None  # corrupted data — can't normalize
⋮----
# Normalize prices relative to open (basis points)
delta = (p - p0) / p0 * 10000  # in basis points
⋮----
# ── 1-10: TRAJECTORY SHAPE ──
# Sample price at 10 evenly-spaced points through the window
# This captures the "shape" of the move (V, inverted-V, staircase, etc.)
indices = np.linspace(0, n - 1, 10, dtype=int)
trajectory = delta[indices]
# Normalize trajectory to [-1, 1] range
traj_range = max(abs(delta.max()), abs(delta.min()), 1)
trajectory_norm = trajectory / traj_range
⋮----
# ── 11: TOTAL RETURN ──
total_return = delta[-1]
⋮----
# ── 12-13: MAX EXCURSION ──
max_up = delta.max()
max_down = delta.min()
⋮----
# ── 14-15: TIME TO PEAK/TROUGH ──
time_to_peak = np.argmax(delta) / n  # 0.0 to 1.0
time_to_trough = np.argmin(delta) / n
⋮----
# ── 16: DIRECTION CHANGES ──
# How many times does price reverse direction?
diffs = np.diff(p)
signs = np.sign(diffs)
signs_nonzero = signs[signs != 0]
⋮----
direction_changes = np.sum(np.diff(signs_nonzero) != 0)
⋮----
direction_changes = 0
direction_changes_norm = direction_changes / max(n, 1) * 100
⋮----
# ── 17: PERCENT TIME ABOVE OPEN ──
pct_above_open = np.mean(p > p0) * 100
⋮----
# ── 18-19: FIRST/LAST 60 SECONDS MOMENTUM ──
first_60 = min(60, n // 3)
last_60 = min(60, n // 3)
first_60s_return = (p[first_60] - p[0]) / p[0] * 10000 if first_60 > 0 and p[0] != 0 else 0
last_60s_return = (p[-1] - p[-last_60]) / p[-last_60] * 10000 if last_60 > 0 and p[-last_60] != 0 else 0
⋮----
# ── 20: ACCELERATION ──
# First half return vs second half return
mid = n // 2
first_half = (p[mid] - p[0]) / p[0] * 10000 if p[0] != 0 else 0
second_half = (p[-1] - p[mid]) / p[mid] * 10000 if p[mid] != 0 else 0
acceleration = second_half - first_half
⋮----
# ── 21: MICRO-VOLATILITY ──
denom = p[:-1].copy()
denom[denom == 0] = 1e-10  # guard against zero-price ticks
returns_1s = np.diff(p) / denom * 10000
volatility = np.std(returns_1s) if len(returns_1s) > 1 else 0
⋮----
# ── 22: UP-TICK RATIO ──
up_ticks = np.sum(returns_1s > 0)
total_ticks = len(returns_1s)
uptick_ratio = up_ticks / max(total_ticks, 1)
⋮----
# ── 23-24: LARGEST SINGLE MOVES ──
⋮----
max_up_tick = returns_1s.max()
max_down_tick = returns_1s.min()
⋮----
max_up_tick = 0
max_down_tick = 0
⋮----
# ── 25: SKEWNESS of returns ──
⋮----
skewness = float(np.mean(((returns_1s - returns_1s.mean()) / volatility) ** 3))
⋮----
skewness = 0
⋮----
# ── 26: MEAN REVERSION COUNT ──
mean_price = np.mean(p)
above_mean = p > mean_price
mean_crossings = np.sum(np.diff(above_mean.astype(int)) != 0)
mean_cross_norm = mean_crossings / max(n, 1) * 100
⋮----
# ── 27: UP-VOLUME vs DOWN-VOLUME ──
# Sum of positive moves vs sum of negative moves
up_moves = returns_1s[returns_1s > 0].sum() if np.any(returns_1s > 0) else 0
down_moves = abs(returns_1s[returns_1s < 0].sum()) if np.any(returns_1s < 0) else 0
vol_ratio = up_moves / max(down_moves, 0.001) if down_moves > 0 else 2.0
⋮----
# ── 28: VOLATILITY CLUSTERING ──
# Is volatility increasing or decreasing through the window?
⋮----
first_vol = np.std(returns_1s[:len(returns_1s)//2])
second_vol = np.std(returns_1s[len(returns_1s)//2:])
vol_trend = (second_vol - first_vol) / max(first_vol, 0.001)
⋮----
vol_trend = 0
⋮----
# ── 29: PRICE RANGE EFFICIENCY ──
# How much of the high-low range was captured by the close?
price_range = max(p) - min(p)
⋮----
efficiency = (p[-1] - min(p)) / price_range  # 1.0 = closed at high
⋮----
efficiency = 0.5
⋮----
# ── 30: TREND LINEARITY ──
# R-squared of linear fit — high = clean trend, low = choppy
⋮----
x = np.arange(n, dtype=np.float64)
slope = np.polyfit(x, delta, 1)[0]
predicted = slope * x
ss_res = np.sum((delta - predicted) ** 2)
ss_tot = np.sum((delta - delta.mean()) ** 2)
r_squared = 1 - ss_res / max(ss_tot, 0.001) if ss_tot > 0 else 0
⋮----
r_squared = 0
slope = 0
⋮----
# Combine all features
features = np.concatenate([
⋮----
trajectory_norm,                     # 1-10: shape
[total_return / 100],                # 11: total return (scaled)
[max_up / 100, max_down / 100],      # 12-13: excursion (scaled)
[time_to_peak, time_to_trough],      # 14-15: timing

def predict_gbt(trained, X_current)

# ─── LSTM sequence model ─────────────────────────────────────────────

def build_sequence_samples(window_features, window_outcomes, window_times, seq_len=LSTM_SEQ_LEN)
⋮----
"""
    Build sequences of consecutive windows for LSTM training.
    Each sample = seq_len consecutive window feature vectors.
    Target = outcome of the window after the sequence.
    """
n = len(window_features)
⋮----
n_feats = window_features.shape[1]
X_seqs = []
y_seqs = []
⋮----
# Check windows are roughly consecutive (within 10 min gap tolerance)
t_start = window_times[i - seq_len]
t_end = window_times[i]
expected_span = seq_len * WINDOW_MS
actual_span = t_end - t_start
if actual_span > expected_span * 2:  # skip if >2x expected (gap in data)
⋮----
X_seqs.append(window_features[i - seq_len:i])  # (seq_len, 30)
y_seqs.append(window_outcomes[i])  # predict current window's outcome given prior context
⋮----
def train_lstm(X_seq, y, epochs=80)
⋮----
"""Train LSTM on sequences of window features."""
⋮----
# Normalize per-feature across all sequences
⋮----
X_flat = X_seq.reshape(-1, n_feats)
mean = X_flat.mean(axis=0)
std = X_flat.std(axis=0)
⋮----
X_norm = ((X_seq.reshape(-1, n_feats) - mean) / std).reshape(n_samples, seq_len, n_feats)
⋮----
class CryptoLSTM(nn.Module)
⋮----
def __init__(self, input_size, hidden_size=64, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2)
⋮----
def forward(self, x)
⋮----
model = CryptoLSTM(n_feats)
⋮----
# Chronological split
⋮----
batch_size = min(256, len(X_train))
⋮----
def predict_lstm(trained, recent_window_features)
⋮----
"""Predict using LSTM on the most recent seq_len window features."""
⋮----
seq_len = trained["seq_len"]
⋮----
seq = recent_window_features[-seq_len:]  # (seq_len, 30)
seq_norm = (seq - trained["mean"]) / trained["std"]
X_t = torch.tensor(seq_norm.reshape(1, seq_len, -1), dtype=torch.float32)
⋮----
# ─── Statistical Profile — conditional probabilities from history ─────
⋮----
class StatisticalProfile
⋮----
"""
    Builds conditional probability tables from 50k+ historical windows.
    Pure statistics — no ML, just "given X, what happened historically?"
    """
⋮----
def __init__(self)
⋮----
def build(self, window_features, window_outcomes, window_times)
⋮----
"""Build all statistical lookup tables from historical data."""
⋮----
outcomes = window_outcomes.astype(int)
⋮----
# ── 1. SEQUENTIAL: P(UP | previous window was UP/DOWN) ──
prev_up_then_up = 0
prev_up_count = 0
prev_down_then_up = 0
prev_down_count = 0
⋮----
# ── 2. STREAK STATS: P(UP | streak of N in same direction) ──
⋮----
# After N consecutive UPs
count_streak_up = 0
then_up = 0
⋮----
# After N consecutive DOWNs
count_streak_dn = 0
then_up_dn = 0
⋮----
# ── 3. HOUR-OF-DAY: best/worst hours ──
hour_up = {}
hour_total = {}
⋮----
h = datetime.fromtimestamp(window_times[i] / 1000, tz=timezone.utc).hour
⋮----
# ── 4. FEATURE-CONDITIONAL: P(UP | feature in bucket) ──
# For key features, bin into quintiles and compute P(UP) per bin
feature_names = [
⋮----
(10, "total_return"),      # return of current window
(20, "micro_volatility"),  # volatility
(21, "uptick_ratio"),      # buying pressure
(29, "trend_linearity"),   # R-squared
(28, "range_efficiency"),  # closed near high/low
(14, "time_to_peak"),      # early/late peak
⋮----
vals = window_features[:, feat_idx]
# Create 5 bins
percentiles = np.percentile(vals, [20, 40, 60, 80])
# Skip features whose distribution has collapsed (constant values
# cause every percentile to equal one another, which makes
# np.digitize bin everything into 0 or 4 and produces a useless
# bin_stats with degenerate (c, c) val_range).
⋮----
bins = np.digitize(vals, percentiles)  # 0-4
bin_stats = {}
⋮----
mask = bins == b
⋮----
# ── 5. MOMENTUM CONTINUATION: already captured in feature bins above
# (legacy dead loop removed) ──
⋮----
# ── 6. VOLATILITY REGIME: P(UP | high/low vol regime) ──
vols = window_features[:, 20]
vol_median = np.median(vols)
high_vol_mask = vols[:-1] > vol_median
low_vol_mask = vols[:-1] <= vol_median
next_outcomes = outcomes[1:]
⋮----
# ── 7. MEAN REVERSION: after big moves, what happens? ──
returns_prev = window_features[:-1, 10]  # return of previous window
next_out = outcomes[1:]
big_up = returns_prev > np.percentile(returns_prev, 80)
big_down = returns_prev < np.percentile(returns_prev, 20)
⋮----
# ── 8. COMBINED SIGNAL STRENGTH ──
# P(UP | prev window UP AND high uptick ratio AND positive momentum)
⋮----
uptick = window_features[:, 21]
uptick_med = np.median(uptick)
returns_feat = window_features[:, 10]  # total return per window
combined_bull = np.zeros(n - 1, dtype=bool)
combined_bear = np.zeros(n - 1, dtype=bool)
⋮----
is_prev_up = outcomes[i] == 1
is_high_uptick = uptick[i] > uptick_med
is_pos_return = returns_feat[i] > 0
⋮----
# ── 9. RECENT BIAS (last 500 windows) ──
recent = min(500, n)
⋮----
# ── 10. DAY-OF-WEEK ──
dow_up = {}
dow_total = {}
⋮----
d = datetime.fromtimestamp(window_times[i] / 1000, tz=timezone.utc).weekday()
⋮----
# Print summary
⋮----
"""
        Return P(UP) for the next window based on statistical conditionals.
        Each stat contributes a weighted vote.
        """
⋮----
votes = []  # list of (probability, weight, reason)
⋮----
# 1. Sequential
⋮----
p = self.stats["p_up_after_up"]
⋮----
p = self.stats["p_up_after_down"]
⋮----
# 2. Streak
⋮----
key = f"p_up_after_{min(streak_count, 5)}_{'ups' if streak_direction == 1 else 'downs'}"
n_key = f"n_after_{min(streak_count, 5)}_{'ups' if streak_direction == 1 else 'downs'}"
⋮----
p = self.stats[key]
⋮----
# 3. Hour of day
h_p = self.stats["hour_p_up"].get(current_hour, 0.5)
h_count = self.stats.get("hour_counts", {}).get(current_hour, 0)
⋮----
# 4. Day of week
d_p = self.stats["dow_p_up"].get(current_dow, 0.5)
⋮----
# 5. Feature conditionals (previous window's features)
⋮----
fb = self.stats.get("feature_bins", {}).get(feat_name, {})
⋮----
val = prev_window_features[feat_idx]
b = int(np.digitize(val, fb["percentiles"]))
bin_info = fb.get("bins", {}).get(b, {})
⋮----
p = bin_info["p_up"]
⋮----
# 6. Volatility regime
⋮----
vol = prev_window_features[20]
⋮----
# 7. Mean reversion after big moves
⋮----
ret = prev_window_features[10]
fb = self.stats.get("feature_bins", {}).get("total_return", {})
⋮----
percs = fb["percentiles"]
if ret > percs[-1]:  # top 20%
⋮----
elif ret < percs[0]:  # bottom 20%
⋮----
# 8. Recent bias
recent_rate = self.stats.get("recent_up_rate", 0.5)
⋮----
# Weighted average of all votes
⋮----
total_w = sum(w for _, w, _ in votes)
weighted_prob = sum(p * w for p, w, _ in votes) / total_w
⋮----
# Confidence: how much do votes agree?
probs = [p for p, _, _ in votes]
spread = max(probs) - min(probs)
agreement = 1.0 - spread
⋮----
top_signals = sorted(votes, key=lambda x: abs(x[0] - 0.5) * x[1], reverse=True)[:5]
⋮----
# ─── Main predictor class ────────────────────────────────────────────
⋮----
class MLPredictor
⋮----
def __init__(self, symbol="BTCUSDT")
⋮----
self.retrain_interval = 600  # 10 minutes
⋮----
self.window_features = None  # per-window micro features
⋮----
def train(self)
⋮----
now = time.time()
⋮----
cache_file = features_cache_path(self.symbol)
⋮----
# Check for cached features
cache_ok = False
⋮----
cache_age = time.time() - cache_file.stat().st_mtime
⋮----
cached = np.load(cache_file, allow_pickle=False)
⋮----
cache_ok = True
⋮----
t0 = time.time()
⋮----
t1 = time.time()
⋮----
# Build flat training samples (for NN + GBT)
⋮----
# Train all three models
⋮----
# LSTM on raw window sequences
⋮----
nn_acc = self.nn_model["val_acc"] if self.nn_model else 0
gbt_acc = self.gbt_model["val_acc"] if self.gbt_model else 0
lstm_acc = self.lstm_model["val_acc"] if self.lstm_model else 0
n_train = self.nn_model.get('n_train', 0) if self.nn_model else 0
⋮----
def predict(self)
⋮----
X_current = self.features[-1]
nn_prob = predict_neural_net(self.nn_model, X_current)
gbt_prob = predict_gbt(self.gbt_model, X_current)
⋮----
# LSTM prediction using recent window features
lstm_prob = 0.5
⋮----
lstm_prob = predict_lstm(self.lstm_model, self.window_features)
⋮----
nn_acc = self.nn_model["val_acc"] if self.nn_model else 0.5
gbt_acc = self.gbt_model["val_acc"] if self.gbt_model else 0.5
lstm_acc = self.lstm_model["val_acc"] if self.lstm_model else 0.5
⋮----
# Weighted ensemble (accuracy-squared weighting)
nn_w = nn_acc ** 2
gbt_w = gbt_acc ** 2
lstm_w = lstm_acc ** 2 if self.lstm_model else 0
total_w = nn_w + gbt_w + lstm_w
ensemble = ((nn_prob * nn_w + gbt_prob * gbt_w + lstm_prob * lstm_w) / total_w
⋮----
# Confidence from 3-model agreement
probs = [nn_prob, gbt_prob]
⋮----
confidence = "high"
⋮----
confidence = "medium"
⋮----
confidence = "low"
⋮----
# ─── Multi-coin predictor registry ──────────────────────────────────
⋮----
_predictors = {}  # coin -> MLPredictor
⋮----
def get_ml_prediction(coin="btc")
⋮----
symbol = COIN_SYMBOLS.get(coin, "BTCUSDT")
⋮----
# Check if pickle data exists for this coin
pickle_files = list(CACHE_DIR.glob(f"{symbol}_1s_*.pkl"))
⋮----
predictor = _predictors[coin]
⋮----
result = predictor.train()
````

## File: Dashboard-x-truth-research-prediction/app/templates/login.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Login — Signal Dashboard</title>
    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/static/favicon.png">
    <!-- Tailwind CDN is a dynamic script and does not support SRI hashes -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <style>
        @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');
        body { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; }
        :root { --accent: #2D64F3; --accent-hover: #3B73FF; --accent-glow: rgba(45,100,243,0.15); --label: Polymarket; }
        .kalshi-mode { --accent: #00d26a; --accent-hover: #00e676; --accent-glow: rgba(0,210,106,0.15); --label: Kalshi; }
        .seg-ctrl { display: inline-flex; border-radius: 12px; padding: 3px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); width: 100%; }
        .seg-btn { flex: 1; padding: 10px 0; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.25s; color: #6b7280; text-align: center; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }
        .seg-btn.active { color: white; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); }
        .seg-btn.poly-active { background: #2D64F3; }
        .seg-btn.kalshi-active { background: #00d26a; color: #0d1117; }
        .seg-btn:not(.active):hover { color: #9ca3af; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-[#0d1117] min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center" id="login-body">
<div class="w-full max-w-sm mx-auto px-6">

    <!-- Branding -->
    <div class="text-center mb-6">
        <div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
            <div class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full" id="brand-dot" style="background:var(--accent)"></div>
            <span class="text-xl font-semibold text-white tracking-tight" id="brand-name">Polymarket Signal</span>
        </div>
        <p class="text-sm text-gray-500">Prediction Intelligence Dashboard</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Login card -->
    <div class="bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/[0.06] rounded-2xl p-8">
        <h2 class="text-lg font-medium text-gray-200 mb-6">Sign in</h2>

        {% if msg %}<div class="mb-5 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg bg-green-500/10 border border-green-500/20 text-green-400 text-sm">{{ msg }}</div>{% endif %}
        {% if error %}<div class="mb-5 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/20 text-red-400 text-sm">{{ error }}</div>{% endif %}

        <form method="POST" action="/login" class="space-y-5" id="login-form">
            <input type="hidden" name="_csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token }}">
            <input type="hidden" name="start_platform" id="start-platform" value="polymarket">

            <div>
                <label for="username" class="block text-xs font-medium text-gray-400 mb-2 uppercase tracking-wider">Username</label>
                <input type="text" id="username" name="username" required autocomplete="username" autofocus
                    class="w-full bg-white/[0.04] border border-white/[0.08] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm text-gray-200 placeholder-gray-600 focus:outline-none transition-all"
                    style="border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" placeholder="admin"
                    onfocus="this.style.borderColor='var(--accent)';this.style.boxShadow='0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow)'"
                    onblur="this.style.borderColor='rgba(255,255,255,0.08)';this.style.boxShadow='none'">
            </div>

            <div>
                <div class="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
                    <label for="password" class="block text-xs font-medium text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider">Password</label>
                    <a href="/forgot-password" class="text-[10px] hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity" style="color:var(--accent)">Forgot password?</a>
                </div>
                <div class="relative">
                    <input type="password" id="password" name="password" required autocomplete="current-password"
                        class="w-full bg-white/[0.04] border border-white/[0.08] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 pr-10 text-sm text-gray-200 placeholder-gray-600 focus:outline-none transition-all"
                        style="border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" placeholder="••••••••"
                        onfocus="this.style.borderColor='var(--accent)';this.style.boxShadow='0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow)'"
                        onblur="this.style.borderColor='rgba(255,255,255,0.08)';this.style.boxShadow='none'">
                    <button type="button" onclick="togglePw()" class="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 transition-colors" tabindex="-1">
                        <svg id="eye-open" class="w-4 h-4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5" d="M2.036 12.322a1.012 1.012 0 010-.639C3.423 7.51 7.36 4.5 12 4.5c4.638 0 8.573 3.007 9.963 7.178.07.207.07.431 0 .639C20.577 16.49 16.64 19.5 12 19.5c-4.638 0-8.573-3.007-9.963-7.178z"/><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5" d="M15 12a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0z"/></svg>
                        <svg id="eye-closed" class="w-4 h-4 hidden" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5" d="M3.98 8.223A10.477 10.477 0 001.934 12C3.226 16.338 7.244 19.5 12 19.5c.993 0 1.953-.138 2.863-.395M6.228 6.228A10.45 10.45 0 0112 4.5c4.756 0 8.773 3.162 10.065 7.498a10.523 10.523 0 01-4.293 5.774M6.228 6.228L3 3m3.228 3.228l3.65 3.65m7.894 7.894L21 21m-3.228-3.228l-3.65-3.65m0 0a3 3 0 10-4.243-4.243m4.242 4.242L9.88 9.88"/></svg>
                    </button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Platform chooser -->
            <div>
                <label class="block text-xs font-medium text-gray-400 mb-2 uppercase tracking-wider">Start on</label>
                <div class="seg-ctrl" id="platform-chooser">
                    <button type="button" class="seg-btn active poly-active" id="btn-poly" onclick="choosePlatform('polymarket')">Polymarket</button>
                    <button type="button" class="seg-btn" id="btn-kalshi" onclick="choosePlatform('kalshi')">Kalshi</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <button type="submit" id="login-btn"
                class="w-full text-white font-medium text-sm py-3 rounded-xl transition-all active:scale-[0.98] focus:outline-none"
                style="background:var(--accent);"
                onmouseenter="this.style.background='var(--accent-hover)'"
                onmouseleave="this.style.background='var(--accent)'">
                Sign in
            </button>
        </form>

        <div class="mt-5 pt-5 border-t border-white/5 text-center">
            <a href="/register" class="text-sm font-medium hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity" style="color:var(--accent)">Create an account</a>
        </div>
    </div>

    <p class="text-center text-[11px] text-gray-600 mt-6">All data stays local on your machine.</p>
</div>

<script>
function togglePw() {
    const inp = document.getElementById('password');
    const open = document.getElementById('eye-open');
    const closed = document.getElementById('eye-closed');
    if (inp.type === 'password') {
        inp.type = 'text'; open.classList.add('hidden'); closed.classList.remove('hidden');
    } else {
        inp.type = 'password'; open.classList.remove('hidden'); closed.classList.add('hidden');
    }
}

function choosePlatform(plat) {
    const body = document.getElementById('login-body');
    const dot = document.getElementById('brand-dot');
    const name = document.getElementById('brand-name');
    const polyBtn = document.getElementById('btn-poly');
    const kalshiBtn = document.getElementById('btn-kalshi');
    const hiddenInput = document.getElementById('start-platform');

    hiddenInput.value = plat;

    polyBtn.classList.remove('active', 'poly-active');
    kalshiBtn.classList.remove('active', 'kalshi-active');

    if (plat === 'kalshi') {
        body.classList.add('kalshi-mode');
        kalshiBtn.classList.add('active', 'kalshi-active');
        name.textContent = 'Kalshi Signal';
    } else {
        body.classList.remove('kalshi-mode');
        polyBtn.classList.add('active', 'poly-active');
        name.textContent = 'Polymarket Signal';
    }

    // Force re-render of accent-colored elements
    dot.style.background = 'var(--accent)';
    document.getElementById('login-btn').style.background = 'var(--accent)';
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
````

## File: Dashboard-x-truth-research-prediction/app/templates/register.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Create Account — Signal Dashboard</title>
    <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/static/favicon.png">
    <!-- Tailwind CDN is a dynamic script and does not support SRI hashes -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <style>
        @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');
        body { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; }
        :root { --accent: #2D64F3; --accent-hover: #3B73FF; --accent-glow: rgba(45,100,243,0.15); }
        .req-met { color: #22c55e; }
        .req-unmet { color: #484f58; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-[#0d1117] min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center">
<div class="w-full max-w-sm mx-auto px-6">

    <div class="text-center mb-6">
        <div class="inline-flex items-center gap-2 mb-3"><div class="w-3 h-3 rounded-full" style="background:var(--accent)"></div><span class="text-xl font-semibold text-white tracking-tight">Signal Dashboard</span></div>
        <p class="text-sm text-gray-500">Create your account</p>
    </div>
    <div class="bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/[0.06] rounded-2xl p-8">
        {% if error %}<div class="mb-5 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/20 text-red-400 text-sm">{{ error }}</div>{% endif %}
        <form method="POST" action="/register" class="space-y-4" id="reg-form">
            <input type="hidden" name="_csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token }}">
            <input type="hidden" name="start_platform" value="polymarket">

            <!-- Username -->
            <div>
                <label class="block text-xs font-medium text-gray-400 mb-2 uppercase tracking-wider">Username</label>
                <input type="text" name="username" id="reg-username" required minlength="3" maxlength="15"
                    class="w-full bg-white/[0.04] border border-white/[0.08] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm text-gray-200 placeholder-gray-600 focus:outline-none transition-all"
                    placeholder="3–15 characters" oninput="checkUsername()">
                <p id="username-hint" class="text-[10px] mt-1.5 req-unmet hidden">&#10005; 3–15 characters</p>
            </div>

            <!-- Email -->
            <div>
                <label class="block text-xs font-medium text-gray-400 mb-2 uppercase tracking-wider">Email <span class="text-gray-600">(optional)</span></label>
                <input type="email" name="email" class="w-full bg-white/[0.04] border border-white/[0.08] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm text-gray-200 placeholder-gray-600 focus:outline-none transition-all" placeholder="you@example.com">
            </div>

            <!-- Password -->
            <div>
                <label class="block text-xs font-medium text-gray-400 mb-2 uppercase tracking-wider">Password</label>
                <input type="password" name="password" id="reg-password" required
                    class="w-full bg-white/[0.04] border border-white/[0.08] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm text-gray-200 placeholder-gray-600 focus:outline-none transition-all"
                    placeholder="Create a strong password" oninput="checkPassword()" onfocus="document.getElementById('pw-reqs').classList.remove('hidden')">
                <!-- Password requirements checklist -->
                <div id="pw-reqs" class="hidden mt-2.5 space-y-1">
                    <p class="text-[11px] req-unmet" id="req-length"><span class="inline-block w-3.5">&#10005;</span> At least 12 characters</p>
                    <p class="text-[11px] req-unmet" id="req-upper"><span class="inline-block w-3.5">&#10005;</span> One uppercase letter</p>
                    <p class="text-[11px] req-unmet" id="req-lower"><span class="inline-block w-3.5">&#10005;</span> One lowercase letter</p>
                    <p class="text-[11px] req-unmet" id="req-number"><span class="inline-block w-3.5">&#10005;</span> One number</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Confirm Password -->
            <div>
                <label class="block text-xs font-medium text-gray-400 mb-2 uppercase tracking-wider">Confirm Password</label>
                <input type="password" name="password2" id="reg-password2" required
                    class="w-full bg-white/[0.04] border border-white/[0.08] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm text-gray-200 placeholder-gray-600 focus:outline-none transition-all"
                    placeholder="Repeat password" oninput="checkMatch()">
                <p id="match-hint" class="text-[10px] mt-1.5 hidden">&#10005; Passwords don't match</p>
            </div>

            <button type="submit" id="reg-btn"
                class="w-full text-white font-medium text-sm py-3 rounded-xl transition-all active:scale-[0.98]"
                style="background:var(--accent)" onmouseenter="this.style.background='var(--accent-hover)'" onmouseleave="this.style.background='var(--accent)'">
                Create Account
            </button>
        </form>
        <p class="text-center text-xs text-gray-500 mt-5">Already have an account? <a href="/login" class="hover:opacity-80" style="color:var(--accent)">Sign in</a></p>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
function setReq(id, met) {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    el.classList.toggle('req-met', met);
    el.classList.toggle('req-unmet', !met);
    el.querySelector('span').textContent = met ? '\u2713' : '\u2717';
}

function checkPassword() {
    const pw = document.getElementById('reg-password').value;
    setReq('req-length', pw.length >= 12);
    setReq('req-upper', /[A-Z]/.test(pw));
    setReq('req-lower', /[a-z]/.test(pw));
    setReq('req-number', /[0-9]/.test(pw));
    checkMatch();
}

function checkUsername() {
    const u = document.getElementById('reg-username').value;
    const hint = document.getElementById('username-hint');
    hint.classList.remove('hidden');
    if (u.length >= 3 && u.length <= 15) {
        hint.classList.add('req-met'); hint.classList.remove('req-unmet');
        hint.innerHTML = '\u2713 Looks good (' + u.length + '/15)';
    } else {
        hint.classList.remove('req-met'); hint.classList.add('req-unmet');
        hint.innerHTML = '\u2717 3\u201315 characters (' + u.length + '/15)';
    }
}

function checkMatch() {
    const pw = document.getElementById('reg-password').value;
    const pw2 = document.getElementById('reg-password2').value;
    const hint = document.getElementById('match-hint');
    if (pw2.length === 0) { hint.classList.add('hidden'); return; }
    hint.classList.remove('hidden');
    if (pw === pw2) {
        hint.classList.add('req-met'); hint.classList.remove('req-unmet');
        hint.innerHTML = '\u2713 Passwords match';
    } else {
        hint.classList.remove('req-met'); hint.classList.add('req-unmet');
        hint.innerHTML = '\u2717 Passwords don\'t match';
    }
}

document.getElementById('reg-form').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
    const pw = document.getElementById('reg-password').value;
    if (pw.length < 12 || !/[A-Z]/.test(pw) || !/[a-z]/.test(pw) || !/[0-9]/.test(pw)) {
        e.preventDefault();
        document.getElementById('pw-reqs').classList.remove('hidden');
        checkPassword();
    }
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
````

## File: gateway/static/forgot-password.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Reset Password — narve.ai</title>
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/_gateway_static/favicon.png">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="/_gateway_static/gateway.css">
  <style>
    .auth-error:empty { display: none; }
    .auth-success:empty { display: none; }
    .auth-success { margin-top: 16px; padding: 10px 14px; background: var(--green-bg); color: var(--green); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); font-size: 13px; border: 1px solid var(--green); }
    .token-input { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }
    .req-list { margin-top: 10px; display: none; }
    .req-list.visible { display: block; }
    .req-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-muted); padding: 3px 0; transition: color 0.15s; }
    .req-item.met { color: var(--green); }
    .req-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1.5px solid var(--border); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; transition: border-color 0.15s, background 0.15s; }
    .req-item.met .req-icon { border-color: var(--green); background: var(--green-bg); }
    .req-icon svg { width: 10px; height: 10px; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.15s; }
    .req-item.met .req-icon svg { opacity: 1; }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="auth-body">
  <div class="auth-wrap">
    <a href="/" class="auth-brand">
      <img src="/_gateway_static/img/logo.png" alt="narve.ai" class="gw-brand-logo">
      <span>narve.ai</span>
    </a>

    <div class="auth-card">
      <div class="auth-title">Reset Password</div>
      <div class="auth-sub">Enter your invite token and email to verify your identity, then set a new password.</div>

      <form class="auth-form" method="post" action="/forgot-password">
        <input type="hidden" name="_csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token }}">
        <label for="invite_token">Invite Token</label>
        <input id="invite_token" type="text" name="invite_token" required class="token-input" placeholder="Your 32-character token" autofocus>

        <label for="email">Email</label>
        <input id="email" type="email" name="email" required autocomplete="email" placeholder="The email linked to your account">

        <label for="new_password">New Password</label>
        <input id="new_password" type="password" name="new_password" required autocomplete="new-password" minlength="12">
        <div class="req-list" id="pw-reqs">
          <div class="req-item" id="req-length"><span class="req-icon"><svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="3" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg></span> At least 12 characters</div>
          <div class="req-item" id="req-upper"><span class="req-icon"><svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="3" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg></span> One uppercase letter</div>
          <div class="req-item" id="req-lower"><span class="req-icon"><svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="3" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg></span> One lowercase letter</div>
          <div class="req-item" id="req-number"><span class="req-icon"><svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="3" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg></span> One number</div>
          <div class="req-item" id="req-special"><span class="req-icon"><svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="3" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/></svg></span> One special character</div>
        </div>

        <label for="confirm_password">Confirm New Password</label>
        <input id="confirm_password" type="password" name="confirm_password" required autocomplete="new-password">

        <button type="submit" class="auth-submit">Reset Password</button>
      </form>

      <div class="auth-error">{{ error }}</div>
      <div class="auth-success">{{ success }}</div>

      <div class="auth-footer">
        <a href="/gate">Back to login</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

<script>
(function() {
  var pw = document.getElementById('new_password');
  var reqs = document.getElementById('pw-reqs');
  function setReq(id, met) {
    var el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (met) el.classList.add('met'); else el.classList.remove('met');
  }
  pw.addEventListener('focus', function() { reqs.classList.add('visible'); });
  pw.addEventListener('input', function() {
    var v = this.value;
    setReq('req-length', v.length >= 12);
    setReq('req-upper', /[A-Z]/.test(v));
    setReq('req-lower', /[a-z]/.test(v));
    setReq('req-number', /[0-9]/.test(v));
    setReq('req-special', /[^A-Za-z0-9]/.test(v));
  });
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
````

## File: gateway/static/gate.html
````html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Enter Invite Token — narve.ai</title>
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/_gateway_static/favicon.png">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="/_gateway_static/gateway.css">
  <style>
    .auth-error:empty { display: none; }
    .token-input {
      letter-spacing: 0.06em;
      font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace;
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 15px;
    }
    .gate-icon {
      width: 52px;
      height: 52px;
      border-radius: 14px;
      background: var(--accent-light);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      margin: 0 auto 20px;
    }
    .gate-icon svg { width: 26px; height: 26px; color: var(--accent); }
  </style>
</head>
<body class="auth-body">
  <div class="auth-wrap">
    <a href="/" class="auth-brand">
      <img src="/_gateway_static/img/logo.png" alt="narve.ai" class="gw-brand-logo">
      <span>narve.ai</span>
    </a>

    <div class="auth-card" style="text-align: center;">
      <div class="gate-icon">
        <svg fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5" d="M15.75 5.25a3 3 0 013 3m3 0a6 6 0 01-7.029 5.912c-.563-.097-1.159.026-1.563.43L10.5 17.25H8.25v2.25H6v2.25H2.25v-2.818c0-.597.237-1.17.659-1.591l6.499-6.499c.404-.404.527-1 .43-1.563A6 6 0 1121.75 8.25z"/></svg>
      </div>
      <div class="auth-title">Enter your invite token</div>
      <div class="auth-sub">You need a valid invite token to access narve.ai.</div>

      <form class="auth-form" method="post" action="/gate">
        <input type="hidden" name="_csrf_token" value="{{ csrf_token }}">
        <label for="token">Invite Token</label>
        <input id="token" type="text" name="token" required autofocus class="token-input"
               placeholder="Paste your invite token">

        <button type="submit" class="auth-submit">Continue →</button>
      </form>

      <div class="auth-error">{{ error }}</div>
    </div>

    <div class="auth-reassure">
      No token? Contact the admin for an invite.<br>
      <a href="/login" style="color:var(--accent)">Already have an account? Sign in directly</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</body>
</html>
````

````css
.gw-nav .gw-user-pill { display: none; }
⋮----
/* Tour responsive */
.tour-modal { max-width: 100%; max-height: 90vh; }
.tour-step { padding: 32px 24px 20px; }
.tour-step-welcome, .tour-step-finish { padding: 36px 24px 20px; }
.tour-nav { padding: 12px 24px 20px; }
.tour-step-title { font-size: 20px; }
.tour-welcome-title { font-size: 24px; }
.sub-summary-head { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 4px; }
.tour-restart-btn { display: block; margin: 8px 0 0; }
````
